NTTR.description: Nevada Test and Training Range map.

SetTacticalRadios.description: [User] Set the tactical information option, create 10 radio channels groups can subscribe and get Bogey Dope on a specific frequency automatically. You need to set up SRS first before using this!

SetLocale.description: [User] Set locale for localization. Defaults to "en"

SetMaxMissionRange.description: [User] Set the max mission range flights can be away from their home base.

AddFrequencyAndModulation.description: [User] Add additional frequency and modulation for AWACS SRS output.

SetAsGCI.description: [User] Set this instance to act as GCI TACS Theater Air Control System

SetBullsEyeAlias.description: [User] Change the bulls eye alias for AWACS callout. Defaults to "Rock"

SetReassignmentPause.description: [User] Change number of seconds AWACS waits until a Player is re-assigned a different task. Defaults to 180.

SuppressScreenMessages.description: [User] Do not show messages on screen

ZipLip.description: [User] Do not show messages on screen, no extra calls for player guidance, use short callsigns etc.

SetCustomCallsigns.description: [User] For CAP flights: Replace ME callsigns with user-defined callsigns for use with TTS and on-screen messaging

SetRadarBlur.description: [User] Set AWACS Radar Blur - the radar contact count per group/cluster will be distored up or down by this number percent. Defaults to 15 in Modern Era and 25 in Cold War.

SetColdWar.description: [User] Set AWACS to Cold War standards - ROE to VID, ROT to Passive (bypass and escape). Radar blur 25%.

SetModernEra.description: [User] Set AWACS to Modern Era standards - ROE to BVR, ROT to defensive (evade fire). Radar blur 15%.

SetModernEraDefensive.description: [User] Set AWACS to Modern Era standards - ROE to IFF, ROT to defensive (evade fire). Radar blur 15%.

SetModernEraAggressive.description: [User] Set AWACS to Modern Era standards - ROE to BVR, ROT to return fire. Radar blur 15%.

SetPolicingModern.description: [User] Set AWACS to Policing standards - ROE to VID, ROT to Lock (bypass and escape). Radar blur 15%.

SetPolicingColdWar.description: [User] Set AWACS to Policing standards - ROE to VID, ROT to Lock (bypass and escape). Radar blur 25%.

SetPlayerGuidance.description: [User] Set AWACS Player Guidance - influences missile callout and the "New" label in group callouts.

SetInterceptTimeline.description: [User] Set AWACS intercept timeline support distance.

SetAdditionalZone.description: [User] Set additional defensive zone, e.g. the zone behind the FEZ to also be defended

SetRejectionZone.description: [User] Set rejection zone, e.g. a border of a foreign country. Detected bogeys in here won't be engaged.

AddCorridorZone.description: Function to add one corridor zone.

SetCorridorZoneFloorAndCeiling.description: Function to set corridor zone floor and ceiling in FEET.

SetCorridorZoneFloorAndCeilingMeters.description: Function to set corridor zone floor and ceiling in METERS.

DrawFEZ.description: [User] Draw a line around the FEZ on the F10 map.

SetCustomAWACSCallSign.description: [User] Set AWACS custom callsigns for TTS

AddGroupToDetection.description: [User] Add a radar GROUP object to the INTEL detection SET_GROUP

SetSRSVoiceCAP.description: [User] Set AWACS Voice Details for AI CAP Planes  - SRS TTS - see @{Sound.SRS} for details

_MessageVector.description: [Internal] Message a vector BR to a position

_ToStringBULLS.description: [Internal] Return Bullseye BR for Alpha Check etc, returns e.g. "Rock 021, 16" ("Rock" being the set BE name)

_ToStringBullsTTS.description: [Internal] Change Bullseye string to be TTS friendly,  "Bullseye 021, 16" returns e.g. "Bulls eye 0 2 1. 1 6"

_GetManagedGrpID.description: [Internal] Check if a group has checked in

SetCallSignOptions.description: [User] Set player callsign options for TTS output. See @{Wrapper.Group#GROUP.GetCustomCallSign}() on how to set customized callsigns.

_GetIdlePilots.description: [Internal] Select pilots available for tasking, return AI and Human

_TargetSelectionProcess.description: [Internal] Select max 3 targets for picture, bogey dope etc

_DeleteAnchorStackFromMarker.description: [Internal] AWACS Delete a new Anchor Stack from a Marker - only works if no assignments are on the station

_MoveAnchorStackFromMarker.description: [Internal] AWACS Move a new Anchor Stack from a Marker

_CreateAnchorStackFromMarker.description: [Internal] AWACS Create a new Anchor Stack from a Marker - this then is the preferred station for players

_CreateAnchorStack.description: [Internal] AWACS Create a new Anchor Stack

_GetFreeAnchorStack.description: [Internal] AWACS get free anchor stack for managed groups

_AssignAnchorToID.description: [Internal] AWACS Assign Anchor Position to a Group

_StartIntel.description: [Internal] Start INTEL detection when we reach the AWACS Orbit Zone

_GetBlurredSize.description: [Internal] Get blurred size of group or cluster

_GetThreatLevelText.description: [Internal] Get threat level as clear test

_GetBRAfromBullsOrAO.description: [Internal] Get BR text for TTS - ie "Rock 214, 24 miles" and TTS "Rock 2 1 4, 24 miles"

_CreateTaskForGroup.description: [Internal] Register Task for Group by GID

_ReadAssignedTaskFromGID.description: [Internal] Read registered Task for Group by its ID

_ReadAssignedGroupFromTID.description: [Internal] Read assigned Group from a TaskID

_MessageAIReadyForTasking.description: [Internal] Create radio entry to tell players that CAP is on station in Anchor

AddCAPAirWing.description: [User] Add another AirWing for AI CAP Flights under management

_GetAliveOpsGroupFromTable.description: [Internal] Check for alive OpsGroup from Mission OpsGroups table

_CheckAICAPOnStation.description: [Internal] Check Enough AI CAP on Station

_AssignPilotToTarget.description: [Internal] Assign a Pilot to a target

lid.description: LID for log entries.

AICAPMissions.description: FIFO for Ops.Auftrag#AUFTRAG for AI CAP

PictureInterval.description: Interval in seconds for general picture

maxassigndistance.description: Only assing AI/Pilots to targets max this far away

PlayerGuidance.description: if true additional callouts to guide/warn players

ModernEra.description: if true we get more intel on targets, and EPLR on the AIC

callsignshort.description: if true use short (group) callsigns, e.g. "Ghost 1", else "Ghost 1 1"

keepnumber.description: if true, use the full string after # for a player custom callsign

MeldDistance.description: 25nm - distance for "Meld" Call , usually shortly before the actual engagement

AOName.description: name of the FEZ, e.g. Rock

ReassignmentPause.description: Wait this many seconds before re-assignment of a player

NoGroupTags.description: Set to true if you don't want group tags.

PlayerCapAssignment.description: Assign players to CAP tasks when they are logged on

DoString.description: Porting in Slmod's dostring - execute a string as LUA code with error handling.

spairs.description: Here is a customized version of pairs, which I called spairs because it iterates over the table in a sorted order.

kpairs.description: Here is a customized version of pairs, which I called kpairs because it iterates over the table in a sorted order, based on a function that will determine the keys as reference first.

rpairs.description: Here is a customized version of pairs, which I called rpairs because it iterates over the table in a random order.

RemoveMark.description: Remove an object (marker, circle, arrow, text, quad, ...) on the F10 map.

BeaufortScale.description: Beaufort scale: returns Beaufort number and wind description as a function of wind speed in m/s.

SecondsToClock.description: Convert time in seconds to hours, minutes and seconds.

DisplayMissionTime.description: Display clock and mission time on screen as a message to all.

ReplaceIllegalCharacters.description: Replace illegal characters [<>|/?*:\\] in a string.

Randomize.description: Randomize a value by a certain amount.

VecDot.description: Calculate the [dot product](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dot_product) of two vectors. The result is a number.

Vec2Dot.description: Calculate the [dot product](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dot_product) of two 2D vectors. The result is a number.

VecDist3D.description: Calculate the distance between two 3D vectors.

VecCross.description: Calculate the [cross product](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cross_product) of two 3D vectors. The result is a 3D vector.

VecScale.description: Scale a 3D vectors by multiplication with s.

VecSubtract.description: Substract is not a word, don't want to rename the original function because it's been around since forever

Vec2Substract.description: Calculate the difference between two 2D vectors by substracting the x,y components from each other.

Vec3Substract.description: Calculate the difference between two 3D vectors by substracting the x,y,z components from each other.

Vec2Subtract.description: Substract is not a word, don't want to rename the original function because it's been around since forever

Vec2Add.description: Calculate the total vector of two 2D vectors by adding the x,y components of each other.

GetDCSMissionDate.description: Returns the mission date. This is the date the mission started.

GetMissionDay.description: Returns the day of the mission.

GetMissionDayOfYear.description: Returns the current day of the year of the mission.

GetMagneticDeclination.description: Returns the magnetic declination of the map.

FileExists.description: Checks if a file exists or not. This requires io to be desanitized.

CheckMemory.description: Checks the current memory usage collectgarbage("count"). Info is printed to the DCS log file. Time stamp is the current mission runtime.

onEvent.description: The main event handling function... This function captures all events generated for the class.

ScheduleOnce.description: Schedule a new time event. Note that the schedule will only take place if the scheduler is *started*. Even for a single schedule event, the scheduler needs to be started also.

SetState.description: Set a state or property of the Object given a Key and a Value.

GetState.description: Get a Value given a Key from the Object.

SetProperty.description: Set one property of an object.

GetProperty.description: Get one property of an object by the key.

IsTrace.description: Enquires if tracing is on (for the class).

TraceClassMethod.description: Set tracing for a specific method of  class

_F.description: Trace a function call. This function is private.

F.description: Trace a function call. Must be at the beginning of the function logic.

F2.description: Trace a function call level 2. Must be at the beginning of the function logic.

F3.description: Trace a function call level 3. Must be at the beginning of the function logic.

T.description: Trace a function logic level 1. Can be anywhere within the function logic.

T2.description: Trace a function logic level 2. Can be anywhere within the function logic.

T3.description: Trace a function logic level 3. Can be anywhere within the function logic.

E.description: Log an exception which will be traced always. Can be anywhere within the function logic.

I.description: Log an information which will be traced always. Can be anywhere within the function logic.

ClassID.description: The ID number of the class.

ClassNameAndID.description: The name of the class concatenated with the ID number of the class.

New.description: Create a new ASTAR object.

GetNodeFromCoordinate.description: Create a node from a given coordinate.

CheckValidSurfaceType.description: Check if the coordinate of a node has is at a valid surface type.

SetValidNeighbourRoad.description: Set valid neighbours to be in a certain distance.

SetCostDist3D.description: Set heuristic cost to go from one node to another to be their 3D distance.

SetCostRoad.description: Set heuristic cost to go from one node to another to be their 3D distance.

LoS.description: Function to check if two nodes have line of sight (LoS).

Road.description: Function to check if two nodes have a road connection.

DistMax.description: Function to check if distance between two nodes is less than a threshold distance.

Dist2D.description: Heuristic cost is given by the 2D distance between the nodes.

Dist3D.description: Heuristic cost is given by the 3D distance between the nodes.

DistRoad.description: Heuristic cost is given by the distance between the nodes on road.

FindClosestNode.description: Find the closest node from a given coordinate.

New.description: Create a new BEACON Object. This doesn't activate the beacon, though, use @{#BEACON.ActivateTACAN} etc.

ActivateLink4.description: Activates a LINK4 BEACON. The unit the BEACON is attached to should be an aircraft carrier supporting this system.

New.description: Create a new CONDITION object.

SetAny.description: Set that general condition functions return `true` if `any` function returns `true`. Default is that *all* functions must return `true`.

SetNoneResult.description: Set whether `true` or `false` is returned, if no conditions at all were specified. By default `false` is returned.

SetDefaultPersistence.description: Set whether condition functions are persistent, *i.e.* are removed.

AddFunction.description: Add a function that is evaluated. It must return a `#boolean` value, *i.e.* either `true` or `false` (or `nil`).

AddFunctionAny.description: Add a function that is evaluated. It must return a `#boolean` value, *i.e.* either `true` or `false` (or `nil`).

AddFunctionAll.description: Add a function that is evaluated. It must return a `#boolean` value, *i.e.* either `true` or `false` (or `nil`).

_EvalConditionsAll.description: Check if all given condition are true.

_EvalConditionsAny.description: Check if any of the given conditions is true.

IsTimeGreater.description: Condition to check if time is greater than a given threshold time.

IsRandomSuccess.description: Function that returns `true` (success) with a certain probability. For example, if you specify `Probability=80` there is an 80% chance that `true` is returned.

lid.description: Class id string for output to DCS log file.

isAny.description: General functions are evaluated as any condition.

noneResult.description: Boolean that is returned if no condition functions at all were specified.

functionCounter.description: Running number to determine the unique ID of condition functions.

ForEach.description: Iterate the DATABASE and call an iterator function for the given set, providing the Object for each element within the set and optional parameters.

ForEachStatic.description: Iterate the DATABASE and call an iterator function for each alive STATIC, providing the STATIC and optional parameters.

ForEachPlayer.description: Iterate the DATABASE and call an iterator function for each ALIVE player, providing the player name and optional parameters.

ForEachPlayerJoined.description: Iterate the DATABASE and call an iterator function for each player who has joined the mission, providing the Unit of the player and optional parameters.

ForEachPlayerUnit.description: Iterate the DATABASE and call an iterator function for each ALIVE player UNIT, providing the player UNIT and optional parameters.

ForEachClient.description: Iterate the DATABASE and call an iterator function for each CLIENT, providing the CLIENT to the function and optional parameters.

NewFromWaypoint.description: Create a new COORDINATE object from a waypoint. This uses the components

GetCoordinate.description: Return the coordinates itself. Sounds stupid but can be useful for compatibility.

GetVec3.description: Return the coordinates of the COORDINATE in Vec3 format.

GetVec2.description: Return the coordinates of the COORDINATE in Vec2 format.

UpdateFromVec3.description: Update x,y,z coordinates from a given 3D vector.

UpdateFromCoordinate.description: Update x,y,z coordinates from another given COORDINATE.

UpdateFromVec2.description: Update x and z coordinates from a given 2D vector.

GetMagneticDeclination.description: Returns the magnetic declination at the given coordinate.

NewFromLLDD.description: Returns the coordinate from the latitude and longitude given in decimal degrees.

IsAtCoordinate2D.description: Returns if the 2 coordinates are at the same 2D position.

ScanObjects.description: Scan/find objects (units, statics, scenery) within a certain radius around the coordinate using the world.searchObjects() DCS API function.

ScanUnits.description: Scan/find UNITS within a certain radius around the coordinate using the world.searchObjects() DCS API function.

ScanStatics.description: Scan/find STATICS within a certain radius around the coordinate using the world.searchObjects() DCS API function.

FindClosestStatic.description: Find the closest static to the COORDINATE within a certain radius.

FindClosestUnit.description: Find the closest unit to the COORDINATE within a certain radius.

ScanScenery.description: Scan/find SCENERY objects within a certain radius around the coordinate using the world.searchObjects() DCS API function.

FindClosestScenery.description: Find the closest scenery to the COORDINATE within a certain radius.

DistanceFromPointVec2.description: Calculate the distance from a reference @{#COORDINATE}.

Translate.description: Add a Distance in meters from the COORDINATE orthonormal plane, with the given angle, and calculate the new COORDINATE.

GetRandomVec2InRadius.description: Return a random Vec2 within an Outer Radius and optionally NOT within an Inner Radius of the COORDINATE.

GetRandomCoordinateInRadius.description: Return a random Coordinate within an Outer Radius and optionally NOT within an Inner Radius of the COORDINATE.

GetRandomVec3InRadius.description: Return a random Vec3 within an Outer Radius and optionally NOT within an Inner Radius of the COORDINATE.

GetLandHeight.description: Return the height of the land at the coordinate.

GetLandProfileVec3.description: Returns a table of DCS#Vec3 points representing the terrain profile between two points.

GetLandProfileCoordinates.description: Returns a table of #COORDINATE representing the terrain profile between two points.

SetHeading.description: Set the heading of the coordinate, if applicable.

GetHeading.description: Get the heading of the coordinate, if applicable.

SetVelocity.description: Set the velocity of the COORDINATE.

GetVelocity.description: Return the velocity of the COORDINATE.

GetName.description: Return the "name" of the COORDINATE. Obviously, a coordinate does not have a name like a unit, static or group. So here we take the MGRS coordinates of the position.

GetMovingText.description: Return velocity text of the COORDINATE.

GetDirectionVec3.description: Return a direction vector Vec3 from COORDINATE to the COORDINATE.

GetNorthCorrectionRadians.description: Get a correction in radians of the real magnetic north of the COORDINATE.

GetAngleRadians.description: Return an angle in radians from the COORDINATE using a direction vector in Vec3 format.

GetAngleDegrees.description: Return an angle in degrees from the COORDINATE using a direction vector in Vec3 format.

GetIntermediateCoordinate.description: Return an intermediate COORDINATE between this an another coordinate.

Get2DDistance.description: Return the 2D distance in meters between the target COORDINATE and the COORDINATE.

GetTemperature.description: Returns the temperature in Degrees Celsius.

GetTemperatureText.description: Returns a text of the temperature according the measurement system @{Core.Settings}.

GetPressureText.description: Returns a text of the pressure according the measurement system @{Core.Settings}.

HeadingTo.description: Returns the heading from this to another coordinate.

GetWindVec3.description: Returns the 3D wind direction vector. Note that vector points into the direction the wind in blowing to.

GetWind.description: Returns the wind direction (from) and strength.

GetWindWithTurbulenceVec3.description: Returns the wind direction (from) and strength.

GetX.description: Return the x coordinate of the COORDINATE.

GetY.description: Return the y coordinate of the COORDINATE.

GetZ.description: Return the z coordinate of the COORDINATE.

SetX.description: Set the x coordinate of the COORDINATE.

SetY.description: Set the y coordinate of the COORDINATE.

SetZ.description: Set the z coordinate of the COORDINATE.

AddX.description: Add to the x coordinate of the COORDINATE.

GetLat.description: Return Return the Lat(itude) coordinate of the COORDINATE (ie: (parent)COORDINATE.x).

SetLat.description: Set the Lat(itude) coordinate of the COORDINATE (ie: COORDINATE.x).

GetLon.description: Return the Lon(gitude) coordinate of the COORDINATE (ie: (parent)COORDINATE.z).

SetLon.description: Set the Lon(gitude) coordinate of the COORDINATE (ie: COORDINATE.z).

GetAlt.description: Return the altitude (height) of the land at the COORDINATE.

SetAlt.description: Set the altitude of the COORDINATE.

AddAlt.description: Add to the current land height an altitude.

GetRandomPointVec2InRadius.description: Return a random COORDINATE within an Outer Radius and optionally NOT within an Inner Radius of the COORDINATE.

AddY.description: Add to the y coordinate of the COORDINATE.

AddZ.description: Add to the z coordinate of the COORDINATE.

GetWindText.description: Returns a text documenting the wind direction (from) and strength according the measurement system @{Core.Settings}.

Get3DDistance.description: Return the 3D distance in meters between the target COORDINATE and the COORDINATE.

GetBearingText.description: Provides a bearing text in degrees.

GetDistanceText.description: Provides a distance text expressed in the units of measurement.

GetAltitudeText.description: Return the altitude text of the COORDINATE.

GetVelocityText.description: Return the velocity text of the COORDINATE.

GetHeadingText.description: Return the heading text of the COORDINATE.

GetBRAText.description: Provides a Bearing / Range / Altitude string

SetAtLandheight.description: Set altitude to be at land height (i.e. on the ground!)

WaypointAir.description: Build an air type route point.

WaypointAirFlyOverPoint.description: Build a Waypoint Air "Fly Over Point".

WaypointAirTakeOffParkingHot.description: Build a Waypoint Air "Take Off Parking Hot".

WaypointAirTakeOffParking.description: Build a Waypoint Air "Take Off Parking".

WaypointAirTakeOffRunway.description: Build a Waypoint Air "Take Off Runway".

WaypointAirLandingReFu.description: Build a Waypoint Air "LandingReFuAr". Mimics the aircraft ReFueling and ReArming.

WaypointGround.description: Build an ground type route point.

WaypointNaval.description: Build route waypoint point for Naval units.

GetClosestAirbase.description: Gets the nearest airbase with respect to the current coordinates.

GetClosestAirbase2.description: [kept for downwards compatibility only] Gets the nearest airbase with respect to the current coordinates.

GetClosestFreeParkingSpot.description: Gets the nearest free parking spot.

GetClosestOccupiedParkingSpot.description: Gets the nearest occupied parking spot.

GetClosestPointToRoad.description: Gets the nearest coordinate to a road (or railroad).

GetPathlineOnRoad.description: Returns a table of coordinates to a destination using only roads or railroads.

GetSurfaceType.description: Gets the surface type at the coordinate.

IsSurfaceTypeLand.description: Checks if the surface type is land.

IsSurfaceTypeRoad.description: Checks if the surface type is road.

IsSurfaceTypeRunway.description: Checks if the surface type is runway.

IsSurfaceTypeShallowWater.description: Checks if the surface type is shallow water.

IsSurfaceTypeWater.description: Checks if the surface type is water.

Explosion.description: Creates an explosion at the point of a certain intensity.

IlluminationBomb.description: Creates an illumination bomb at the point.

Smoke.description: Create colored smoke the point. The smoke we last up to 5 min (DCS limitation) but you can optionally specify a shorter duration or stop it manually.

GetSmokeOffsetDirection.description: Get the offset direction when using `COORDINATE:Smoke()`.

SetSmokeOffsetDirection.description: Set the offset direction when using `COORDINATE:Smoke()`.

GetSmokeOffsetDistance.description: Get the offset distance when using `COORDINATE:Smoke()`.

SetSmokeOffsetDistance.description: Set the offset distance when using `COORDINATE:Smoke()`.

SwitchSmokeOffsetOn.description: Set the offset on when using `COORDINATE:Smoke()`.

SwitchSmokeOffsetOff.description: Set the offset off when using `COORDINATE:Smoke()`.

StopSmoke.description: Stops smoking the point in a color.

BigSmokeAndFire.description: Big smoke and fire at the coordinate.

StopBigSmokeAndFire.description: Stop big smoke and fire at the coordinate.

BigSmokeAndFireSmall.description: Small smoke and fire at the coordinate.

BigSmokeAndFireMedium.description: Medium smoke and fire at the coordinate.

BigSmokeAndFireLarge.description: Large smoke and fire at the coordinate.

BigSmokeAndFireHuge.description: Huge smoke and fire at the coordinate.

Flare.description: Flares the point in a color.

TextToAll.description: Text to all. Creates a text imposed on the map at the COORDINATE. Text scales with the map.

IsLOS.description: Returns if a Coordinate has Line of Sight (LOS) with the ToCoordinate.

IsInRadius.description: Returns if a Coordinate is in a certain Radius of this Coordinate in 2D plane using the X and Z axis.

IsInSphere.description: Returns if a Coordinate is in a certain radius of this Coordinate in 3D space using the X, Y and Z axis.

GetSunriseAtDate.description: Get sun rise time for a specific date at the coordinate.

GetSunriseAtDayOfYear.description: Get sun rise time for a specific day of the year at the coordinate.

GetMinutesToSunrise.description: Get minutes until the next sun rise at this coordinate.

IsDay.description: Check if it is day, i.e. if the sun has risen about the horizon at this coordinate.

IsNight.description: Check if it is night, i.e. if the sun has set below the horizon at this coordinate.

GetSunsetAtDate.description: Get sun set time for a specific date at the coordinate.

GetMinutesToSunset.description: Get minutes until the next sun set at this coordinate.

ToStringBR.description: Return a BR string from a COORDINATE to the COORDINATE.

ToStringBearing.description: Return a Bearing string from a COORDINATE to the (self) COORDINATE.

ToStringBRA.description: Return a BRA string from a COORDINATE to the COORDINATE.

ToStringBRAANATO.description: Create a BRAA NATO call string to this COORDINATE from the FromCOORDINATE. Note - BRA delivered if no aspect can be obtained and "Merged" if range < 3nm

GetBullseyeCoordinate.description: Return the BULLSEYE as COORDINATE Object

ToStringBULLS.description: Return a BULLS string out of the BULLS of the coalition to the COORDINATE.

ToStringAspect.description: Return an aspect string from a COORDINATE to the Angle of the object.

GetLLDDM.description: Get Latitude and Longitude in Degrees Decimal Minutes (DDM).

ToStringLLDMS.description: Provides a Lat Lon string in Degree Minute Second format.

ToStringLLDDM.description: Provides a Lat Lon string in Degree Decimal Minute format.

NewFromMGRSString.description: Provides a COORDINATE from an MGRS String

NewFromMGRS.description: Provides a COORDINATE from an MGRS Coordinate

ToStringFromRP.description: Provides a coordinate string of the point, based on a coordinate format system:

ToStringFromRPShort.description: Provides a coordinate string of the point, based on a coordinate format system:

ToStringA2G.description: Provides a coordinate string of the point, based on the A2G coordinate format system.

ToStringA2A.description: Provides a coordinate string of the point, based on the A2A coordinate format system.

ToString.description: Provides a coordinate string of the point, based on a coordinate format system:

ToStringPressure.description: Provides a pressure string of the point, based on a measurement system:

ToStringWind.description: Provides a wind string of the point, based on a measurement system:

ToStringTemperature.description: Provides a temperature string of the point, based on a measurement system:

IsInSteepArea.description: Function to check if a coordinate is in a steep (>8% elevation) area of the map

IsInFlatArea.description: Function to check if a coordinate is in a flat (<8% elevation) area of the map

GetRandomPointVec3InRadius.description: Return a random COORDINATE within an Outer Radius and optionally NOT within an Inner Radius of the COORDINATE.

GetSimpleZones.description: Search for clear zones in a given area. A powerful and efficient function using Disposition to find clear areas for spawning ground units avoiding trees, water and map scenery.

Heading.description: Heading in degrees. Needs to be set first.

Velocity.description: Velocity in meters per second. Needs to be set first.

New.description: VELOCITY Constructor.

Set.description: Set the velocity in Mps (meters per second).

Get.description: Get the velocity in Mps (meters per second).

SetKmph.description: Set the velocity in Kmph (kilometers per hour).

GetKmph.description: Get the velocity in Kmph (kilometers per hour).

SetMiph.description: Set the velocity in Miph (miles per hour).

GetMiph.description: Get the velocity in Miph (miles per hour).

GetText.description: Get the velocity in text, according the player @{Core.Settings}.

ToString.description: Get the velocity in text, according the player or default @{Core.Settings}.

New.description: VELOCITY_POSITIONABLE Constructor.

Get.description: Get the velocity in Mps (meters per second).

GetKmph.description: Get the velocity in Kmph (kilometers per hour).

GetMiph.description: Get the velocity in Miph (miles per hour).

ToString.description: Get the velocity in text, according the player or default @{Core.Settings}.

Clear.description: Clears all previous messages from the screen before the new message is displayed. Not that this must come before all functions starting with ToX(), e.g. ToAll(), ToGroup() etc.

ToSet.description: Sends a MESSAGE to a SET_GROUP, SET_UNIT, or SET_CLIENT.

ToSetIf.description: Sends a MESSAGE to a SET_GROUP, SET_UNIT, or SET_CLIENT if a condition is true.

ToGroup.description: Sends a MESSAGE to a Group.

ToUnit.description: Sends a MESSAGE to a Unit.

ToCountry.description: Sends a MESSAGE to a Country.

ToCountryIf.description: Sends a MESSAGE to a Country.

ToBlue.description: Sends a MESSAGE to the Blue coalition.

ToRed.description: Sends a MESSAGE to the Red Coalition.

ToCoalition.description: Sends a MESSAGE to a Coalition.

ToCoalitionIf.description: Sends a MESSAGE to a Coalition if the given Condition is true.

ToAll.description: Sends a MESSAGE to all players.

ToAllIf.description: Sends a MESSAGE to all players if the given Condition is true.

ToLog.description: Sends a MESSAGE to DCS log file.

ToLogIf.description: Sends a MESSAGE to DCS log file if the given Condition is true.

FSM.description: (Finite State Machine) are objects that model and control long lasting business processes and workflow.

New.description: Creates a new FSM object.

SetStartState.description: Sets the start state of the FSM.

GetStartState.description: Returns the start state of the FSM.

AddTransition.description: Add a new transition rule to the FSM.

GetTransitions.description: Returns a table of the transition rules defined within the FSM.

AddProcess.description: Set the default @{#FSM_PROCESS} template with key ProcessName providing the ProcessClass and the process object when it is assigned to a @{Wrapper.Controllable} by the task.

GetProcesses.description: Returns a table of the SubFSM rules defined within the FSM.

AddScore.description: Adds a score for the FSM to be achieved.

AddScoreProcess.description: Adds a score for the FSM_PROCESS to be achieved.

GetScores.description: Returns a table with the scores defined.

GetSubs.description: Returns a table with the Subs defined.

Is.description: Check if FSM is in state.

is.description: Check if FSM is in state.

can.description: Check if can do an event.

cannot.description: Check if cannot do an event.

New.description: Creates a new FSM_CONTROLLABLE object.

OnAfterStop.description: OnAfter Transition Handler for Event Stop.

SetControllable.description: Sets the CONTROLLABLE object that the FSM_CONTROLLABLE governs.

GetControllable.description: Gets the CONTROLLABLE object that the FSM_CONTROLLABLE governs.

New.description: Creates a new FSM_PROCESS object.

Copy.description: Creates a new FSM_PROCESS object based on this FSM_PROCESS.

SetTask.description: Sets the task of the process.

GetTask.description: Gets the task of the process.

GetMission.description: Gets the mission of the process.

GetCommandCenter.description: Gets the mission of the process.

Message.description: Send a message of the @{Tasking.Task} to the Group of the Unit.

Assign.description: Assign the process to a @{Wrapper.Unit} and activate the process.

onstatechange.description: StateMachine callback function for a FSM_PROCESS

New.description: Creates a new FSM_TASK object.
Creates a new FSM_SET object.

Set.description: Sets the SET_BASE object that the FSM_SET governs.

Get.description: Gets the SET_BASE object that the FSM_SET governs.

SPAWN.description: dynamically new groups of units in running missions.

New.description: Creates the main object to spawn a @{Wrapper.Group} defined in the DCS ME.

NewWithAlias.description: Creates a new SPAWN instance to create new groups based on the defined template and using a new alias for each new group.

InitKeepUnitNames.description: Keeps the unit names as defined within the mission editor,

InitLateActivated.description: Flags that the spawned groups must be spawned late activated.

InitAirbase.description: Set spawns to happen at a particular airbase. Only for aircraft, of course.

InitHeading.description: Defines the Heading for the new spawned units.

InitCoalition.description: Sets the coalition of the spawned group. Note that it might be necessary to also set the country explicitly!

InitCountry.description: Sets the country of the spawn group. Note that the country determines the coalition of the group depending on which country is defined to be on which side for each specific mission!

InitCategory.description: Sets category ID of the group.

InitSTN.description: [Airplane - F15/16/18/AWACS/B1B/Tanker only] Set the STN Link16 starting number of the Group; each unit of the spawned group will have a consecutive STN set.

InitSADL.description: [Airplane - A10-C II only] Set the SADL TN starting number of the Group; each unit of the spawned group will have a consecutive SADL set.

InitSpeedMps.description: [Airplane] Set the initial speed on spawning in meters per second. Useful when spawning in-air only.

InitSpeedKnots.description: [Airplane] Set the initial speed on spawning in knots. Useful when spawning in-air only.

InitSpeedKph.description: [Airplane] Set the initial speed on spawning in kilometers per hour. Useful when spawning in-air only.

InitRadioCommsOnOff.description: Sets the radio communication on or off. Same as checking/unchecking the COMM box in the mission editor.

InitRadioFrequency.description: Sets the radio frequency of the group.

InitRadioModulation.description: Set radio modulation. Default is AM.

InitModex.description: Sets the modex of the first unit of the group. If more units are in the group, the number is increased by one with every unit.

InitRandomizePosition.description: Randomizes the position of @{Wrapper.Group}s that are spawned within a radius band, given an Outer and Inner radius, from the point that the spawn happens.

InitRandomizeUnits.description: Randomizes the UNITs that are spawned within a radius band given an Outer and Inner radius.

InitSetUnitRelativePositions.description: Spawn the UNITs of this group with individual relative positions to unit #1 and individual headings.

InitSetUnitAbsolutePositions.description: Spawn the UNITs of this group with individual absolute positions and individual headings.

InitValidateAndRepositionGroundUnits.description: Maintains the original layout and unit positions as close as possible by searching for the next closest valid position to each unit.

InitGrouping.description: When spawning a new group, make the grouping of the units according the InitGrouping setting.

InitRandomizeZones.description: This method provides the functionality to randomize the spawning of the Groups at a given list of zones of different types.

InitRandomizeCallsign.description: [AIR/Fighter only!] This method randomizes the callsign for a new group.

InitCallSign.description: [BLUE AIR only!] This method sets a specific callsign for a spawned group. Use for a group with one unit only!

InitCallSignRed.description: [RED AIR only!] This method sets a specific callsign for a spawned group.

InitPositionCoordinate.description: This method sets a spawn position for the group that is different from the location of the template.

InitPositionVec2.description: This method sets a spawn position for the group that is different from the location of the template.

InitRepeatOnEngineShutDown.description: Respawn after landing when its engines have shut down.

InitCleanUp.description: Delete groups that have not moved for X seconds - AIR ONLY!!!

InitArray.description: Makes the groups visible before start (like a battalion).

StopRepeat.description: Stop the SPAWN InitRepeat function (EVENT handler for takeoff, land and engine shutdown)

InitAIOnOff.description: Turns the AI On or Off for the @{Wrapper.Group} when spawning.

InitAIOn.description: Turns the AI On for the @{Wrapper.Group} when spawning.

InitAIOff.description: Turns the AI Off for the @{Wrapper.Group} when spawning.

InitDelayOnOff.description: Turns the Delay On or Off for the first @{Wrapper.Group} scheduled spawning.

InitDelayOn.description: Turns the Delay On for the @{Wrapper.Group} when spawning with @{#SpawnScheduled}(). In effect then the 1st group will only be spawned

InitDelayOff.description: Turns the Delay Off for the @{Wrapper.Group} when spawning.

InitHiddenOnMap.description: Hide the group on the map view (visible to game master slots!).

InitHiddenOnMFD.description: Hide the group on MFDs (visible to game master slots!).

InitHiddenOnPlanner.description: Hide the group on planner (visible to game master slots!).

Spawn.description: Will spawn a group based on the internal index.

ReSpawn.description: Will re-spawn a group based on a given index.

SetSpawnIndex.description: Set the spawn index to a specified index number.

SpawnWithIndex.description: Will spawn a group with a specified index number.

SpawnScheduleStop.description: Will stop the scheduled spawning scheduler.

OnSpawnGroup.description: Allows to place a CallFunction hook when a new group spawns.

SpawnAtParkingSpot.description: Spawn a group on an @{Wrapper.Airbase} at a specific parking spot.

ParkAircraft.description: Will park a group at an @{Wrapper.Airbase}.

SpawnFromVec3.description: Will spawn a group from a Vec3 in 3D space.

SpawnFromCoordinate.description: Will spawn a group from a Coordinate in 3D space.

SpawnFromPointVec3.description: Will spawn a group from a PointVec3 in 3D space.

InitUnControlled.description: (AIR) Will spawn a plane group in UnControlled or Controlled mode...

GetCoordinate.description: Get the Coordinate of the Group that is Late Activated as the template for the SPAWN object.

SpawnGroupName.description: Will return the SpawnGroupName either with with a specific count number or without any count.

GetFirstAliveGroup.description: Will find the first alive @{Wrapper.Group} it has spawned, and return the alive @{Wrapper.Group} object and the first Index where the first alive @{Wrapper.Group} object has been found.

GetLastAliveGroup.description: Will find the last alive @{Wrapper.Group} object, and will return a reference to the last live @{Wrapper.Group} object and the last Index where the last alive @{Wrapper.Group} object has been found.

GetGroupFromIndex.description: Get the group from an index.

_GetPrefixFromGroup.description: Return the prefix of a SpawnUnit.

_GetPrefixFromGroupName.description: Return the prefix of a spawned group.

GetSpawnIndexFromGroup.description: Get the index from a given group.

_GetLastIndex.description: Return the last maximum index that can be used.

_GetGroupCategoryID.description: Gets the CategoryID of the Group with the given SpawnPrefix

_GetGroupCoalitionID.description: Gets the CoalitionID of the Group with the given SpawnPrefix

_GetGroupCountryID.description: Gets the CountryID of the Group with the given SpawnPrefix

_GetTemplate.description: Gets the Group Template from the ME environment definition.

_RandomizeTemplate.description: Private method that randomizes the template of the group.

_SetInitialPosition.description: Private method that sets the DCS#Vec2 where the Group will be spawned.

_RandomizeZones.description: Private method that randomizes the @{Core.Zone}s where the Group will be spawned.

_GetSpawnIndex.description: Get the next index of the groups to be spawned. This method is complicated, as it is used at several spaces.

_OnTakeOff.description: Will detect AIR Units taking off... When the event takes place, the spawned Group is registered as airborne...

_OnLand.description: Will detect AIR Units landing... When the event takes place, the spawned Group is registered as landed.

_OnEngineShutDown.description: Will detect AIR Units shutting down their engines ...

_Scheduler.description: This function is called automatically by the Spawning scheduler.

NewFromStatic.description: Creates the main object to spawn a @{Wrapper.Static} defined in the mission editor (ME).

NewFromTemplate.description: Creates the main object to spawn a @{Wrapper.Static} given a template table.

NewFromType.description: Creates the main object to spawn a @{Wrapper.Static} from a given type.

_InitResourceTable.description: (Internal/Cargo) Init the resource table for STATIC object that should be spawned containing storage objects.

AddCargoResource.description: (User/Cargo) Add to resource table for STATIC object that should be spawned containing storage objects. Inits the object table if necessary and sets it to be cargo for helicopters.

ResetCargoResources.description: (User/Cargo) Resets resource table to zero for STATIC object that should be spawned containing storage objects. Inits the object table if necessary and sets it to be cargo for helicopters.

InitCoordinate.description: Initialize heading of the spawned static.

InitHeading.description: Initialize heading of the spawned static.

InitLivery.description: Initialize livery of the spawned static.

InitType.description: Initialize type of the spawned static.

InitShape.description: Initialize shape of the spawned static. Required by some but not all statics.

InitHiddenOnMap.description: Hide the static on the map view (visible to game master slots!).

InitHiddenOnMFD.description: Hide the static on MFDs (visible to game master slots!).

InitHiddenOnPlanner.description: Hide the static on planner (visible to game master slots!).

InitCountry.description: Initialize country of the spawned static. This determines the category.

InitNamePrefix.description: Initialize name prefix statics get. This will be appended by "#0001", "#0002" etc.

InitValidateAndRepositionStatic.description: Uses the initial position if it's a valid location.

OnSpawnStatic.description: Allows to place a CallFunction hook when a new static spawns.

SpawnFromPointVec2.description: Creates a new @{Wrapper.Static} from a COORDINATE.

SpawnFromCoordinate.description: Creates a new @{Wrapper.Static} from a COORDINATE.

_SpawnStatic.description: Spawns a new static using a given template. Additionally, the country ID needs to be specified, which also determines the coalition of the spawned static.

SpawnIndex.description: Running number increased with each new Spawn.

InitLinkUnit.description: The unit the static is linked to.

InitStaticCoordinate.description: Coordinate where to spawn the static.

InitStaticDead.description: Set static to be dead if true.

InitStaticCargo.description: If true, static can act as cargo.

New.description: Create a new TIMER object.

StartIf.description: Start TIMER object if a condition is met. Useful for e.g. debugging.

Stop.description: Stop the timer by removing the timer function.

SetMaxFunctionCalls.description: Set max number of function calls. When the function has been called this many times, the TIMER is stopped.

SetTimeInterval.description: Set time interval. Can also be set when the timer is already running and is applied after the next function call.

IsRunning.description: Check if the timer has been started and was not stopped.

lid.description: Class id string for output to DCS log file.

tid.description: Timer ID returned by the DCS API function.

para.description: Parameters passed to the timer function.

dT.description: Time interval between function calls in seconds.

ncallsMax.description: Max number of function calls. If reached, timer is stopped.

isrunning.description: If `true`, timer is running. Else it was not started yet or was stopped.

New.description: GOAL Constructor.

AddPlayerContribution.description: Add a new contribution by a player.

GetPlayerContributions.description: Get the players who contributed to achieve the goal.

GetTotalContributions.description: Gets the total contributions that happened to achieve the goal.

IsAchieved.description: Validates if the goal is achieved.

New.description: SPOT Constructor.

onafterLaseOn.description: On after LaseOn event. Activates the laser spot.

onafterLaseOnCoordinate.description: On after LaseOnCoordinate event. Activates the laser spot.

IsLasing.description: Check if the SPOT is lasing

SetRelativeStartPosition.description: Set laser start position relative to the lasing unit.

New.description: Function to instantiate a new #MARKEROPS_BASE object.

onbeforeMarkAdded.description: On before "MarkAdded" event. Triggered when a Marker is added to the F10 map.

onbeforeMarkChanged.description: On before "MarkChanged" event. Triggered when a Marker is changed on the F10 map.

onbeforeMarkDeleted.description: On before "MarkDeleted" event. Triggered when a Marker is removed from the F10 map.

Casesensitive.description: Enforce case when identifying the Tag, i.e. tag ~= Tag

New.description: Instantiate a new object

GetDefaultLocale.description: Get the default locale of this object

SetDefaultLocale.description: Set default locale of this object

FlushToLog.description: Flush all entries to the log

lid.description: LID for log entries.

textclass.description: Name of the class the texts belong to.

Classname.description: Name of the class this entry is for.

Locale.description: Locale of this entry, defaults to "en".

New.description: Create a new PATHLINE object. Points need to be added later.

NewFromVec2Array.description: Create a new PATHLINE object from a given list of 2D points.

NewFromVec3Array.description: Create a new PATHLINE object from a given list of 3D points.

FindByName.description: Find a pathline in the database.

AddPointFromVec2.description: Add a point to the path from a given 2D position. The third dimension is determined from the land height.

AddPointFromVec3.description: Add a point to the path from a given 3D position.

GetPoints.description: Get points of pathline. Not that points are tables, that contain more information as just the 2D or 3D position but also the surface type etc.

GetCoordinates.description: Get COORDINATES of pathline. Note that COORDINATE objects are created when calling this function. That does involve deep copy calls and can have an impact on performance if done too often.

GetPointFromIndex.description: Get the n-th point of the pathline.

GetPoint3DFromIndex.description: Get the 3D position of the n-th point.

GetPoint2DFromIndex.description: Get the 2D position of the n-th point.

GetLength.description: Calculate the length of the line.

lid.description: Class id string for output to DCS log file.

points.description: List of 3D points defining the path.

SetController.description: Set the CLIENTMENUMANAGER for this entry.

SetOnce.description: The entry will be deleted after being used used - for menu entries with functions only.

RemoveF10.description: Remove the entry from the F10 menu.

RemoveSubEntries.description: Remove all subentries (children) from this entry.

Clear.description: Remove this entry and all subentries (children) from this entry.

lid.description: Lid for log entries

New.description: Create a new ClientManager instance.

InitAutoPropagation.description: Set this Client Manager to auto-propagate menus once to newly joined players. Useful if you have one menu structure only. Does not automatically push follow-up changes to the client(s).

NewEntry.description: Create a new entry in the generic structure.

EntryUUIDExists.description: Check matching entry in the generic structure by UUID.

FindEntryByUUID.description: Find matching entry in the generic structure by UUID.

FindUUIDsByText.description: Find matching entries by text in the generic structure by UUID.

FindEntriesByText.description: Find matching entries in the generic structure by the menu text.

FindUUIDsByParent.description: Find matching entries under a parent in the generic structure by UUID.

FindEntriesByParent.description: Find matching entries in the generic structure under a parent.

ChangeEntryText.description: Alter the text of a leaf entry in the generic structure and push to one specific client's F10 menu.

Propagate.description: Push the complete menu structure to each of the clients in the set - refresh the menu tree of the clients.

AddEntry.description: Push a single previously created entry into the F10 menu structure of all clients.

ResetMenu.description: Blank out the menu - remove all root entries and all entries below from the client's F10 menus, leaving the generic structure untouched.

ResetMenuComplete.description: Blank out the menu - remove all root entries and all entries below from all clients' F10 menus, and delete the generic structure.

DeleteEntry.description: Remove the entry and all entries below the given entry from the client's F10 menus.

DeleteF10Entry.description: Remove the entry and all entries below the given entry from the client's F10 menus.

DeleteGenericEntry.description: Remove the entry and all entries below the given entry from the generic tree.

RemoveGenericSubEntries.description: Remove all entries below the given entry from the generic tree.

RemoveF10SubEntries.description: Remove all entries below the given entry from the client's F10 menus.

lid.description: Lid for log entries

clientset.description: The set of clients this menu manager is for

New.description: Create a new VECTOR class instance from given cartesian coordinates `x`, `y` and `z`, where `z` is optional.

NewFromVec.description: Create a new VECTOR class instance from given 2D or 3D vector object.

NewFromPolar.description: Create a new VECTOR class instance from polar coordinates (r, phi).

NewFromSpherical.description: Create a new VECTOR class instance from spherical coordinates (r, theta, phi).

NewDirectionalVector.description: Get the directional vector that points from a given vector `a` to another given vector `b`.

NewFromLLDD.description: Creates a new VECTOR instance from given the latitude and longitude in decimal degrees (DD).

NewFromLLDMS.description: Creates a new VECTOR instance from given latitude and longitude in degrees, minutes and seconds (DMS).

GetCoordinate.description: Get a COORDINATE object.

GetDistance.description: Get the distance from this vector to another vector.

GetDirectionalVectorTo.description: Get the directional vector that points from this VECTOR to another VECTOR `a`.

GetDirectionalVectorFrom.description: Get the directional vector that points from another VECTOR `a` to this VECTOR.

GetHeadingTo.description: Get the heading from this vector to another given vector.

GetHeadingFrom.description: Get the heading from a given vector to this vector.

GetLatitudeLongitude.description: Get latitude and longitude of this vector.

GetMGRS.description: Get MGRS information of this vector.

GetHeadingDelta.description: Get the difference of the heading of this vector w.

GetIntermediateVector.description: Return an intermediate VECTOR between this and another given vector.

SetX.description: Set x-component of vector. The x-axis points to the North.

SetY.description: Set y-component of vector. The y-axis points to the upwards and describes the altitude above mean sea level.

SetZ.description: Set z-component of vector. The z-axis points to the East.

AddVec.description: Add a vector to this. This function works for DCS#Vec2, DCS#Vec3, VECTOR, COORDINATE objects.

SubVec.description: Subtract a vector from this one. This function works for DCS#Vec2, DCS#Vec3, VECTOR, COORDINATE objects.

Dot.description: Calculate the dot product of this VECTOR with another vector. This function works for DCS#Vec2, DCS#Vec3, VECTOR, COORDINATE objects.

Rot.description: Calculate the rotation or cross product of this VECTOR with another vector. This function works for DCS#Vec2, DCS#Vec3, VECTOR, COORDINATE objects.

Copy.description: Get a clone (deep copy) of this vector.

Replace.description: Replace this vector with another one.

Normalize.description: Normalize this vector, so that has a length of 1.

Translate.description: Translate the vector by a given distance and angle.

Rotate2D.description: Rotate the VECTOR clockwise in the 2D (x,z) plane.

GetSurfaceType.description: Get the surface type at the vector.

GetSurfaceTypeName.description: Get the name of surface type at the vector.

IsVisible.description: Check if a given vector has line of sight with this vector.

GetClosestRoad.description: Get a vector on the closest road.

GetClosestRailroad.description: Get a vector on the closest railroad.

GetPathOnRoad.description: Get the path on road from this vector to a given other vector.

GetProfile.description: Get profile of the land between the two passed points.

GetInterceptPoint.description: Returns an intercept point at which a ray drawn from the this vector in the passed normalized direction for a specified distance.

GetSurfaceHeight.description: Returns the distance from sea level at this vector.

GetSurfaceHeightAndDepth.description: Returns the distance from sea level at this vector.

GetWindVector.description: Returns a velocity vector of the wind at this vector. Turbolences can be optionally be included.

GetTemperaturAndPressure.description: Returns a temperature and pressure at this vector.

Smoke.description: Creates a smoke at this vector.

SmokeAndFire.description: Creates a large smoke and fire effect of a specified type and density at this vector.

IlluminationBomb.description: Creates an illumination bomb at the specified point.

Explosion.description: Creates an explosion at a given point at the specified power.

Flare.description: Creates a signal flare at the given point in the specified color. The flare will be launched in the direction of the azimuth angle.

ArrowTo.description: Creates a arrow from this VECTOR to another vector on the F10 map.

_IsVector.description: Check if passed object is a Vector.

__add.description: Meta function to add vectors together.

__mul.description: Meta function to multiplicate vector by another vector or a scalar.

__div.description: Meta function for dividing a vector by a scalar or by another vector.

__unm.description: Meta function to make vectors negative.

__eq.description: Meta function to check if two vectors are equal.

__tostring.description: Meta function to change how vectors appear as string.

x.description: Component pointing North if > 0 and South if < 0.

y.description: Component pointing up if >0 and down if < 0. This describes the altitude above main sea level.

z.description: Component pointing East if > 0 and West if < 0.

OBJECT.description: wraps the DCS Object derived objects.

New.description: Create a new OBJECT from a DCSObject

IDENTIFIABLE.description: is an intermediate class wrapping DCS Object class derived Objects.

New.description: Create a new IDENTIFIABLE from a DCSIdentifiable

IsAlive.description: Returns if the Identifiable is alive.

GetTypeName.description: Returns the type name of the DCS Identifiable.

GetCategory.description: Returns object category of the DCS Identifiable. One of

GetCategoryName.description: Returns the DCS Identifiable category name as defined within the DCS Identifiable Descriptor.

IsRed.description: Returns true if identifiable is of RED coalition.

IsBlue.description: Returns true if identifiable is of BLUE coalition.

IsNeutral.description: Returns true if identifiable is of NEUTRAL coalition.

GetCoalitionName.description: Returns the name of the coalition of the Identifiable.

GetCountryName.description: Returns country name of the Identifiable.

GetDesc.description: Returns Identifiable descriptor. Descriptor type depends on Identifiable category.

HasAttribute.description: Check if the Object has the attribute.

GetCallsign.description: Gets the CallSign of the IDENTIFIABLE, which is a blank by default.

New.description: Create a new POSITIONABLE from a DCSPositionable

GetDCSObject.description: Returns the DCS object. Polymorphic for other classes like UNIT, STATIC, GROUP, AIRBASE.

GetPosition.description: Returns a pos3 table of the objects current position and orientation in 3D space. X, Y, Z values are unit vectors defining the objects orientation.

GetOrientation.description: Returns a {@DCS#Vec3} table of the objects current orientation in 3D space. X, Y, Z values are unit vectors defining the objects orientation.

GetOrientationX.description: Returns a {@DCS#Vec3} table of the objects current X orientation in 3D space, i.e. along the direction of movement.

GetOrientationY.description: Returns a {@DCS#Vec3} table of the objects current Y orientation in 3D space, i.e. vertical orientation.

GetOrientationZ.description: Returns a {@DCS#Vec3} table of the objects current Z orientation in 3D space, i.e. perpendicular to direction of movement.

GetOrientationVectors.description: Returns the vectors of the orientation of the object:

GetPositionVec3.description: Returns the @{DCS#Position3} position vectors indicating the point and direction vectors in 3D of the POSITIONABLE within the mission.

GetVec3.description: Returns the @{DCS#Vec3} vector indicating the 3D vector of the POSITIONABLE within the mission.

GetVec2.description: Returns the @{DCS#Vec2} vector indicating the point in 2D of the POSITIONABLE within the mission.

GetVector.description: Returns the @{Core.Vector#VECTOR} indicating the 3D position of the object on the map.

GetPointVec2.description: Returns a COORDINATE object indicating the point in 2D of the POSITIONABLE within the mission.

GetPointVec3.description: Returns a COORDINATE object indicating the point in 3D of the POSITIONABLE within the mission.

GetCoord.description: Returns a reference to a COORDINATE object indicating the point in 3D of the POSITIONABLE within the mission.

GetCoordinate.description: Returns a new COORDINATE object indicating the point in 3D of the POSITIONABLE within the mission.

Explode.description: Triggers an explosion at the coordinates of the positionable.

GetOffsetCoordinate.description: Returns a COORDINATE object, which is offset with respect to the orientation of the POSITIONABLE.

GetRelativeCoordinate.description: Returns a COORDINATE object, which is transformed to be relative to the POSITIONABLE. Inverse of @{#POSITIONABLE.GetOffsetCoordinate}.

GetRandomVec3.description: Returns a random @{DCS#Vec3} vector within a range, indicating the point in 3D of the POSITIONABLE within the mission.

GetBoundingBox.description: Get the bounding box of the underlying POSITIONABLE DCS Object.

GetBoundingRadius.description: Get the bounding radius of the underlying POSITIONABLE DCS Object.

GetAltitude.description: Returns the altitude above sea level of the POSITIONABLE.

IsAboveRunway.description: Returns if the Positionable is located above a runway.

GetHeading.description: Returns the POSITIONABLE heading in degrees.

IsAir.description: Returns if the unit is of an air category.

IsGround.description: Returns if the unit is of an ground category.

IsShip.description: Returns if the unit is of ship category.

IsSubmarine.description: Returns if the unit is a submarine.

InAir.description: Returns true if the POSITIONABLE is in the air.

GetVelocity.description: Returns the @{Core.Velocity} object from the POSITIONABLE.

GetVelocityVec3.description: Returns the POSITIONABLE velocity Vec3 vector.

GetRelativeVelocity.description: Get relative velocity with respect to another POSITIONABLE.

GetHeight.description: Returns the POSITIONABLE height above sea level in meters.

GetVelocityKMH.description: Returns the POSITIONABLE velocity in km/h.

GetVelocityMPS.description: Returns the POSITIONABLE velocity in meters per second.

GetVelocityKNOTS.description: Returns the POSITIONABLE velocity in knots.

GetAirspeedTrue.description: Returns the true airspeed (TAS). This is calculated from the current velocity minus wind in 3D.

GetGroundSpeed.description: Returns the horizonal speed relative to eath's surface. The vertical component of the velocity vector is projected out (set to zero).

GetAoA.description: Returns the Angle of Attack of a POSITIONABLE.

GetClimbAngle.description: Returns the climb or descent angle of the POSITIONABLE.

GetPitch.description: Returns the pitch angle of a POSITIONABLE.

GetRoll.description: Returns the roll angle of a unit.

GetYaw.description: Returns the yaw angle of a POSITIONABLE.

GetMessageText.description: Returns the message text with the callsign embedded (if there is one).

GetMessage.description: Returns a message with the callsign embedded (if there is one).

GetMessageType.description: Returns a message of a specified type with the callsign embedded (if there is one).

MessageToAll.description: Send a message to all coalitions.

MessageToCoalition.description: Send a message to a coalition.

MessageTypeToCoalition.description: Send a message to a coalition.

MessageToRed.description: Send a message to the red coalition.

MessageToBlue.description: Send a message to the blue coalition.

MessageToClient.description: Send a message to a client.

MessageTypeToGroup.description: Send a message of a message type to a @{Wrapper.Group}.

Message.description: Send a message to the players in the @{Wrapper.Group}.

GetRadio.description: Create a @{Sound.Radio#RADIO}, to allow radio transmission for this POSITIONABLE.

GetBeacon.description: Create a @{Core.Beacon#BEACON}, to allow this POSITIONABLE to broadcast beacon signals.

IsLasing.description: Check if the POSITIONABLE is lasing a target.

GetLaserCode.description: Get the last assigned laser code

HasCargo.description: Returns if carrier has given cargo.

GetTroopCapacity.description: Get the number of infantry soldiers that can be embarked into an aircraft (airplane or helicopter).

GetCargoBayFreeWeight.description: Get Cargo Bay Free Weight in kg.

SetCargoBayWeightLimit.description: Set Cargo Bay Weight Limit in kg.

GetCargoBayWeightLimit.description: Get Cargo Bay Weight Limit in kg.

Flare.description: Signal a flare at the position of the POSITIONABLE.

FlareWhite.description: Signal a white flare at the position of the POSITIONABLE.

FlareYellow.description: Signal a yellow flare at the position of the POSITIONABLE.

FlareGreen.description: Signal a green flare at the position of the POSITIONABLE.

FlareRed.description: Signal a red flare at the position of the POSITIONABLE.

IsInZone.description: Returns true if the unit is within a @{Core.Zone}.

IsNotInZone.description: Returns true if the unit is not within a @{Core.Zone}.

CONTROLLABLE.description: is an intermediate class wrapping Group and Unit classes "controllers".

New.description: Create a new CONTROLLABLE from a DCSControllable

_GetController.description: Get the controller for the CONTROLLABLE.

GetLife.description: Returns the health. Dead controllables have health <= 1.0.

GetFuelMin.description: Returns relative minimum amount of fuel (from 0.0 to 1.0) a unit or group has in its internal tanks.

GetFuelAve.description: Returns relative average amount of fuel (from 0.0 to 1.0) a unit or group has in its internal tanks.

GetFuel.description: Returns relative amount of fuel (from 0.0 to 1.0) the unit has in its internal tanks.

ClearTasks.description: Clear all tasks from the controllable.

PopCurrentTask.description: Popping current Task from the controllable.

PushTask.description: Pushing Task on the queue from the controllable.

SetTask.description: Clearing the Task Queue and Setting the Task on the queue from the controllable.

HasTask.description: Checking the Task Queue of the controllable. Returns false if no task is on the queue. true if there is a task.

TaskCondition.description: Return a condition section for a controlled task.

TaskControlled.description: Return a Controlled Task taking a Task and a TaskCondition.

TaskCombo.description: Return a Combo Task taking an array of Tasks.

TaskWrappedAction.description: Return a WrappedAction Task taking a Command.

SetTaskWaypoint.description: Set a Task at a Waypoint using a Route list.

SetCommand.description: Executes a command action for the CONTROLLABLE.

CommandStopRoute.description: Create a stop route command, which returns a string containing the command.

StartUncontrolled.description: Give an uncontrolled air controllable the start command.

CommandActivateACLS.description: Activate ACLS system of the CONTROLLABLE. The controllable should be an aircraft carrier! Also needs Link4 to work.

CommandDeactivateACLS.description: Deactivate ACLS system of the CONTROLLABLE. The controllable should be an aircraft carrier!

CommandActivateICLS.description: Activate ICLS system of the CONTROLLABLE. The controllable should be an aircraft carrier!

CommandActivateLink4.description: Activate LINK4 system of the CONTROLLABLE. The controllable should be an aircraft carrier!

CommandDeactivateBeacon.description: Deactivate the active beacon of the CONTROLLABLE.

CommandDeactivateLink4.description: Deactivate the active Link4 of the CONTROLLABLE.

CommandDeactivateICLS.description: Deactivate the ICLS of the CONTROLLABLE.

CommandSetCallsign.description: Set callsign of the CONTROLLABLE. See [DCS command setCallsign](https://wiki.hoggitworld.com/view/DCS_command_setCallsign)

CommandEPLRS.description: Set EPLRS of the CONTROLLABLE on/off. See [DCS command EPLRS](https://wiki.hoggitworld.com/view/DCS_command_eplrs)

CommandSetUnlimitedFuel.description: Set unlimited fuel. See [DCS command Unlimited Fuel](https://wiki.hoggitworld.com/view/DCS_command_setUnlimitedFuel).

CommandSmokeOnOff.description: [AIR] Set smoke on or off. See [DCS command smoke on off](https://wiki.hoggitworld.com/view/DCS_command_smoke_on_off)

CommandSmokeON.description: [AIR] Set smoke on. See [DCS command smoke on off](https://wiki.hoggitworld.com/view/DCS_command_smoke_on_off)

CommandSmokeOFF.description: [AIR] Set smoke off. See [DCS command smoke on off](https://wiki.hoggitworld.com/view/DCS_command_smoke_on_off)

TaskEmbarking.description: (AIR HELICOPTER) Move the controllable to a Vec2 Point, wait for a defined duration and embark infantry groups.

TaskEmbarkToTransport.description: Used in conjunction with the embarking task for a transport helicopter group. The Ground units will move to the specified location and wait to be picked up by a helicopter.

TaskDisembarking.description: Specifies the location infantry groups that is being transported by helicopters will be unloaded at. Used in conjunction with the EmbarkToTransport task.

TaskOrbitCircleAtVec2.description: (AIR) Orbit at a specified position at a specified altitude during a specified duration with a specified speed.

TaskOrbit.description: (AIR) Orbit at a position with at a given altitude and speed. Optionally, a race track pattern can be specified.

TaskOrbitCircle.description: (AIR) Orbit at the current position of the first unit of the controllable at a specified altitude.

TaskHoldPosition.description: (AIR) Hold position at the current position of the first unit of the controllable.

TaskRefueling.description: (AIR) Refueling from the nearest tanker. No parameters.

TaskRecoveryTanker.description: (AIR) Act as Recovery Tanker for a naval/carrier group.

TaskLandAtVec2.description: (AIR HELICOPTER) Landing at the ground. For helicopters only.

TaskFireAtPoint.description: (GROUND) Fire at a VEC2 point until ammunition is finished.

EnRouteTaskEngageTargetsInZone.description: (AIR) Engaging a targets of defined types at circle-shaped zone.

EnRouteTaskAWACS.description: (AIR) Aircraft will act as an AWACS for friendly units (will provide them with information about contacts). No parameters.

EnRouteTaskTanker.description: (AIR) Aircraft will act as a tanker for friendly units. No parameters.

EnRouteTaskEWR.description: (GROUND) Ground unit (EW-radar) will act as an EWR for friendly units (will provide them with information about contacts). No parameters.

TaskMission.description: (AIR + GROUND) Return a mission task from a mission template.

PatrolRoute.description: (GROUND) Patrol iteratively using the waypoints of the (parent) group.

PatrolRouteRandom.description: (GROUND) Patrol randomly to the waypoints the for the (parent) group.

PatrolZones.description: (GROUND) Patrol randomly to the waypoints the for the (parent) group.

TaskRoute.description: Return a "Misson" task to follow a given route defined by Points.

RouteToVec2.description: (AIR + GROUND) Make the Controllable move to fly to a given point.

RouteToVec3.description: (AIR + GROUND) Make the Controllable move to a given point.

Route.description: Make the controllable to follow a given route.

RoutePush.description: Make the controllable to push follow a given route.

RouteStop.description: Stops the movement of the vehicle on the route.

RouteResume.description: Resumes the movement of the vehicle on the route.

RouteGroundTo.description: Make the GROUND Controllable to drive towards a specific point.

RouteGroundOnRoad.description: Make the GROUND Controllable to drive towards a specific point using (mostly) roads.

RouteGroundOnRailRoads.description: Make the TRAIN Controllable to drive towards a specific point using railroads.

TaskGroundOnRailRoads.description: Make a task for a TRAIN Controllable to drive towards a specific point using railroad.

___PassingWaypoint.description: Task function when controllable passes a waypoint.

RouteAirTo.description: Make the AIR Controllable fly towards a specific point.

TaskRouteToZone.description: (AIR + GROUND) Route the controllable to a given zone.

TaskRouteToVec2.description: (GROUND) Route the controllable to a given Vec2.

GetTaskMission.description: Return the mission template of the controllable.

GetTaskRoute.description: Return the mission route of the controllable.

CopyRoute.description: Return the route of a controllable by using the @{Core.Database#DATABASE} class.

GetDetectedTargets.description: Return the detected targets of the controllable.

GetDetectedUnitSet.description: Return the detected targets of the controllable.

GetDetectedGroupSet.description: Return the detected target groups of the controllable as a @{Core.Set#SET_GROUP}.

OptionROE.description: Set option for Rules of Engagement (ROE).

OptionROEHoldFirePossible.description: Can the CONTROLLABLE hold their weapons?

OptionROEHoldFire.description: Weapons Hold: AI will hold fire under all circumstances.

OptionROEReturnFirePossible.description: Can the CONTROLLABLE attack returning on enemy fire?

OptionROEReturnFire.description: Return Fire: AI will only engage threats that shoot first.

OptionROEOpenFirePossible.description: Can the CONTROLLABLE attack designated targets?

OptionROEOpenFire.description: Open Fire (Only Designated): AI will engage only targets specified in its taskings.

OptionROEOpenFireWeaponFreePossible.description: Can the CONTROLLABLE attack priority designated targets? Only for AIR!

OptionROEOpenFireWeaponFree.description: Open Fire, Weapons Free (Priority Designated): AI will engage any enemy group it detects, but will prioritize targets specified in the groups tasking.

OptionROEWeaponFreePossible.description: Can the CONTROLLABLE attack targets of opportunity?

OptionROTNoReactionPossible.description: Can the CONTROLLABLE ignore enemy fire?

OptionROTPassiveDefensePossible.description: Can the CONTROLLABLE evade using passive defenses?

OptionAIRunwayLineUp.description: Air - Allow formation takeoff, if enough space

OptionDisengageAndRTBAfterFormationLoss.description: Air - Allow to fly home after loss of formation

OptionROTEvadeFirePossible.description: Can the CONTROLLABLE evade on enemy fire?

OptionROTVerticalPossible.description: Can the CONTROLLABLE evade on fire using vertical manoeuvres?

OptionROTVertical.description: Evade on fire using vertical manoeuvres.

OptionAlarmStateAuto.description: Alarm state to Auto: AI will automatically switch alarm states based on the presence of threats. The AI kind of cheats in this regard.

OptionAlarmStateGreen.description: Alarm state to Green: Group is not combat ready. Sensors are stowed if possible.

OptionAlarmStateRed.description: Alarm state to Red: Group is combat ready and actively searching for targets.

OptionAllowJettisonWeaponsOnThreat.description: Allow to Jettison of weapons upon threat.

OptionEvasionOfARM.description: [Ground] Allows AI radar units to take defensive actions to avoid anti radiation missiles. Units are allowed to shut radar off and displace.

OptionFormationInterval.description: [Ground] Option that defines the vehicle spacing when in an on road and off road formation.

OptionECM.description: [Air] Defines the usage of Electronic Counter Measures by airborne forces.

OptionECM_Never.description: [Air] Defines the usage of Electronic Counter Measures by airborne forces. Disables the ability for AI to use their ECM.

OptionECM_OnlyLockByRadar.description: [Air] Defines the usage of Electronic Counter Measures by airborne forces. If the AI is actively being locked by an enemy radar they will enable their ECM jammer.

OptionECM_DetectedLockByRadar.description: [Air] Defines the usage of Electronic Counter Measures by airborne forces. If the AI is being detected by a radar they will enable their ECM.

OptionECM_AlwaysOn.description: [Air] Defines the usage of Electronic Counter Measures by airborne forces. AI will leave their ECM on all the time.

WayPointInitialize.description: Retrieve the controllable mission and allow to place function hooks within the mission waypoint plan.

GetWayPoints.description: Get the current WayPoints set with the WayPoint functions( Note that the WayPoints can be nil, although there ARE waypoints).

WayPointFunction.description: Registers a waypoint function that will be executed when the controllable moves over the WayPoint.

IsAirPlane.description: Returns if the Controllable contains AirPlanes.

IsHelicopter.description: Returns if the Controllable contains Helicopters.

OptionRestrictBurner.description: Sets Controllable Option for Restriction of Afterburner.

OptionAAAttackRange.description: [AIR] Sets Controllable Option for A2A attack range for AIR FIGHTER units.

OptionAAAMinFiringHeightMeters.description: [GROUND/AAA] Sets Controllable Option for Ground AAA minimum firing height.

OptionAAAMaxFiringHeightMeters.description: [GROUND/AAA] Sets Controllable Option for Ground AAA maximum firing height.

OptionAAAMinFiringHeightFeet.description: [GROUND/AAA] Sets Controllable Option for Ground AAA minimum firing height.

OptionAAAMaxFiringHeightfeet.description: [GROUND/AAA] Sets Controllable Option for Ground AAA maximum firing height.

OptionEngageRange.description: Defines the range at which a GROUND unit/group is allowed to use its weapons automatically.

SetOptionJettisonEmptyTanks.description: [AIR] Set if aircraft is allowed to drop empty fuel tanks - set to true to allow, and false to forbid it.

SetOptionLandingStraightIn.description: [AIR] Set how the AI lands on an airfield. Here: Straight in.

SetOptionLandingForcePair.description: [AIR] Set how the AI lands on an airfield. Here: In pairs (if > 1 aircraft in group)

SetOptionLandingRestrictPair.description: [AIR] Set how the AI lands on an airfield. Here: No landing in pairs.

SetOptionLandingOverheadBreak.description: [AIR] Set how the AI lands on an airfield. Here: Overhead break.

SetOptionRadarUsing.description: [AIR] Set how the AI uses the onboard radar.

SetOptionRadarUsingNever.description: [AIR] Set how the AI uses the onboard radar. Here: never.

SetOptionRadarUsingForAttackOnly.description: [AIR] Set how the AI uses the onboard radar, here: for attack only.

SetOptionRadarUsingForSearchIfRequired.description: [AIR] Set how the AI uses the onboard radar, here: when required for searching.

SetOptionRadarUsingForContinousSearch.description: [AIR] Set how the AI uses the onboard radar, here: always on.

SetOptionWaypointPassReport.description: [AIR] Set if the AI is reporting passing of waypoints

SetOptionRadioSilence.description: [AIR] Set the AI to not report anything over the radio - radio silence

SetOptionRadioContact.description: [AIR] Set the AI to report contact for certain types of objects.

SetOptionRadioEngage.description: [AIR] Set the AI to report engaging certain types of objects.

SetOptionRadioKill.description: [AIR] Set the AI to report killing certain types of objects.

OptionDisperseOnAttack.description: Defines how long a GROUND unit/group will move to avoid an ongoing attack.

IsSubmarine.description: Returns if the unit is a submarine.

SetSpeed.description: Sets the controlled group to go at the specified speed in meters per second.

SetAltitude.description: [AIR] Sets the controlled aircraft group to fly at the specified altitude in meters.

TaskAerobatics.description: Return an empty task shell for Aerobatics.

TaskAerobaticsCandle.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "CANDLE" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsEdgeFlight.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "EDGE_FLIGHT" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsWingoverFlight.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "WINGOVER_FLIGHT" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsLoop.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "LOOP" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsHorizontalEight.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "HORIZONTAL_EIGHT" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsHammerhead.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "HAMMERHEAD" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsSkewedLoop.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "SKEWED_LOOP" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsTurn.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "TURN" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsDive.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "DIVE" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsMilitaryTurn.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "MILITARY_TURN" to the Aerobatics Task.
