TaskAerobaticsImmelmann.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "IMMELMAN" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsStraightFlight.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "STRAIGHT_FLIGHT" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsClimb.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "CLIMB" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsSplitS.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "SPLIT_S" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsForcedTurn.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "FORCED_TURN" to the Aerobatics Task.

TaskAerobaticsBarrelRoll.description: Add an aerobatics entry of type "BARREL_ROLL" to the Aerobatics Task.

PatrolRaceTrack.description: [Air] Make an airplane or helicopter patrol between two points in a racetrack - resulting in a much tighter track around the start and end points.

NewIRMarker.description: [GROUND] Create and enable a new IR Marker for the given controllable UNIT or GROUP.

EnableIRMarkerForGroup.description: [GROUND] Enable the IR markers for a whole group.

DisableIRMarkerForGroup.description: [GROUND] Disable the IR markers for a whole group.

HasIRMarker.description: [GROUND] Check if an IR Spot exists.

_StopSpot.description: [Internal] This method is called by the scheduler to blink the IR marker.

_MarkerBlink.description: [Internal] This method is called by the scheduler after enabling the IR marker.

GROUP.description: wraps the DCS Class Group objects.

NewTemplate.description: Create a new GROUP from a given GroupTemplate as a parameter.

Register.description: Create a new GROUP from an existing Group in the Mission.

Find.description: Find the GROUP wrapper class instance using the DCS Group.

FindByName.description: Find a GROUP using the DCS Group Name.

FindByMatching.description: Find the first(!) GROUP matching using patterns. Note that this is a lot slower than `:FindByName()`!

FindAllByMatching.description: Find all GROUP objects matching using patterns. Note that this is a lot slower than `:FindByName()`!

GetPositionVec3.description: Returns the @{DCS#Position3} position vectors indicating the point and direction vectors in 3D of the POSITIONABLE within the mission.

IsAlive.description: Returns if the group is alive.

IsActive.description: Returns if the group is activated.

GetCategory.description: Returns category of the DCS Group. Returns one of

GetCategoryName.description: Returns the category name of the #GROUP.

GetCoalition.description: Returns the coalition of the DCS Group.

GetCountry.description: Returns the country of the DCS Group.

HasAttribute.description: Check if at least one (or all) unit(s) has (have) a certain attribute.

GetSpeedMax.description: Returns the maximum speed of the group.

GetRange.description: Returns the maximum range of the group.

GetUnits.description: Returns a list of @{Wrapper.Unit} objects of the @{Wrapper.Group}.

GetPlayerUnits.description: Returns a list of @{Wrapper.Unit} objects of the @{Wrapper.Group} that are occupied by a player.

IsPlayer.description: Check if an (air) group is a client or player slot. Information is retrieved from the group template.

GetUnit.description: Returns the UNIT wrapper object with number UnitNumber. If it doesn't exist, tries to return the next available unit.

GetDCSUnit.description: Returns the DCS Unit with number UnitNumber.

GetSize.description: Returns current size of the DCS Group.

CountAliveUnits.description: Count number of alive units in the group.

GetFirstUnitAlive.description: Get the first unit of the group which is alive.

GetFirstUnit.description: Get the first unit of the group. Might be nil!

GetVelocityVec3.description: Returns the average velocity Vec3 vector.

GetAltitude.description: Returns the average group altitude in meters.

GetHeight.description: Returns the average group height in meters.

GetInitialSize.description: Returns the initial size of the DCS Group.

GetDCSUnits.description: Returns the DCS Units of the DCS Group.

GetTypeName.description: Gets the type name of the group.

GetNatoReportingName.description: [AIRPLANE] Get the NATO reporting name (platform, e.g. "Flanker") of a GROUP (note - first unit the group). "Bogey" if not found. Currently airplanes only!

GetPlayerName.description: Gets the player name of the group.

GetCallsign.description: Gets the CallSign of the first DCS Unit of the DCS Group.

GetVec2.description: Returns the current point (Vec2 vector) of the first DCS Unit in the DCS Group.

GetVec3.description: Returns the current Vec3 vector of the first Unit in the GROUP.

GetVector.description: Returns the current {@Core.Vector#VECTOR} of the first Unit in the GROUP.

GetAverageVec3.description: Returns the average Vec3 vector of the Units in the GROUP.

GetPointVec2.description: Returns a COORDINATE object indicating the point in 2D of the first UNIT of the GROUP within the mission.

GetAverageCoordinate.description: Returns a COORDINATE object indicating the average position of the GROUP within the mission.

GetCoordinate.description: Returns a COORDINATE object indicating the point of the first UNIT of the GROUP within the mission.

GetRandomVec3.description: Returns a random @{DCS#Vec3} vector (point in 3D of the UNIT within the mission) within a range around the first UNIT of the GROUP.

GetHeading.description: Returns the mean heading of every UNIT in the GROUP in degrees

GetFuelMin.description: Return the fuel state and unit reference for the unit with the least

GetFuelAvg.description: Returns relative amount of fuel (from 0.0 to 1.0) the group has in its

GetFuel.description: Returns relative amount of fuel (from 0.0 to 1.0) the group has in its internal tanks. If there are additional fuel tanks the value may be greater than 1.0.

GetAmmunition.description: Get the number of shells, rockets, bombs and missiles the whole group currently has.

IsInZone.description: Check if any unit of a group is inside a @{Core.Zone}.

IsCompletelyInZone.description: Returns true if all units of the group are within a @{Core.Zone}.

IsPartlyInZone.description: Returns true if some but NOT ALL units of the group are within a @{Core.Zone}.

IsPartlyOrCompletelyInZone.description: Returns true if part or all units of the group are within a @{Core.Zone}.

IsNotInZone.description: Returns true if none of the group units of the group are within a @{Core.Zone}.

IsAnyInZone.description: Returns true if any units of the group are within a @{Core.Zone}.

CountInZone.description: Returns the number of UNITs that are in the @{Core.Zone}

IsAir.description: Returns if the group is of an air category.

IsHelicopter.description: Returns if the DCS Group contains Helicopters.

IsAirPlane.description: Returns if the DCS Group contains AirPlanes.

IsGround.description: Returns if the DCS Group contains Ground troops.

IsShip.description: Returns if the DCS Group contains Ships.

AllOnGround.description: Returns if all units of the group are on the ground or landed.

SetAIOnOff.description: Turns the AI On or Off for the GROUP.

SetAIOn.description: Turns the AI On for the GROUP.

SetAIOff.description: Turns the AI Off for the GROUP.

GetMaxVelocity.description: Returns the current maximum velocity of the group.

GetMinHeight.description: Returns the current minimum height of the group.

GetMaxHeight.description: Returns the current maximum height of the group, i.e. the highest unit height of that group.

GetTemplate.description: Returns the group template from the global _DATABASE object (an instance of @{Core.Database#DATABASE}).

GetTemplateRoutePoints.description: Returns the group template route.points[] (the waypoints) from the global _DATABASE object (an instance of @{Core.Database#DATABASE}).

SetTemplateControlled.description: Sets the controlled status in a Template.

SetTemplateCountry.description: Sets the CountryID of the group in a Template.

SetTemplateCoalition.description: Sets the CoalitionID of the group in a Template.

InitHeading.description: Set the heading for the units in degrees within the respawned group.

InitHeight.description: Set the height for the units in meters for the respawned group. (This is applicable for air units).

InitZone.description: Set the respawn @{Core.Zone} for the respawned group.

InitRandomizePositionZone.description: Randomize the positions of the units of the respawned group within the @{Core.Zone}.

InitRandomizePositionRadius.description: Randomize the positions of the units of the respawned group in a circle band.

InitRadioCommsOnOff.description: Sets the radio comms on or off when the group is respawned. Same as checking/unchecking the COMM box in the mission editor.

InitRadioFrequency.description: Sets the radio frequency of the group when it is respawned.

InitRadioModulation.description: Set radio modulation when the group is respawned. Default is AM.

InitModex.description: Sets the modex (tail number) of the first unit of the group. If more units are in the group, the number is increased with every unit.

RespawnAtCurrentAirbase.description: Respawn a group at an airbase.

GetTaskMission.description: Return the mission template of the group.

GetTaskRoute.description: Return the mission route of the group.

CopyRoute.description: Return the route of a group by using the global _DATABASE object (an instance of @{Core.Database#DATABASE}).

CalculateThreatLevelA2G.description: Calculate the maxium A2G threat level of the Group.

GetThreatLevel.description: Get threat level of the group.

InAir.description: Returns true if the first unit of the GROUP is in the air.

IsAirborne.description: Checks whether any unit (or optionally) all units of a group is(are) airbore or not.

GetDCSDesc.description: Returns the DCS descriptor table of the nth unit of the group.

GetAttribute.description: Get the generalized attribute of a self.

GetPlayerCount.description: Get the active player count in the group.

EnableEmission.description: GROUND - Switch on/off radar emissions for the group.

SetFormation.description: Set a formation for this group.

SetCommandInvisible.description: Switch on/off invisible flag for the group.

CommandSetInvisible.description: Switch on/off invisible flag for the group.

SetCommandImmortal.description: Switch on/off immortal flag for the group.

CommandSetImmortal.description: Switch on/off immortal flag for the group.

GetSkill.description: Get skill from Group. Effectively gets the skill from Unit 1 as the group holds no skill value.

GetHighestThreat.description: Get the unit in the group with the highest threat level, which is still alive.

SetAsRecoveryTanker.description: Set a GROUP to act as recovery tanker

GetGroupSTN.description: Get a list of Link16 S/TN data from a GROUP. Can (as of Nov 2023) be obtained from F-18, F-16, F-15E (not the user flyable one) and A-10C-II groups.

IsSAM.description: [GROUND] Determine if a GROUP is a SAM unit, i.e. has radar or optical tracker and is no mobile AAA.

IsAAA.description: [GROUND] Determine if a GROUP has a AAA unit, i.e. has no radar or optical tracker but the AAA = true or the "Mobile AAA" = true attribute.

GetBoundingBox.description: Get the bounding box of the group combining UNIT:GetBoundingBox() units.

UNIT.description: is a wrapper class for the DCS Class Unit.

Register.description: Create a new UNIT from DCSUnit.

Find.description: Finds a UNIT from the _DATABASE using a DCSUnit object.

FindByName.description: Find a UNIT in the _DATABASE using the name of an existing DCS Unit.

FindByMatching.description: Find the first(!) UNIT matching using patterns. Note that this is a lot slower than `:FindByName()`!

FindAllByMatching.description: Find all UNIT objects matching using patterns. Note that this is a lot slower than `:FindByName()`!

Name.description: Return the name of the UNIT.

GetAltitude.description: Returns the unit altitude above sea level in meters.

ReSpawnAt.description: Respawn the @{Wrapper.Unit} using a (tweaked) template of the parent Group.

IsActive.description: Returns if the unit is activated.

IsExist.description: Returns if the unit is exists in the mission.

IsAlive.description: Returns if the Unit is alive.

IsDead.description: Returns if the Unit is dead.

GetCallsign.description: Returns the Unit's callsign - the localized string.

IsPlayer.description: Check if an (air) unit is a client or player slot. Information is retrieved from the group template.

GetPlayerName.description: Returns name of the player that control the unit or nil if the unit is controlled by A.I.

IsClient.description: Checks is the unit is a *Player* or *Client* slot.

GetClient.description: Get the CLIENT of the unit

GetNatoReportingName.description: [AIRPLANE] Get the NATO reporting name of a UNIT. Currently airplanes only!

GetNumber.description: Returns the unit's number in the group.

GetSpeedMax.description: Returns the unit's max speed in km/h derived from the DCS descriptors.

GetRange.description: Returns the unit's max range in meters derived from the DCS descriptors.

IsRefuelable.description: Check if the unit is refuelable. Also retrieves the refuelling system (boom or probe) if applicable.

IsTanker.description: Check if the unit is a tanker. Also retrieves the refuelling system (boom or probe) if applicable.

IsAmmoSupply.description: Check if the unit can supply ammo. Currently, we have

IsFuelSupply.description: Check if the unit can supply fuel. Currently, we have

GetGroup.description: Returns the unit's group if it exists and nil otherwise.

GetPrefix.description: Returns the prefix name of the DCS Unit. A prefix name is a part of the name before a '#'-sign.

SetUnitInternalCargo.description: Sets the Unit's Internal Cargo Mass, in kg

GetAmmunition.description: Get the number of ammunition and in particular the number of shells, rockets, bombs and missiles a unit currently has.

HasAPShells.description: Checks if a tank still has AP shells.

GetAPShells.description: Get number of AP shells from a tank.

GetHEShells.description: Get number of HE shells from a tank.

HasHEShells.description: Checks if a tank still has HE shells.

HasArtiShells.description: Checks if an artillery unit still has artillery shells.

GetArtiShells.description: Get number of artillery shells from an artillery unit.

HasSensors.description: Returns if the unit has sensors of a certain type.

HasSEAD.description: Returns if the unit is SEADable.

GetFuel.description: Returns relative amount of fuel (from 0.0 to 1.0) the UNIT has in its internal tanks. If there are additional fuel tanks the value may be greater than 1.0.

GetLife.description: Returns the unit's health. Dead units has health <= 1.0.

GetDamageRelative.description: Returns the unit's relative damage, i.e. 1-life.

GetDrawArgumentValue.description: Returns the current value for an animation argument on the external model of the given object.

GetUnitCategory.description: Returns the category of the #UNIT from descriptor. Returns one of

GetCategoryName.description: Returns the category name of the #UNIT.

Explode.description: Triggers an explosion at the coordinates of the unit.

OtherUnitInRadius.description: Returns true if there is an other DCS Unit within a radius of the current 2D point of the DCS Unit.

IsFriendly.description: Returns if the unit is a friendly unit.

IsShip.description: Returns if the unit is of a ship category.

InAir.description: Returns true if the UNIT is in the air.

IsDetected.description: Returns if a unit is detecting the TargetUnit.

IsLOS.description: Returns if a unit has Line of Sight (LOS) with the TargetUnit.

KnowUnit.description: Forces the unit to become aware of the specified target, without the unit manually detecting the other unit itself.

GetTemplate.description: Get the unit table from a unit's template.

GetTemplatePayload.description: Get the payload table from a unit's template.

GetTemplatePylons.description: Get the pylons table from a unit's template. This can be a complex table depending on the weapons the unit is carrying.

GetTemplateFuel.description: Get the fuel of the unit from its template.

EnableEmission.description: GROUND - Switch on/off radar emissions of a unit.

GetSTN.description: Get Link16 STN or SADL TN and other datalink info from Unit, if any.

SetAIOnOff.description: Turns the AI On or Off for the UNIT.

SetAIOn.description: Turns the AI On for the UNIT.

SetAIOff.description: Turns the AI Off for the UNIT.

IsSAM.description: [GROUND] Determine if a UNIT is a SAM unit, i.e. has radar or optical tracker and is no mobile AAA.

IsEWR.description: [GROUND] Determine if a UNIT is a EWR unit

IsAAA.description: [GROUND] Determine if a UNIT is a AAA unit, i.e. has no radar or optical tracker but the AAA = true or the "Mobile AAA" = true attribute.

SetLife.description: Set the relative life points of a UNIT object

SetCarrierIlluminationMode.description: Set the carrier illumination mode. -2: OFF, -1: AUTO, 0: NAVIGATION, 1: AC LAUNCH, 2: AC RECOVERY

GetFuelMassMax.description: Get the max kgs of fuel this unit can hold in its *internal* tank(s) and overall (with external tanks) in kgs.

GetCurrentFuelKgs.description: Get the current kgs of fuel this unit holds in all of its tanks.

GroupName.description: Name of the group the unit belongs to.

DCSUnit.description: The DCS Unit object from the API.

CLIENT.description: wraps DCS Unit objects acting as a __Client__ or __Player__ within a mission.

Find.description: Finds a CLIENT from the _DATABASE using the relevant DCS Unit.

FindByPlayerName.description: Finds a CLIENT from the _DATABASE using the relevant player name.

Transport.description: Transport defines that the Client is a Transport. Transports show cargo.

AddBriefing.description: Adds a briefing to a CLIENT when a player joins a mission.

ShowBriefing.description: Show the briefing of a CLIENT.

ShowMissionBriefing.description: Show the mission briefing of a MISSION to the CLIENT.

IsMultiSeated.description: Checks if the CLIENT is a multi-seated UNIT.

Alive.description: Checks for a client alive event and calls a function on a continuous basis. Does NOT work for dynamic spawn client slots!

GetDCSGroup.description: Return the DCSGroup of a Client.

GetClientGroupID.description: Get the group ID of the client.

GetClientGroupName.description: Get the name of the group of the client.

GetClientGroupUnit.description: Returns the UNIT of the CLIENT.

GetClientGroupDCSUnit.description: Returns the DCSUnit of the CLIENT.

Message.description: The main message driver for the CLIENT.

GetUCID.description: [Multi-Player Server] Get UCID from a CLIENT.

GetPlayerInfo.description: [Multi-Player Server] Return a table of attributes from CLIENT. If optional attribute is present, only that value is returned.

GetVec2Cached.description: Get the position of the STATIC even if it is not alive.

GetVec3Cached.description: Get the position of the STATIC even if it is not alive.

Find.description: Finds a STATIC from the _DATABASE using a DCSStatic object.

FindByName.description: Finds a STATIC from the _DATABASE using the relevant Static Name.

GetDCSObject.description: Get DCS object of static of static.

SpawnAt.description: Spawn the @{Wrapper.Static} at a specific coordinate and heading.

ReSpawn.description: Respawn the @{Wrapper.Static} at the same location with the same properties.

ReSpawnAt.description: Respawn the @{Wrapper.Unit} at a defined Coordinate with an optional heading.

FindByMatching.description: Find the first(!) STATIC matching using patterns. Note that this is a lot slower than `:FindByName()`!

FindAllByMatching.description: Find all STATIC objects matching using patterns. Note that this is a lot slower than `:FindByName()`!

GetStaticStorage.description: Get the Wrapper.Storage#STORAGE object of an static if it is used as cargo and has been set up as storage object.

GetCargoWeight.description: Get the Cargo Weight of a static object in kgs. Returns -1 if not found.

AIRBASE.description: is a wrapper class to handle the DCS Airbase objects.

Register.description: Create a new AIRBASE from DCSAirbase.

GetVec2.description: Get the true airbase center as seen in the ME. The position returned by the dcs object is is wrong and often at the start of the runway.

_GetCategory.description: Get the category of this airbase. This is only a debug function because DCS 2.9 incorrectly returns heliports as airdromes.

Find.description: Finds a AIRBASE from the _DATABASE using a DCSAirbase object.

FindByName.description: Find a AIRBASE in the _DATABASE using the name of an existing DCS Airbase.

FindByID.description: Find a AIRBASE in the _DATABASE by its ID.

GetDCSObject.description: Get the DCS object of an airbase

GetStorage.description: Get the warehouse storage of this airbase. The returned `STORAGE` object is the wrapper of the DCS warehouse.

SetAutoCapture.description: Enables or disables automatic capturing of the airbase.

SetAutoCaptureON.description: Enables automatic capturing of the airbase.

SetAutoCaptureOFF.description: Disables automatic capturing of the airbase.

IsAutoCapture.description: Returns whether auto capturing of the airbase is on or off.

SetCoalition.description: Sets the coalition of the airbase.

GetAllAirbases.description: Get all airbases of the current map. This includes ships and FARPS.

GetAllAirbaseNames.description: Get all airbase names of the current map. This includes ships and FARPS.

SetParkingSpotWhitelist.description: Set parking spot whitelist. Only these spots will be considered for spawning.

SetParkingSpotBlacklist.description: Set parking spot blacklist. These parking spots will *not* be used for spawning.

SetRadioSilentMode.description: Sets the ATC belonging to an airbase object to be silent and unresponsive. This is useful for disabling the award winning ATC behavior in DCS.

GetRadioSilentMode.description: Check whether or not the airbase has been silenced.

IsAirdrome.description: Check if airbase is an airdrome.

IsHelipad.description: Check if airbase is a helipad.

IsShip.description: Check if airbase is a ship.

GetParkingSpotsNumber.description: Get number of parking spots at an airbase. Optionally, a specific terminal type can be requested.

GetFreeParkingSpotsNumber.description: Get number of free parking spots at an airbase.

GetFreeParkingSpotsCoordinates.description: Get the coordinates of free parking spots at an airbase.

GetParkingSpotsCoordinates.description: Get the coordinates of all parking spots at an airbase. Optionally only those of a specific terminal type. Spots on runways are excluded if not explicitly requested by terminal type.

GetParkingSpotsVec2s.description: Get the DCS#Vec2s of all parking spots at an airbase. Optionally only those of a specific terminal type. Spots on runways are excluded if not explicitly requested by terminal type.

GetMinimumBoundingCircleFromParkingSpots.description: Get the the bounding circular zone around all parking spots of an airbase.

_InitParkingSpots.description: Get a table containing the coordinates, terminal index and terminal type of free parking spots at an airbase.

_GetParkingSpotByID.description: Get a table containing the coordinates, terminal index and terminal type of free parking spots at an airbase.

GetParkingSpotsTable.description: Get a table containing the coordinates, terminal index and terminal type of free parking spots at an airbase.

GetFreeParkingSpotsTable.description: Get a table containing the coordinates, terminal index and terminal type of free parking spots at an airbase.

GetParkingSpotData.description: Get a table containing the coordinates, terminal index and terminal type of free parking spots at an airbase.

MarkParkingSpots.description: Place markers of parking spots on the F10 map.

_CheckTerminalType.description: Helper function to check for the correct terminal type including "artificial" ones.

GetRunwayData.description: Get runways data. Only for airdromes!

SetActiveRunway.description: Set the active runway for landing and takeoff.

SetActiveRunwayLanding.description: Set the active runway for landing.

GetActiveRunwayLanding.description: Get the active runway for landing.

GetActiveRunwayTakeoff.description: Get the active runway for takeoff.

SetActiveRunwayTakeoff.description: Set the active runway for takeoff.

GetRunwayIntoWind.description: Get the runway where aircraft would be taking of or landing into the direction of the wind.

GetRunwayName.description: Get name of a given runway, e.g. "31L".

CheckOnRunWay.description: Function that checks if at leat one unit of a group has been spawned close to a spawn point on the runway.

AirbaseZone.description: Circular zone around the airbase with a radius of 2500 meters. For ships this is a ZONE_UNIT object.

parkingByID.description: Parking spot data table with ID as key.

parkingWhitelist.description: List of parking spot terminal IDs considered for spawning.

parkingBlacklist.description: List of parking spot terminal IDs **not** considered for spawning.

parkingCircle.description: Minimum bounding circle enclosing all parking spots.

TerminalID.description: Terminal ID of the spot. Generally, this is not the same number as displayed in the mission editor.

TerminalType.description: Type of the spot, i.e. for which type of aircraft it can be used.

TOAC.description: Takeoff or landing aircarft. I.e. this stop is occupied currently by an aircraft until it took of or until it landed.

Free.description: This spot is currently free, i.e. there is no alive aircraft on it at the present moment.

TerminalID0.description: Unknown what this means. If you know, please tell us!

DistToRwy.description: Distance to runway in meters. Currently bugged and giving the same number as the TerminalID.

MarkerID.description: Numerical ID of marker placed at parking spot.

Marker.description: The marker on the F10 map.

ClientSpot.description: If `true`, this is a parking spot of a client aircraft.

ClientName.description: Client unit name of this spot.

OccupiedBy.description: Name of the aircraft occupying the spot or "unknown". Can be *nil* if spot is not occupied.

ReservedBy.description: Name of the aircraft for which this spot is reserved. Can be *nil* if spot is not reserved.

SCENERY.description: models scenery within the DCS simulator.

GetProperty.description: Returns the value of the scenery with the given PropertyName, or nil if no matching property exists.

HasProperty.description: Checks if the value of the scenery with the given PropertyName exists.

GetCoordinate.description: Obtain object coordinate.

GetDCSObject.description: Obtain DCS Object from the SCENERY Object.

GetLife.description: Get current life points from the SCENERY Object. Note - Some scenery objects always have 0 life points.

GetLife0.description: Get initial life points of the SCENERY Object.

IsAlive.description: Check if SCENERY Object is alive. Note - Some scenery objects always have 0 life points.

IsDead.description: Check if SCENERY Object is dead. Note - Some scenery objects always have 0 life points.

GetRelativeLife.description: Get SCENERY relative life in percent, e.g. 75. Note - Some scenery objects always have 0 life points.

GetThreatLevel.description: Get the threat level of a SCENERY object. Always 0 as scenery does not pose a threat to anyone.

FindByName.description: Find a SCENERY object from its name or id. Since SCENERY isn't registered in the Moose database (just too many objects per map), we need to do a scan first

FindByID.description: Find a SCENERY object that was previously registered(!) by it's ID.

_FindByName.description: Find a SCENERY object that was previously registered(!) by it's name.

FindByNameInZone.description: Find a SCENERY object from its name or id. Since SCENERY isn't registered in the Moose database (just too many objects per map), we need to do a scan first

FindByZoneName.description: Find a SCENERY object from its zone name. Since SCENERY isn't registered in the Moose database (just too many objects per map), we need to do a scan first

FindAllByZoneName.description: Scan and find all SCENERY objects from a zone by zone-name. Since SCENERY isn't registered in the Moose database (just too many objects per map), we need to do a scan first

Destroy.description: SCENERY objects cannot be destroyed via the API (at the punishment of game crash).

New.description: Create a new MARKER class object.

ReadOnly.description: Marker is readonly. Text cannot be changed and marker cannot be removed. The will not update the marker in the game, Call MARKER:Refresh to update state.

ReadWrite.description: Marker is read and write. Text cannot be changed and marker cannot be removed. The will not update the marker in the game, Call MARKER:Refresh to update state.

Message.description: Set message that is displayed on screen if the marker is added.

ToCoalition.description: Place marker visible for a specific coalition only.

ToBlue.description: Place marker visible for the blue coalition only.

ToRed.description: Place marker visible for the blue coalition only.

ToNeutral.description: Place marker visible for the neutral coalition only.

ToGroup.description: Place marker visible for a specific group only.

UpdateText.description: Update the text displayed on the mark panel.

UpdateCoordinate.description: Update the coordinate where the marker is displayed.

GetCoordinate.description: Get position of the marker.

GetText.description: Get text that is displayed in the marker panel.

SetText.description: Set text that is displayed in the marker panel. Note this does not show the marker.

IsVisible.description: Check if marker is currently visible on the F10 map.

IsInvisible.description: Check if marker is currently invisible on the F10 map.

OnEventMarkAdded.description: Event function when a MARKER is added.

OnEventMarkRemoved.description: Event function when a MARKER is removed.

OnEventMarkChange.description: Event function when a MARKER changed.

Debug.description: Debug mode. Messages to all about status.

lid.description: Class id string for output to DCS log file.

text.description: Text displayed in the mark panel.

message.description: Message displayed when the mark is added.

coalition.description: Coalition to which the marker is displayed.

New.description: Create a new WEAPON object from the DCS weapon object.

SetDistanceInterceptPoint.description: Set distance of intercept point for estimated impact point.

SetMarkImpact.description: Mark impact point on the F10 map. This requires that the tracking has been started.

SetSmokeImpact.description: Put smoke on impact point. This requires that the tracking has been started.

SetFuncTrack.description: Set callback function when weapon is tracked and still alive. The first argument will be the WEAPON object.

SetFuncImpact.description: Set callback function when weapon impacted or was destroyed otherwise, *i.e.* cannot be tracked any more.

GetLauncher.description: Get the unit that launched the weapon.

GetTarget.description: Get the target, which the weapon is guiding to.

GetTargetDistance.description: Get the distance to the current target the weapon is guiding to.

GetTargetName.description: Get name the current target the weapon is guiding to.

GetImpactVec3.description: Get the impact position vector. Note that this might not exist if the weapon has not impacted yet!

GetImpactCoordinate.description: Get the impact coordinate. Note that this might not exist if the weapon has not impacted yet!

GetReleaseHeading.description: Get the heading on which the weapon was released

GetReleaseAltitudeASL.description: Get the altitude above sea level at which the weapon was released

GetReleaseAltitudeAGL.description: Get the altitude above ground level at which the weapon was released

GetReleaseCoordinate.description: Get the coordinate where the weapon was released

GetReleasePitch.description: Get the pitch of the unit when the weapon was released

GetImpactHeading.description: Get the heading of the weapon when it impacted. Note that this might not exist if the weapon has not impacted yet!

InAir.description: Check if weapon is in the air. Obviously not really useful for torpedos. Well, then again, this is DCS...

IsBomb.description: Check if weapon is a bomb.

IsMissile.description: Check if weapon is a missile.

IsRocket.description: Check if weapon is a rocket.

IsShell.description: Check if weapon is a shell.

IsTorpedo.description: Check if weapon is a torpedo.

IsFoxOne.description: Check if weapon is a Fox One missile (Radar Semi-Active).

IsFoxTwo.description: Check if weapon is a Fox Two missile (IR guided).

IsFoxThree.description: Check if weapon is a Fox Three missile (Radar Active).

StartTrack.description: Start tracking the weapon until it impacts or is destroyed otherwise.

StopTrack.description: Stop tracking the weapon by removing the scheduler function.

_GetIP.description: Compute estimated intercept/impact point (IP) based on last known position and direction.

lid.description: Class id string for output to DCS log file.

dtTrack.description: Time step in seconds for tracking scheduler.

impactArg.description: Optional arguments for the impact callback function.

trackFunc.description: Callback function when weapon is tracked and alive.

trackArg.description: Optional arguments for the track callback function.

vec3.description: Last known 3D position vector of the tracked weapon.

pos3.description: Last known 3D position and direction vector of the tracked weapon.

coordinate.description: Coordinate object of the weapon. Can be used in other classes.

trackScheduleID.description: Tracking scheduler ID. Can be used to remove/destroy the scheduler function.

tracking.description: If `true`, scheduler will keep tracking. Otherwise, function will return nil and stop tracking.

impactMark.description: If `true`, the impact point is marked on the F10 map. Requires tracking to be started.

impactSmoke.description: If `true`, the impact point is marked by smoke. Requires tracking to be started.

impactDestroy.description: If `true`, destroy weapon before impact. Requires tracking to be started and sufficiently small time step.

impactDestroyDist.description: Distance in meters to the estimated impact point. If smaller, then weapon is destroyed.

distIP.description: Distance in meters for the intercept point estimation.

New.description: Instantiate a new NET object.

BlockUCID.description: Block a specific UCID of a player, does NOT automatically kick the player with the UCID if already joined.

UnblockUCID.description: Unblock a specific UCID of a player

BlockSide.description: Block a specific coalition side, does NOT automatically kick all players of that side or kick out joined players

UnblockSide.description: Unblock a specific coalition side. Does NOT unblock specifically blocked playernames or UCIDs.

BlockSlot.description: Block a specific player slot, does NOT automatically kick a player in that slot or kick out joined players

GetPlayerIDFromClient.description: Find the PlayerID from a CLIENT object.

SendChatToClient.description: Send chat message to a specific player using the CLIENT object.

SendChatToPlayer.description: Send chat message to a specific player using the player name

LoadNextMission.description: Load next mission. Returns false if at the end of list.

GetPlayerList.description: Return a table of players currently connected to the server.

GetMyPlayerID.description: Returns the playerID of the local player. Always returns 1 for server.

GetServerID.description: Returns the playerID of the server. Currently always returns 1.

GetPlayerInfo.description: Return a table of attributes for a given client. If optional attribute is present, only that value is returned.

GetPlayerUCID.description: Get player UCID from player CLIENT object or player name. Provide either one.

Kick.description: Kicks a player from the server. Can display a message to the user.

GetPlayerStatistic.description: Return a statistic for a given client.

GetName.description: Return the name of a given client. Effectively the same as CLIENT:GetPlayerName().

GetSlot.description: Returns the SideId and SlotId of a given client.

ForceSlot.description: Force the slot for a specific client. If this returns false, it didn't work via `net` (which is ALWAYS the case as of Nov 2024)!

ReturnToSpectators.description: Force a client back to spectators. If this returns false, it didn't work via `net` (which is ALWAYS the case as of Nov 2024)!

Lua2Json.description: Converts a lua value to a JSON string.

Json2Lua.description: Converts a JSON string to a lua value.

DoStringIn.description: Executes a lua string in a given lua environment in the game.

Log.description: Write an "INFO" entry to the DCS log file, with the message Message.

GetKnownPilotData.description: Get some data of pilots who have currently joined

New.description: Create a new STORAGE object from the DCS airbase object.

NewFromStaticCargo.description: Create a new STORAGE object from an DCS static cargo object.

NewFromDynamicCargo.description: Create a new STORAGE object from a Wrapper.DynamicCargo#DYNAMICCARGO object.

FindByName.description: Airbases only - Find a STORAGE in the _DATABASE using the name associated airbase.

AddItem.description: Adds the passed amount of a given item to the warehouse.

SetItem.description: Sets the specified amount of a given item to the warehouse.

GetItemAmount.description: Gets the amount of a given item currently present the warehouse.

RemoveItem.description: Removes the amount of the passed item from the warehouse.

AddLiquid.description: Adds the passed amount of a given liquid to the warehouse.

SetLiquid.description: Sets the specified amount of a given liquid to the warehouse.

RemoveLiquid.description: Removes the amount of the given liquid type from the warehouse.

GetLiquidAmount.description: Gets the amount of a given liquid currently present the warehouse.

GetLiquidName.description: Returns the name of the liquid from its numeric type.

AddAmount.description: Adds the amount of a given type of aircraft, liquid, weapon currently present the warehouse.

RemoveAmount.description: Removes the amount of a given type of aircraft, liquid, weapon from the warehouse.

SetAmount.description: Sets the amount of a given type of aircraft, liquid, weapon currently present the warehouse.

GetAmount.description: Gets the amount of a given type of aircraft, liquid, weapon currently present the warehouse.

IsUnlimited.description: Returns whether a given type of aircraft, liquid, weapon is set to be unlimited.

IsLimited.description: Returns whether a given type of aircraft, liquid, weapon is set to be limited.

IsUnlimitedWeapons.description: Returns whether weapons and equipment are unlimited.

IsLimitedWeapons.description: Returns whether weapons and equipment are limited.

GetInventory.description: Returns a full itemized list of everything currently in a warehouse. If a category is set to unlimited then the table will be returned empty.

SaveToFile.description: Save the contents of a STORAGE to files in CSV format. Filenames created are the Filename given amended by "_Liquids", "_Aircraft" and "_Weapons" followed by a ".csv". Requires io and lfs to be desanitized to be working.

LoadFromFile.description: Load the contents of a STORAGE from files. Filenames searched for are the Filename given amended by "_Liquids", "_Aircraft" and "_Weapons" followed by a ".csv". Requires io and lfs to be desanitized to be working.

StopAutoSave.description: Stop a running STORAGE autosave process.

FindSyriaHHelipadWarehouse.description: Try to find the #STORAGE object of one of the many "H"-Helipads in Syria. You need to put a (small, round) zone on top of it, because the name is not unique(!).

lid.description: Class id string for output to DCS log file.

New.description: Creates a new SCORING object to administer the scoring achieved by players.

_LoadPlayerSummaryScore.description: [Internal] Helper to load scores from disk at scoring start

SetDisplayMessagePrefix.description: Set a prefix string that will be displayed at each scoring message sent.

SetScaleDestroyScore.description: Set the scale for scoring valid destroys (enemy destroys).

SetScaleDestroyPenalty.description: Set the scale for scoring penalty destroys (friendly destroys).

AddUnitScore.description: Add a @{Wrapper.Unit} for additional scoring when the @{Wrapper.Unit} is destroyed.

RemoveUnitScore.description: Removes a @{Wrapper.Unit} for scoring when the @{Wrapper.Unit} is destroyed.

AddStaticScore.description: Add a @{Wrapper.Static} for additional scoring when the @{Wrapper.Static} is destroyed.

AddScoreStatic.description: Add a @{Wrapper.Static} for additional scoring when the @{Wrapper.Static} is destroyed.

AddScoreScenery.description: Add a @{Wrapper.Scenery} for additional scoring when the @{Wrapper.Scenery} is destroyed.

RemoveSceneryScore.description: Removes a @{Wrapper.Scenery} for scoring when the @{Wrapper.Scenery} is destroyed.

AddScoreSetScenery.description: Specify a special additional score for a @{Core.Set#SET_SCENERY}.

RemoveStaticScore.description: Removes a @{Wrapper.Static} for scoring when the @{Wrapper.Static} is destroyed.

AddScoreGroup.description: Specify a special additional score for a @{Wrapper.Group}.

AddScoreSetGroup.description: Specify a special additional score for a @{Core.Set#SET_GROUP}.

AddScoreSetStatic.description: Specify a special additional score for a @{Core.Set#SET_STATIC}.

AddZoneScore.description: Add a @{Core.Zone} to define additional scoring when any object is destroyed in that zone.

EnableSceneryHitsinZones.description: Allow Scenery hits in Zones to count (no specific(!) scenery targets). NOTE - Allowing this can spam your scoring display!

DisableSceneryHitsinZones.description: Disallow Scenery hits in Zones to count (no specific(!) scenery targets).

AddZoneScoreSet.description: Add a @{Core.Set#SET_ZONE} to define additional scoring when any object is destroyed in that zone.

SetMessagesHit.description: Configure to send messages after a target has been hit.

SetScoreIncrementOnHit.description: Configure to increment score after a target has been hit.

IfMessagesHit.description: If to send messages after a target has been hit.

SetMessagesDestroy.description: Configure to send messages after a target has been destroyed.

IfMessagesDestroy.description: If to send messages after a target has been destroyed.

SetMessagesScore.description: Configure to send messages after a target has been destroyed and receives additional scores.

IfMessagesScore.description: If to send messages after a target has been destroyed and receives additional scores.

SetMessagesZone.description: Configure to send messages after a target has been hit in a zone, and additional score is received.

IfMessagesZone.description: If to send messages after a target has been hit in a zone, and additional score is received.

SetMessagesToAll.description: Configure to send messages to all players.

IfMessagesToAll.description: If to send messages to all players.

SetMessagesToCoalition.description: Configure to send messages to only those players within the same coalition as the player.

IfMessagesToCoalition.description: If to send messages to only those players within the same coalition as the player.

SetFratricide.description: When a player commits too much damage to friendlies, his penalty score will reach a certain level.

SwitchFratricide.description: Decide if fratricide is leading to penalties (true) or not (false)

SwitchTreason.description: Decide if a change of coalition is leading to penalties (true) or not (false)

SetCoalitionChangePenalty.description: When a player changes the coalition, he can receive a penalty score.

_AddPlayerFromUnit.description: Add a new player entering a Unit.

AddGoalScorePlayer.description: Add a goal score for a player.

AddGoalScore.description: Add a goal score for a player.

_AddMissionTaskScore.description: Registers Scores the players completing a Mission Task.

_AddMissionGoalScore.description: Registers Scores the players completing a Mission Task.

_AddMissionScore.description: Registers Mission Scores for possible multiple players that contributed in the Mission.

OnEventBirth.description: Handles the OnBirth event for the scoring.

OnEventPlayerLeaveUnit.description: Handles the OnPlayerLeaveUnit event for the scoring.

_EventOnHit.description: Handles the OnHit event for the scoring.

_EventOnDeadOrCrash.description: Track  DEAD or CRASH events for the scoring.

ReportDetailedPlayerHits.description: Produce detailed report of player hit scores.

ReportDetailedPlayerDestroys.description: Produce detailed report of player destroy scores.

ReportDetailedPlayerCoalitionChanges.description: Produce detailed report of player penalty scores because of changing the coalition.

ReportDetailedPlayerGoals.description: Produce detailed report of player goal scores.

ReportDetailedPlayerMissions.description: Produce detailed report of player penalty scores because of changing the coalition.

SecondsToClock.description: Opens a score CSV file to log the scores.

OpenCSV.description: Opens a score CSV file to log the scores.

ScoreCSV.description: Registers a score for a player.

SwitchAutoSave.description: Registers a score for a player.

OnKillPvE.description: Handles the event when one player kill another player

Players.description: A collection of the current players that have joined the game.

SetCleanMissiles.description: Enables or disables the cleaning of missiles within the airbase zones.

New.description: Creates the main object which is handling the GROUND forces movement.

ScheduleStart.description: Call this function to start the MOVEMENT scheduling.

ScheduleStop.description: Call this function to stop the MOVEMENT scheduling.

OnEventBirth.description: Captures the birth events when new Units were spawned.

OnDeadOrCrash.description: Captures the Dead or Crash events when Units crash or are destroyed.

New.description: Creates the main object which is handling defensive actions for SA sites or moving SA vehicles.

UpdateSet.description: Update the active SEAD Set (while running)

SetEngagementRange.description: Sets the engagement range of the SAMs. Defaults to 75% to make it more deadly. Feature Request #1355

SetPadding.description: Set the padding in seconds, which extends the radar off time calculated by SEAD

SwitchEmissions.description: Set SEAD to use emissions on/off in addition to alarm state.

AddCallBack.description: Set an object to call back when going evasive.

_CheckHarms.description: (Internal) Check if a known HARM was fired

_GetDistance.description: (Internal) Return distance in meters between two coordinates or -1 on error.

onafterCalculateHitZone.description: (Internal) Calculate hit zone of an AGM-88

HandleEventShot.description: (Internal) Detects if an SAM site was shot with an anti radiation missile. In this case, take evasive actions based on the skill level set within the ME.

UseCallBack.description: Switch for callback function to be used.

WeaponTrack.description: Track switch, if true track weapon speed for 30 secs.

SetDetection.description: Set a Detection method for the EscortClient to be reported upon.

TestSmokeDirectionVector.description: This function is for test, it will put on the frequency of the FollowScheduler a red smoke at the direction vector calculated for the escort to fly to.

MenuFollowAt.description: Defines a menu slot to let the escort Join and Follow you at a certain distance.

MenuScanForTargets.description: Defines a menu slot to let the escort scan for targets at a certain height for a certain time in seconds.

MenuFlare.description: Defines a menu slot to let the escort disperse a flare in a certain color.

MenuReportTargets.description: Defines a menu slot to let the escort report their current detected targets with a specified time interval in seconds.

MenuROE.description: Defines a menu to let the escort set its rules of engagement.

MenuEvasion.description: Defines a menu to let the escort set its evasion when under threat.

MenuResumeMission.description: Defines a menu to let the escort resume its mission from a waypoint on its route.

EscortMode.description: The mode the escort is in.

FollowScheduler.description: The instance of the SCHEDULER class.

ReportTargets.description: If true, nearby targets are reported.

OptionReactionOnThreat.description: Which REACTION_ON_THREAT is set to the EscortGroup.

SetParkingScanRadius.description: Set the scan radius around parking spots. Parking spot is considered to be occupied if any obstacle is found with the radius.

SetParkingScanSceneryON.description: Enables scanning for scenery objects around parking spots which might block the spot.

SetParkingScanSceneryOFF.description: Disables scanning for scenery objects around parking spots which might block the spot. This is also the default setting.

SetParkingSpotSafeON.description: A parking spot is not free until a possible aircraft has left and taken off.

SetParkingSpotSafeOFF.description: A parking spot is free as soon as possible aircraft has left the place. This is the default.

SetDespawnAirOFF.description: Aircraft that reach their destination zone are not despawned. They will probably go the the nearest airbase and try to land.

SetTakeoff.description: Set takeoff type. Starting cold at airport, starting hot at airport, starting at runway, starting in the air.

SetTakeoffCold.description: Set takeoff type cold. Aircraft will spawn at a parking spot with engines off.

SetTakeoffHot.description: Set takeoff type to hot. Aircraft will spawn at a parking spot with engines on.

SetTakeoffRunway.description: Set takeoff type to runway. Aircraft will spawn directly on the runway.

SetTakeoffColdOrHot.description: Set takeoff type to cold or hot. Aircraft will spawn at a parking spot with 50:50 change of engines on or off.

SetTakeoffAir.description: Set takeoff type to air. Aircraft will spawn in the air.

SetDeparture.description: Set possible departure ports. This can be an airport or a zone.

SetDestination.description: Set name of destination airports or zones for the AI aircraft.

DestinationZone.description: Destinations are treated as zones. Aircraft will not land but rather be despawned when they reach a random point in the zone.

ReturnZone.description: Aircraft will fly to a random point within a zone and then return to its departure airport or zone.

SetDestinationsFromZone.description: Include all airports which lie in a zone as possible destinations.

SetDeparturesFromZone.description: Include all airports which lie in a zone as possible destinations.

AddFriendlyAirportsToDepartures.description: Add all friendly airports to the list of possible departures.

AddFriendlyAirportsToDestinations.description: Add all friendly airports to the list of possible destinations

ExcludedAirports.description: Airports, FARPs and ships explicitly excluded as departures and destinations.

SetAISkill.description: Set skill of AI aircraft. Default is "High".

Livery.description: Set livery of aircraft. If more than one livery is specified in a table, the actually used one is chosen randomly from the selection.

ChangeAircraft.description: Change aircraft type. This is a dirty hack which allows to change the aircraft type of the template group.

ContinueJourney.description: Aircraft will continue their journey from their destination. This means they are respawned at their destination and get a new random destination.

Commute.description: Aircraft will commute between their departure and destination airports or zones.

SetSpawnDelay.description: Set the delay before first group is spawned.

SetSpawnInterval.description: Set the interval between spawnings of the template group.

SetSpawnLimit.description: Set max number of groups that will be spawned. When this limit is reached, no more RAT groups are spawned.

RespawnAfterLanding.description: Make aircraft respawn the moment they land rather than at engine shut down.

SetRespawnDelay.description: Sets the delay between despawning and respawning aircraft.

NoRespawn.description: Aircraft will not get respawned when they finished their route.

SetMaxRespawnTriedWhenSpawnedOnRunway.description: Number of tries to respawn an aircraft in case it has accidentally been spawned on runway.

RespawnAfterTakeoff.description: A new aircraft is spawned directly after the last one took off. This creates a lot of outbound traffic. Aircraft are not respawned after they reached their destination.

RespawnAfterCrashON.description: Aircraft will be respawned after they crashed or get shot down. This is the default behavior.

RespawnAfterCrashOFF.description: Aircraft will not be respawned after they crashed or get shot down.

RespawnInAirAllowed.description: If aircraft cannot be spawned on parking spots, it is allowed to spawn them in air above the same airport. Note that this is also the default behavior.

RespawnInAirNotAllowed.description: If aircraft cannot be spawned on parking spots, it is NOT allowed to spawn them in air. This has only impact if aircraft are supposed to be spawned on the ground (and not in a zone).

CheckOnRunway.description: Check if aircraft have accidentally been spawned on the runway. If so they will be removed immediately.

CheckOnTop.description: Check if aircraft have accidentally been spawned on top of each other. If yes, they will be removed immediately.

RadioON.description: Enable Radio. Overrules the ME setting.

RadioOFF.description: Disable Radio. Overrules the ME setting.

RadioModulation.description: Set radio modulation. Default is AM.

RadioMenuON.description: Radio menu On. Default is off.

RadioMenuOFF.description: Radio menu Off. This is the default setting.

Uncontrolled.description: Spawn aircraft in uncontrolled state. Aircraft will only sit at their parking spots. They can be activated randomly by the RAT:ActivateUncontrolled() function.

ActivateUncontrolled.description: Define how aircraft that are spawned in uncontrolled state are activate.

TimeDestroyInactive.description: Set the time after which inactive groups will be destroyed.

SetMaxCruiseSpeed.description: Set the maximum cruise speed of the aircraft.

SetMinCruiseSpeed.description: Set the minimum cruise speed of the aircraft.

SetClimbRate.description: Set the climb rate. This automatically sets the climb angle.

SetDescentAngle.description: Set the angle of descent. Default is 3.6 degrees, which corresponds to 3000 ft descent after one mile of travel.

SetROE.description: Set rules of engagement (ROE). Default is weapon hold. This is a peaceful class.

SetROT.description: Set reaction to threat (ROT). Default is no reaction, i.e. aircraft will simply ignore all enemies.

MenuName.description: Set the name of the F10 submenu. Default is the name of the template group.

EnableATC.description: Enable ATC, which manages the landing queue for RAT aircraft if they arrive simultaniously at the same airport.

ATC_Messages.description: Turn messages from ATC on or off. Default is on. This setting effects all RAT objects and groups!

ATC_Clearance.description: Max number of planes that get landing clearance of the RAT ATC. This setting effects all RAT objects and groups!

ATC_Delay.description: Delay between granting landing clearance for simultanious landings. This setting effects all RAT objects and groups!

SetMinDistance.description: Set minimum distance between departure and destination. Default is 5 km.

SetMaxDistance.description: Set maximum distance between departure and destination. Default is 5000 km but aircarft range is also taken into account automatically.

_Debug.description: Turn debug messages on or off. Default is off.

Debugmode.description: Enable debug mode. More output in dcs.log file and onscreen messages to all.

StatusReports.description: Aircraft report status update messages along the route.

PlaceMarkers.description: Place markers of waypoints on the F10 map. Default is off.

SetFL.description: Set flight level. Setting this value will overrule all other logic. Aircraft will try to fly at this height regardless.

SetFLmax.description: Set max flight level. Setting this value will overrule all other logic. Aircraft will try to fly at less than this FL regardless.

SetMaxCruiseAltitude.description: Set max cruising altitude above sea level.

SetFLmin.description: Set min flight level. Setting this value will overrule all other logic. Aircraft will try to fly at higher than this FL regardless.

SetMinCruiseAltitude.description: Set min cruising altitude above sea level.

SetFLcruise.description: Set flight level of cruising part. This is still be checked for consitancy with selected route and prone to radomization.

SetCruiseAltitude.description: Set cruising altitude. This is still be checked for consitancy with selected route and prone to radomization.

SetOnboardNum.description: Set onboard number prefix. Same as setting "TAIL #" in the mission editor. Note that if you dont use this function, the values defined in the template group of the ME are taken.

_InitAircraft.description: Initialize basic parameters of the aircraft based on its (template) group in the mission editor.

_SpawnWithRoute.description: Spawn the AI aircraft with a route.

_IsFlightControlAirbase.description: Check if a given airbase has a FLIGHTCONTROL.

ClearForLanding.description: Clear flight for landing. Sets tigger value to 1.

_Respawn.description: Despawn the original group and re-spawn a new one.

_Despawn.description: Despawn group. The `FLIGHTGROUP` is despawned and stopped. The ratcraft is removed from the self.ratcraft table. Menues are removed.

_SetRoute.description: Set the route of the AI plane. Due to DCS landing bug, this has to be done before the unit is spawned.

_PickDeparture.description: Set the departure airport of the AI. If no airport name is given explicitly an airport from the coalition is chosen randomly.

_PickDestination.description: Pick destination airport or zone depending on departure position.

_Excluded.description: Check if airport is excluded from possible departures and destinations.

_IsFriendly.description: Check if airport is friendly, i.e. belongs to the right coalition.

_GetAirportsOfMap.description: Get all airports of the current map.

_GetAirportsOfCoalition.description: Get all "friendly" airports of the current map. Fills the self.airports{} table.

_GetRatcraftFromGroup.description: Get RatCraft from a given group.

_GetLife.description: Get (relative) life of first unit of a group.

_OnBirth.description: Function is executed when a unit is spawned.

_OnEngineStartup.description: Function is executed when a unit starts its engines.

_OnTakeoff.description: Function is executed when a unit takes off.

_OnLand.description: Function is executed when a unit lands.

_OnEngineShutdown.description: Function is executed when a unit shuts down its engines.

_OnHit.description: Function is executed when a unit is hit.

_OnDeadOrCrash.description: Function is executed when a unit is dead or crashes.

_OnDead.description: Function is executed when a unit is dead.

_OnCrash.description: Function is executed when a unit crashes.

_Waypoint.description: Create a waypoint that can be used with the Route command.

_Routeinfo.description: Provide information about the assigned flightplan.

_AnticipatedGroupName.description: Anticipated group name from alias and spawn index.

_CommandInvisible.description: Set RAT group to (in-)visible for other AI forces.

_GetObjectSize.description: Get aircraft dimensions length, width, height.

_CheckOnTop.description: Find aircraft that have accidentally been spawned on top of each other.

_MinDistance.description: Calculate minimum distance between departure and destination for given minimum flight level and climb/decent rates.

_AddFriendlyAirports.description: Add names of all friendly airports to possible departure or destination airports if they are not already in the list.

_NameInList.description: Check if a name/string is in a list or not.

_GetDestinationAirbase.description: Get destination airbase of a given ratcraft.

_GetDepartureAirbase.description: Get departure airbase of a given ratcraft.

_AirportExists.description: Test if an airport exists on the current map.

_SetCoalitionTable.description: Create a table with the valid coalitions for departure and destination airports.

_Course.description: Determine the heading from point a to point b.

_Heading.description: Determine the heading for an aircraft to be entered in the route template.

_Randomize.description: Randomize a value by a certain amount.

_PlaceMarkers.description: Place markers of the waypoints. Note we assume a very specific number and type of waypoints here.

_SetMarker.description: Set a marker visible for all on the F10 map.

_DeleteMarkers.description: Delete all markers on F10 map.

_ATCInit.description: Initializes the ATC arrays and starts schedulers.

_ATCAddFlight.description: Adds andd initializes a new flight after it was spawned.

_ATCDelFlight.description: Deletes a flight from ATC lists after it landed.

_ATCRegisterFlight.description: Registers a flight once it is near its holding point at the final destination.

_ATCCheck.description: Main ATC function. Updates the landing queue of all airports and inceases holding time for all flights.

_ATCClearForLanding.description: Giving landing clearance for aircraft by setting user flag.

_ATCFlightLanded.description: Takes care of organisational stuff after a plane has landed.

_ATCQueue.description: Creates a landing queue for all flights holding at airports. Aircraft with longest holding time gets first permission to land.

lid.description: Log identifier.

Debug.description: Turn debug messages on or off.

templategroup.description: Group serving as template for the RAT aircraft.

spawninitialized.description: If RAT:Spawn() was already called this RAT object is set to true to prevent users to call it again.

spawndelay.description: Delay time in seconds before first spawning happens.

spawninterval.description: Interval between spawning units/groups. Note that we add a randomization of 50%.

friendly.description: Possible departure/destination airport: all=blue+red+neutral, same=spawn+neutral, spawnonly=spawn, blue=blue+neutral, blueonly=blue, red=red+neutral, redonly=red.

ctable.description: Table with the valid coalitions from choice self.friendly.

aircraft.description: Table which holds the basic aircraft properties (speed, range, ...).

Vcruisemax.description: Max cruise speed in m/s (250 m/s = 900 km/h = 486 kt) set by user.

AlphaDescent.description: Default angle of descenti in degrees. A value of 3.6 follows the 3:1 rule of 3 miles of travel and 1000 ft descent.

roe.description: ROE of spawned groups, default is weapon hold (this is a peaceful class for civil aircraft or ferry missions). Possible: "hold", "return", "free".

rot.description: ROT of spawned groups, default is no reaction. Possible: "noreaction", "passive", "evade".

landing.description: Landing type. Determines if we actually land at an airport or treat it as zone.

mindist.description: Min distance from departure to destination in meters. Default 5 km.

maxdist.description: Max distance from departure to destination in meters. Default 5000 km.

airports_map.description: All airports available on current map (Caucasus, Nevada, Normandy, ...).

random_departure.description: By default a random friendly airport is chosen as departure.

random_destination.description: By default a random friendly airport is chosen as destination.

departure_ports.description: Array containing the names of the destination airports or zones.

destination_ports.description: Array containing the names of the destination airports or zones.

Ndestination_Airports.description: Number of destination airports set via SetDestination().

Ndestination_Zones.description: Number of destination zones set via SetDestination().

Ndeparture_Airports.description: Number of departure airports set via SetDeparture().

Ndeparture_Zones.description: Number of departure zones set via SetDeparture.

excluded_ports.description: Array containing the names of explicitly excluded airports.

destinationzone.description: Destination is a zone and not an airport.

return_zones.description: Array containing the names of the return zones.

returnzone.description: Zone where aircraft will fly to before returning to their departure airport.

addfriendlydepartures.description: Add all friendly airports to departures.

addfriendlydestinations.description: Add all friendly airports to destinations.

ratcraft.description: Array with the spawned RAT aircraft.

Tinactive.description: Time in seconds after which inactive units will be destroyed. Default is 300 seconds.

statusinterval.description: Intervall between status checks (and reports if enabled).

placemarkers.description: Place markers of waypoints on F10 map.

FLcruise.description: Cruise altitude of aircraft. Default FL200 for planes and F005 for helos.

FLuser.description: Flight level set by users explicitly.

FLminuser.description: Minimum flight level set by user.

FLmaxuser.description: Maximum flight level set by user.

commute.description: Aircraft commute between departure and destination, i.e. when respawned the departure airport becomes the new destiation.

starshape.description: If true, aircraft travel A-->B-->A-->C-->A-->D... for commute.

homebase.description: Home base for commute and return zone. Aircraft will always return to this base but otherwise travel in a star shaped way.

continuejourney.description: Aircraft will continue their journey, i.e. get respawned at their destination with a new random destination.

ngroups.description: Number of groups to be spawned in total.

alive.description: Number of groups which are alive.

f10menu.description: If true, add an F10 radiomenu for RAT. Default is false.

Menu.description: F10 menu items for this RAT object.

respawn_at_landing.description: Respawn aircraft the moment they land rather than at engine shutdown.

norespawn.description: Aircraft will not be respawned after they have finished their route.

respawn_after_takeoff.description: Aircraft will be respawned directly after take-off.

respawn_after_crash.description: Aircraft will be respawned after a crash, e.g. when they get shot down.

respawn_inair.description: Aircraft are allowed to spawned in air if they cannot be respawned on ground because there is not free parking spot. Default is true.

respawn_delay.description: Delay in seconds until a repawn happens.

waypointdescriptions.description: Table with strings for waypoint descriptions of markers.

waypointstatus.description: Table with strings of waypoint status.

livery.description: Livery of the aircraft set by user.

ATCswitch.description: Enable/disable ATC if set to true/false.

radio.description: If true/false disables radio messages from the RAT groups.

frequency.description: Radio frequency used by the RAT groups.

uncontrolled.description: If true aircraft are spawned in uncontrolled state and will only sit on their parking spots. They can later be activated.

invisible.description: If true aircraft are set to invisible for other AI forces.

immortal.description: If true, aircraft are spawned as immortal.

activate_uncontrolled.description: If true, uncontrolled are activated randomly after certain time intervals.

activate_delay.description: Delay in seconds before first uncontrolled group is activated. Default is 5 seconds.

activate_delta.description: Time interval in seconds between activation of uncontrolled groups. Default is 5 seconds.

activate_frand.description: Randomization factor of time interval (activate_delta) between activating uncontrolled groups. Default is 0.

activate_max.description: Maximum number of uncontrolled aircraft, which will be activated at the same time. Default is 1.

onboardnum.description: Sets the onboard number prefix. Same as setting "TAIL #" in the mission editor.

onboardnum0.description: (Optional) Starting value of the automatically appended numbering of aircraft within a flight. Default is 1.

checkonrunway.description: Aircraft are checked if they were accidentally spawned on the runway. Default is true.

onrunwayradius.description: Distance (in meters) from a runway spawn point until a unit is considered to have accidentally been spawned on a runway. Default is 75 m.

onrunwaymaxretry.description: Number of respawn retries (on ground) at other airports if a group gets accidentally spawned on the runway. Default is 3.

checkontop.description: Aircraft are checked if they were accidentally spawned on top of another unit. Default is true.

ontopradius.description: Radius in meters until which a unit is considered to be on top of another. Default is 2 m.

termtype.description: Type of terminal to be used when spawning at an airbase.

parkingscanradius.description: Radius in meters until which parking spots are scanned for obstacles like other units, statics or scenery.

parkingscanscenery.description: If true, area around parking spots is scanned for scenery objects. Default is false.

parkingverysafe.description: If true, parking spots are considered as non-free until a possible aircraft has left and taken off. Default false.

despawnair.description: If true, aircraft are despawned when they reach their destination zone. Default.

eplrs.description: If true, turn on EPLSR datalink for the RAT group.

New.description: Creates a new RATMANAGER object.

Add.description: Adds a RAT object to the RAT manager. Parameter min specifies the limit how many RAT groups are at least alive.

Start.description: Starts the RAT manager and spawns the initial random number RAT groups for each RAT object.

SetTcheck.description: Sets the time interval between checks of alive RAT groups. Default is 60 seconds.

SetTspawn.description: Sets the time interval between spawning of groups.

_Manage.description: Manager function. Calculating the number of current groups and respawning new groups if necessary.

_Spawn.description: Instantly starts the RAT manager and spawns the initial random number RAT groups for each RAT object.

_Count.description: Counts the number of alive RAT objects.

_RollDice.description: Rolls the dice for the number of necessary spawns.

Debug.description: If true, be more verbose on output in DCS.log file.

min.description: Minimum number of RAT groups alive.

ntot.description: Total number of active RAT groups.

Tcheck.description: Time interval in seconds between checking of alive groups.

dTspawn.description: Time interval in seconds between spawns of groups.

destination.description: Destination of this group. Can also be a ZONE.

departure.description: Departure place of this group. Can also be a ZONE.

active.description: Whether the group is active or uncontrolled.

despawnme.description: Despawn group if `true` in the next status update.

traffic.description: Number of flights that landed (just for stats).

Tlastclearance.description: Time stamp when last flight started final approach.

New.description: RANGE contructor. Creates a new RANGE object.

onafterStart.description: Initializes number of targets and location of the range. Starts the event handlers.

SetMenuRoot.description: Set the root F10 menu under which the range F10 menu is created.

SetMaxStrafeAlt.description: Set maximal strafing altitude. Player entering a strafe pit above that altitude are not registered for a valid pass.

SetBombtrackTimestep.description: Set time interval for tracking bombs. A smaller time step increases accuracy but needs more CPU time.

SetMessageTimeDuration.description: Set time how long (most) messages are displayed.

SetAutosaveOn.description: Automatically save player results to disc.

SetAutosaveOff.description: Switch off auto save player results.

SetTargetSheet.description: Enable saving of player's target sheets and specify an optional directory path.

SetFunkManOn.description: Set FunkMan socket. Bombing and strafing results will be send to your Discord bot.

SetMessageToExaminer.description: Set messages to examiner. The examiner will receive messages from all clients.

SetDisplayedMaxPlayerResults.description: Set max number of player results that are displayed.

SetRangeRadius.description: Set range radius. Defines the area in which e.g. bomb impacts are smoked.

SetDefaultPlayerSmokeBomb.description: Set player setting whether bomb impact points are smoked or not.

SetBombtrackThreshold.description: Set bomb track threshold distance. Bombs/rockets/missiles are only tracked if player-range distance is less than this distance. Default 25 km.

SetRangeLocation.description: Set range location. If this is not done, one (random) unit position of the range is used to determine the location of the range.

SetRangeZone.description: Set range zone. For example, no bomb impact points are smoked if a bomb falls outside of this zone.

SetRangeCeiling.description: Set range ceiling altitude in feet MSL.

EnableRangeCeiling.description: Enable range ceiling. Aircraft must be below the ceiling altitude to be considered in the range zone.

SetBombTargetSmokeColor.description: Set smoke color for marking bomb targets. By default bomb targets are marked by red smoke.

SetStrafeTargetSmokeColor.description: Set smoke color for marking strafe targets. By default strafe targets are marked by green smoke.

SetStrafePitSmokeColor.description: Set smoke color for marking strafe pit approach boxes. By default strafe pit boxes are marked by white smoke.

SetSmokeTimeDelay.description: Set time delay between bomb impact and starting to smoke the impact point.

SetMessagesON.description: Enable messages to players. This is the default

TrackBombsON.description: Enables tracking of all bomb types. Note that this is the default setting.

TrackBombsOFF.description: Disables tracking of all bomb types.

TrackRocketsON.description: Enables tracking of all rocket types. Note that this is the default setting.

TrackRocketsOFF.description: Disables tracking of all rocket types.

TrackMissilesON.description: Enables tracking of all missile types. Note that this is the default setting.

TrackMissilesOFF.description: Disables tracking of all missile types.

SetSRS.description: Use SRS Simple-Text-To-Speech for transmissions. No sound files necessary.

SetSRSRangeControl.description: (SRS) Set range control frequency and voice. Use `RANGE:SetSRS()` once first before using this function.

SetSRSRangeInstructor.description: (SRS) Set range instructor frequency and voice. Use `RANGE:SetSRS()` once first before using this function.

SetRangeControl.description: Enable range control and set frequency (non-SRS).

SetInstructorRadio.description: Enable instructor radio and set frequency (non-SRS).

SetSoundfilesPath.description: Set sound files folder within miz file.

SetSoundfilesInfo.description: Set the path to the csv file that contains information about the used sound files.

AddBombingTargetUnit.description: Add a unit or static object as bombing target.

AddBombingTargetCoordinate.description: Add a coordinate of a bombing target. This

AddBombingTargetScenery.description: Add a scenery object as bombing target.

AddBombingTargetGroup.description: Add all units of a group as bombing targets.

GetFoullineDistance.description: Measures the foule line distance between two unit or static objects.

OnEventBirth.description: Range event handler for event birth.

OnEventHit.description: Range event handler for event hit.

_OnImpact.description: Function called on impact of a tracked weapon.

OnEventShot.description: Range event handler for event shot (when a unit releases a rocket or bomb (but not a fast firing gun).

onafterStatus.description: Check spawn queue and spawn aircraft if necessary.

onafterEnterRange.description: Function called after player enters the range zone.

onafterExitRange.description: Function called after player leaves the range zone.

onafterImpact.description: Function called after bomb impact on range.

onbeforeSave.description: Function called before save event. Checks that io and lfs are desanitized.

onbeforeLoad.description: Function called before save event. Checks that io and lfs are desanitized.

onafterLoad.description: On after "Load" event. Loads results of all players from file.

_DisplayMyStrafePitResults.description: Display top 10 stafing results of a specific player.

_DisplayStrafePitResults.description: Display top 10 strafing results of all players.

_DisplayMyBombingResults.description: Display top 10 bombing run results of specific player.

_DisplayBombingResults.description: Display best bombing results of top 10 players.

_DisplayRangeInfo.description: Report information like bearing and range from player unit to range.

_DisplayBombTargets.description: Display bombing target locations to player.

_DisplayStrafePits.description: Display pit location and heading to player.

_DisplayRangeWeather.description: Report weather conditions at range. Temperature, QFE pressure and wind data.

_CheckInZone.description: Check if player is inside a strafing zone. If he is, we start looking for hits. If he was and left the zone again, the result is stored.

_GetBombTargetCoordinate.description: Get the number of shells a unit currently has.

_GetAmmo.description: Get the number of shells a unit currently has.

_IlluminateBombTargets.description: Illuminate targets. Fires illumination bombs at one random bomb and one random strafe target at a random altitude between 400 and 800 m.

_SmokeBombImpactOnOff.description: Toggle status of smoking bomb impact points.

_SmokeBombDelayOnOff.description: Toggle status of time delay for smoking bomb impact points

_TargetsheetOnOff.description: Targetsheet saves if player on or off.

_FlareDirectHitsOnOff.description: Toggle status of flaring direct hits of range targets.

_SmokeStrafeTargetBoxes.description: Mark approach boxes of strafe targets with smoke.

_playersmokecolor.description: Sets the smoke color used to smoke players bomb impact points.

_playerflarecolor.description: Sets the flare color used when player makes a direct hit on target.

_smokecolor2text.description: Converts a smoke color id to text. E.g. SMOKECOLOR.Blue --> "blue".

_flarecolor2text.description: Sets the flare color used to flare players direct target hits.

_CheckStatic.description: Checks if a static object with a certain name exists. It also added it to the MOOSE data base, if it is not already in there.

_GetPlayerUnitAndName.description: Returns the unit of a player and the player name. If the unit does not belong to a player, nil is returned.

_myname.description: Returns a string which consists of the player name.

Debug.description: If true, debug info is sent as messages on the screen.

verbose.description: Verbosity level. Higher means more output to DCS log file.

lid.description: String id of range for output in DCS log.

rangeradius.description: Radius of range defining its total size for e.g. smoking bomb impact points and sending radio messages. Default 5 km.

rangezone.description: MOOSE zone object of the range. For example, no bomb impacts are smoked if bombs fall outside of the range zone.

messages.description: Globally enable/disable all messages to players.

MenuAddedTo.description: Table for monitoring which players already got an F10 menu.
