strafeStatus.description: Table containing the current strafing target a player as assigned to.

strafePlayerResults.description: Table containing the strafing results of each player.

bombPlayerResults.description: Table containing the bombing results of each player.

dtBombtrack.description: Time step [sec] used for tracking released bomb/rocket positions. Default 0.005 seconds.

BombtrackThreshold.description: Bombs/rockets/missiles are only tracked if player-range distance is smaller than this threshold [m]. Default 25000 m.

Tmsg.description: Time [sec] messages to players are displayed. Default 30 sec.

examinergroupname.description: Name of the examiner group which should get all messages.

examinerexclusive.description: If true, only the examiner gets messages. If false, clients and examiner get messages.

strafemaxalt.description: Maximum altitude in meters AGL for registering for a strafe run. Default is 914 m = 3000 ft.

ndisplayresult.description: Number of (player) results that a displayed. Default is 10.

BombSmokeColor.description: Color id used for smoking bomb targets.

StrafeSmokeColor.description: Color id used to smoke strafe targets.

StrafePitSmokeColor.description: Color id used to smoke strafe pit approach boxes.

illuminationminalt.description: Minimum altitude in meters AGL at which illumination bombs are fired. Default is 500 m.

illuminationmaxalt.description: Maximum altitude in meters AGL at which illumination bombs are fired. Default is 1000 m.

scorebombdistance.description: Distance from closest target up to which bomb hits are counted. Default 1000 m.

TdelaySmoke.description: Time delay in seconds between impact of bomb and starting the smoke. Default 3 seconds.

trackbombs.description: If true (default), all bomb types are tracked and impact point to closest bombing target is evaluated.

trackrockets.description: If true (default), all rocket types are tracked and impact point to closest bombing target is evaluated.

trackmissiles.description: If true (default), all missile types are tracked and impact point to closest bombing target is evaluated.

defaultsmokebomb.description: If true, initialize player settings to smoke bomb.

autosave.description: If true, automatically save results every X seconds.

instructorfreq.description: Frequency on which the range control transmitts.

rangecontrolfreq.description: Frequency on which the range control transmitts.

soundpath.description: Path inside miz file where the sound files are located. Default is "Range Soundfiles/".

targetsheet.description: If true, players can save their target sheets. Rangeboss will not work if targetsheets do not save.

targetpath.description: Path where to save the target sheets.

targetprefix.description: File prefix for target sheet files.

Coalition.description: Coalition side for the menu, if any.

menuF10root.description: Specific user defined root F10 menu.

ceilingaltitude.description: Range ceiling altitude in ft MSL. Aircraft above this altitude are not considered to be in the range. Default is 20000 ft.

ceilingenabled.description: Range has a ceiling and is not unlimited. Default is false.

flaredirecthits.description: Flare when player directly hits a target.

inzone.description: If true, player is inside the range zone.

goodhitrange.description: Range in meters for a good hit.

goodPass.description: Number of hits for a good pass.

pastfoulline.description: If `true`, player passed foul line. Invalid pass.

time.description: Time via timer.getAbsTime() in seconds of impact.
Time via timer.getAbsTime() in seconds of impact.

New.description: ZONE_GOAL Constructor.

GetZoneName.description: Get the name of the Zone.

SetSmokeZone.description: Activate smoking of zone with the color or the current owner.

onafterGuard.description: When started, check the Smoke and the Zone status.

MonitorDestroyedUnits.description: Activate the event UnitDestroyed to be fired when a unit is destroyed in the zone.

SmokeTime.description: Time stamp in seconds when the last smoke of the zone was triggered.

SmokeScheduler.description: Scheduler responsible for smoking the zone.

New.description: ZONE_GOAL_COALITION Constructor.

SetCoalition.description: Set the owning coalition of the zone.

SetUnitCategories.description: Set the owning coalition of the zone.

SetObjectCategories.description: Set the owning coalition of the zone.

GetCoalition.description: Get the owning coalition of the zone.

GetPreviousCoalition.description: Get the previous coalition, i.e. the one owning the zone before the current one.

GetCoalitionName.description: Get the owning coalition name of the zone.

Coalition.description: The current coalition ID of the zone owner.

PreviousCoalition.description: The previous owner of the zone.

UnitCategories.description: Table of unit categories that are able to capture and hold the zone. Default is only GROUND units.

ObjectCategories.description: Table of object categories that are able to hold a zone. Default is UNITS and STATICS.

SetMonitorHits.description: Set whether hit events of defending units are monitored and trigger "Attack" events.

SetMarkZone.description: Set whether marks on the F10 map are shown, which display the current zone status.

IsGuarded.description: Check if zone is "Guarded", i.e. only one (the defending) coalition is present inside the zone.

IsCaptured.description: Check if zone is "Captured", i.e. another coalition took control over the zone and is the only one present.

IsAttacked.description: Check if zone is "Attacked", i.e. another coalition entered the zone.

StartInterval.description: Time in seconds after the status monitor is started.

RepeatInterval.description: Time in seconds after which the zone status is updated.

HitsOn.description: If true, hit events are monitored and trigger the "Attack" event when a defending unit is hit.

HitTimeLast.description: Time stamp in seconds when the last unit inside the zone was hit.

HitTimeAttackOver.description: Time interval in seconds before the zone goes from "Attacked" to "Guarded" state after the last hit.

MarkOn.description: If true, create marks of zone status on F10 map.

New.description: Creates a new ARTY object from a MOOSE group object.

SetAlias.description: Set alias, i.e. the name the group will use when sending messages.

AddToCluster.description: Add ARTY group to one or more clusters. Enables addressing all ARTY groups within a cluster simultaniously via marker assignments.

SetMinFiringRange.description: Set minimum firing range. Targets closer than this distance are not engaged.

SetMaxFiringRange.description: Set maximum firing range. Targets further away than this distance are not engaged.

SetStatusInterval.description: Set time interval between status updates. During the status check, new events are triggered.

SetTrackInterval.description: Set time interval for weapon tracking.

SetWaitForShotTime.description: Set time how it is waited a unit the first shot event happens. If no shot is fired after this time, the task to fire is aborted and the target removed.

SetRearmingDistance.description: Define the safe distance between ARTY group and rearming unit or rearming place at which rearming process is possible.

SetRearmingGroup.description: Assign a group, which is responsible for rearming the ARTY group. If the group is too far away from the ARTY group it will be guided towards the ARTY group.

SetRearmingGroupSpeed.description: Set the speed the rearming group moves at towards the ARTY group or the rearming place.

SetRearmingGroupOnRoad.description: Define if rearming group uses mainly roads to drive to the ARTY group or rearming place.

SetRearmingArtyOnRoad.description: Define if ARTY group uses mainly roads to drive to the rearming place.

SetRearmingPlace.description: Defines the rearming place of the ARTY group. If the place is too far away from the ARTY group it will be routed to the place.

SetAutoRelocateToFiringRange.description: Set automatic relocation of ARTY group if a target is assigned which is out of range. The unit will drive automatically towards or away from the target to be in max/min firing range.

SetAutoRelocateAfterEngagement.description: Set relocate after firing. Group will find a new location after each engagement. Default is off

SetReportON.description: Report messages of ARTY group turned on. This is the default.

SetReportOFF.description: Report messages of ARTY group turned off. Default is on.

SetRespawnOnDeath.description: Respawn group once all units are dead.

SetDebugON.description: Turn debug mode on. Information is printed to screen.

SetDebugOFF.description: Turn debug mode off. This is the default setting.

SetSpeed.description: Set default speed the group is moving at if not specified otherwise.

RemoveTarget.description: Delete a target from target list. If the target is currently engaged, it is cancelled.

RemoveMove.description: Delete a move from move list.

RemoveAllTargets.description: Delete ALL targets from current target list.

SetShellTypes.description: Define shell types that are counted to determine the ammo amount the ARTY group has.

SetRocketTypes.description: Define rocket types that are counted to determine the ammo amount the ARTY group has.

SetMissileTypes.description: Define missile types that are counted to determine the ammo amount the ARTY group has.

SetTacNukeShells.description: Set number of tactical nuclear warheads available to the group.

SetIlluminationShells.description: Set number of illumination shells available to the group.

SetIlluminationMinMaxAlt.description: Set minimum and maximum detotation altitude for illumination shells. A value between min/max is selected randomly.

SetSmokeShells.description: Set number of smoke shells available to the group.

SetTacNukeFires.description: Set nuclear fires and extra demolition explosions.

SetMarkAssignmentsOn.description: Enable assigning targets and moves by placing markers on the F10 map.

SetMarkTargetsOff.description: Disable assigning targets by placing markers on the F10 map.

onafterStart.description: After "Start" event. Initialized ROE and alarm state. Starts the event handler.

_CheckDB.description: Check the DB for properties of the specified artillery unit type.

_StatusReport.description: After "Start" event. Initialized ROE and alarm state. Starts the event handler.

_FuncTrack.description: Function called during tracking of weapon.

_FuncImpact.description: Function called after impact of weapon.

onEvent.description: After "Start" event. Initialized ROE and alarm state. Starts the event handler.

_OnEventMarkRemove.description: Function called when a F10 map mark was removed.

_OnEventMarkChange.description: Function called when a F10 map mark was changed. This happens when a user enters text.

onafterStatus.description: After "Status" event. Report status of group.

onbeforeLoaded.description: Before "Loaded" event. Checks if group is currently firing and removes the target by calling CeaseFire.

onafterUnLoaded.description: After "UnLoaded" event. Group is combat ready again.

onenterCombatReady.description: Enter "CombatReady" state. Route the group back if necessary.

onbeforeOpenFire.description: Before "OpenFire" event. Checks if group already has a target. Checks for valid min/max range and removes the target if necessary.

onafterOpenFire.description: After "OpenFire" event. Sets the current target and starts the fire at point task.

onafterCeaseFire.description: After "CeaseFire" event. Clears task of the group and removes the target if max engagement was reached.

onafterWinchester.description: After "Winchester" event. Group is out of ammo. Trigger "Rearm" event.

onbeforeRearm.description: Before "Rearm" event. Check if a unit to rearm the ARTY group has been defined.

onafterRearm.description: After "Rearm" event. Send message if reporting is on. Route rearming unit to ARTY group.

onafterRearmed.description: After "Rearmed" event. Send ARTY and rearming group back to their inital positions.

_CheckRearmed.description: Check if ARTY group is rearmed, i.e. has its full amount of ammo.

onbeforeMove.description: Before "Move" event. Check if a unit to rearm the ARTY group has been defined.

onafterMove.description: After "Move" event. Route group to given coordinate.

onafterArrived.description: After "Arrived" event. Group has reached its destination.

onafterDead.description: After "Dead" event, when a unit has died. When all units of a group are dead trigger "Stop" event.

onafterRespawn.description: After "Dead" event, when a unit has died. When all units of a group are dead trigger "Stop" event.

onafterStop.description: After "Stop" event. Unhandle events and cease fire on current target.

_FireAtCoord.description: Set task for firing at a coordinate.

_AttackGroup.description: Set task for attacking a group.

_NuclearBlast.description: Model a nuclear blast/destruction by creating fires and destroy scenery.

_Move.description: Route group to a certain point.

_PassingWaypoint.description: Function called when group is passing a waypoint.

_Relocate.description: Relocate to another position, e.g. after an engagement to avoid couter strikes.

GetAmmo.description: Get the number of shells a unit or group currently has. For a group the ammo count of all units is summed up.

_MissileCategoryName.description: Returns a name of a missile category.

_MarkerKeyAuthentification.description: Extract engagement assignments and parameters from mark text.

_Markertext.description: Extract engagement assignments and parameters from mark text.

_MarkTargetName.description: Create a name for an engagement initiated by placing a marker.

_MarkMoveName.description: Create a name for a relocation move initiated by placing a marker.

_GetMarkIDfromName.description: Get the marker ID from the assigned task name.

_SortTargetQueuePrio.description: Sort targets with respect to priority and number of times it was already engaged.

_SortQueueTime.description: Sort array with respect to time. Array elements must have a .time entry.

_GetHeading.description: Heading from point a to point b in degrees.

_CheckTargetsInRange.description: Check all targets whether they are in range.

_CheckNormalTargets.description: Check all normal (untimed) targets and return the target with the highest priority which has been engaged the fewest times.

_CheckTimedTargets.description: Check all timed targets and return the target which should be attacked next.

_CheckMoves.description: Check all moves and return the one which should be executed next.

_CheckShootingStarted.description: Check whether shooting started within a certain time (~5 min). If not, the current target is considered invalid and removed from the target list.

_GetTargetIndexByName.description: Get the index of a target by its name.

_GetMoveIndexByName.description: Get the index of a move by its name.

_CheckOutOfAmmo.description: Check if group is (partly) out of ammo of a special weapon type.

_CheckWeaponTypeAvailable.description: Check if a selected weapon type is available for this target, i.e. if the current amount of ammo of this weapon type is currently available.

_CheckWeaponTypePossible.description: Check if a selected weapon type is in principle possible for this group. The current amount of ammo might be zero but the group still can be rearmed at a later point in time.

_CheckName.description: Check if a name is unique. If not, a new unique name can be created by adding a running index #01, #02, ...

_TargetInRange.description: Check if target is in range.

_WeaponTypeName.description: Get the weapon type name, which should be used to attack the target.

_VicinityCoord.description: Find a random coordinate in the vicinity of another coordinate.

_EventFromTo.description: Print event-from-to string to DCS log file.

_TargetInfo.description: Returns the target parameters as formatted string.

_MoveInfo.description: Returns a formatted string with information about all move parameters.

_LLDMS2DD.description: Convert Latitude and Lontigude from DMS to DD.

_SecondsToClock.description: Convert time in seconds to hours, minutes and seconds.

_ClockToSeconds.description: Convert clock time from hours, minutes and seconds to seconds.

lid.description: Log id for DCS.log file.

Debug.description: Write Debug messages to DCS log file and send Debug messages to all players.

currentTarget.description: Holds the current target, if there is one assigned.

currentMove.description: Holds the current commanded move, if there is one assigned.

Nammo0.description: Initial amount total ammunition (shells+rockets+missiles) of the whole group.

Nshells0.description: Initial amount of shells of the whole group.

Narty0.description: Initial amount of artillery shells of the whole group.

Nrockets0.description: Initial amount of rockets of the whole group.

Nmissiles0.description: Initial amount of missiles of the whole group.

Nukes0.description: Initial amount of tactical nukes of the whole group. Default is 0.

Nillu0.description: Initial amount of illumination shells of the whole group. Default is 0.

Nsmoke0.description: Initial amount of smoke shells of the whole group. Default is 0.

StatusInterval.description: Update interval in seconds between status updates. Default 10 seconds.

WaitForShotTime.description: Max time in seconds to wait until fist shot event occurs after target is assigned. If time is passed without shot, the target is deleted. Default is 300 seconds.

DCSdesc.description: DCS descriptors of the ARTY group.

DisplayName.description: Extended type name of the ARTY group.

IniGroupStrength.description: Inital number of units in the ARTY group.

IsArtillery.description: If true, ARTY group has attribute "Artillery". This is automatically derived from the DCS descriptor table.

ismobile.description: If true, ARTY group can move.

iscargo.description: If true, ARTY group is defined as possible cargo. If it is immobile, targets out of range are not deleted from the queue.

cargogroup.description: Cargo group object if ARTY group is a cargo that will be transported to another place.

groupname.description: Name of the ARTY group as defined in the mission editor.

clusters.description: Table of names of clusters the group belongs to. Can be used to address all groups within the cluster simultaniously.

SpeedMax.description: Maximum speed of ARTY group in km/h. This is determined from the DCS descriptor table.

Speed.description: Default speed in km/h the ARTY group moves at. Maximum speed possible is 80% of maximum speed the group can do.

RearmingDistance.description: Safe distance in meters between ARTY group and rearming group or place at which rearming is possible. Default 100 m.

RearmingGroup.description: Unit designated to rearm the ARTY group.

RearmingGroupSpeed.description: Speed in km/h the rearming unit moves at. Default is 50% of the max speed possible of the group.

RearmingGroupOnRoad.description: If true, rearming group will move to ARTY group or rearming place using mainly roads. Default false.

RearmingGroupCoord.description: Initial coordinates of the rearming unit. After rearming complete, the unit will return to this position.

RearmingPlaceCoord.description: Coordinates of the rearming place. If the place is more than 100 m away from the ARTY group, the group will go there.

RearmingArtyOnRoad.description: If true, ARTY group will move to rearming place using mainly roads. Default false.

InitialCoord.description: Initial coordinates of the ARTY group.

report.description: Arty group sends messages about their current state or target to its coalition.

ammoshells.description: Table holding names of the shell types which are included when counting the ammo. Default is {"weapons.shells"} which include most shells.

ammorockets.description: Table holding names of the rocket types which are included when counting the ammo. Default is {"weapons.nurs"} which includes most unguided rockets.

ammomissiles.description: Table holding names of the missile types which are included when counting the ammo. Default is {"weapons.missiles"} which includes some guided missiles.

Nshots.description: Number of shots fired on current target.

minrange.description: Minimum firing range in kilometers. Targets closer than this distance are not engaged. Default 0.1 km.

maxrange.description: Maximum firing range in kilometers. Targets further away than this distance are not engaged. Default 10000 km.

nukewarhead.description: Explosion strength of tactical nuclear warhead in kg TNT. Default 75000.

Nukes.description: Number of nuclear shells, the group has available. Note that if normal shells are empty, firing nukes is also not possible any more.

Nillu.description: Number of illumination shells the group has available. Note that if normal shells are empty, firing illumination shells is also not possible any more.

illuPower.description: Power of illumination warhead in mega candela. Default 1 mcd.

illuMinalt.description: Minimum altitude in meters the illumination warhead will detonate.

illuMaxalt.description: Maximum altitude in meters the illumination warhead will detonate.

Nsmoke.description: Number of smoke shells the group has available. Note that if normal shells are empty, firing smoke shells is also not possible any more.

Smoke.description: color of smoke shells. Default SMOKECOLOR.red.

nukerange.description: Demolition range of tactical nuclear explostions.

nukefire.description: Ignite additional fires and smoke for nuclear explosions Default true.

nukefires.description: Number of nuclear fires and subexplosions.

relocateafterfire.description: Group will relocate after each firing task. Default false.

relocateRmin.description: Minimum distance in meters the group will look for places to relocate.

relocateRmax.description: Maximum distance in meters the group will look for places to relocate.

markallow.description: If true, Players are allowed to assign targets and moves for ARTY group by placing markers on the F10 map. Default is false.

markkey.description: Authorization key. Only player who know this key can assign targets and moves via markers on the F10 map. Default no authorization required.

markreadonly.description: Marks for targets are readonly and cannot be removed by players. Default is false.

autorelocate.description: ARTY group will automatically move to within the max/min firing range.

autorelocatemaxdist.description: Max distance [m] the ARTY group will travel to get within firing range. Default 50000 m = 50 km.

autorelocateonroad.description: ARTY group will use mainly road to automatically get within firing range. Default is false.

coalition.description: The coalition of the arty group.

respawnafterdeath.description: Respawn arty group after all units are dead.

dtTrack.description: Time interval in seconds for weapon tracking.

New.description: Creates a new suppression object.

SetSuppressionTime.description: Set average, minimum and maximum time a unit is suppressed each time it gets hit.

SetRetreatZone.description: Set the zone to which a group retreats after being damaged too much.

DebugOn.description: Turn Debug mode on. Enables messages and more output to DCS log file.

FlareOn.description: Flare units when they are hit, die or recover from suppression.

SmokeOn.description: Smoke positions where units fall back to, hide or retreat.

SetFormation.description: Set the formation a group uses for fall back, hide or retreat.

SetSpeed.description: Set speed a group moves at for fall back, hide or retreat.

Fallback.description: Enable fall back if a group is hit.

SetFallbackDistance.description: Set distance a group will fall back when it gets hit.

SetFallbackWait.description: Set time a group waits at its fall back position before it resumes its normal mission.

Takecover.description: Enable take cover option if a unit is hit.

SetTakecoverWait.description: Set time a group waits at its hideout position before it resumes its normal mission.

SetTakecoverRange.description: Set distance a group searches for hideout places.

SetMinimumFleeProbability.description: Set minimum probability that a group flees (falls back or takes cover) after a hit event. Default is 10%.

SetMaximumFleeProbability.description: Set maximum probability that a group flees (falls back or takes cover) after a hit event. Default is 90%.

SetRetreatDamage.description: Set damage threshold before a group is ordered to retreat if a retreat zone was defined.

SetRetreatWait.description: Set time a group waits in the retreat zone before it resumes its mission. Default is two hours.

SetDefaultAlarmState.description: Set alarm state a group will get after it returns from a fall back or take cover.

SetDefaultROE.description: Set Rules of Engagement (ROE) a group will get when it recovers from suppression.

MenuOn.description: Create an F10 menu entry for the suppressed group. The menu is mainly for Debugging purposes.

_CreateMenuGroup.description: Create F10 main menu, i.e. F10/Suppression. The menu is mainly for Debugging purposes.

OrderFallBack.description: Order group to fall back between 100 and 150 meters in a random direction.

OrderTakeCover.description: Order group to take cover at a nearby scenery object.

OrderRetreat.description: Order group to retreat to a pre-defined zone.

StatusReport.description: Status of group. Current ROE, alarm state, life.

onafterStart.description: After "Start" event. Initialized ROE and alarm state. Starts the event handler.

onbeforeRecovered.description: Before "Recovered" event. Check if suppression time is over.

onafterRecovered.description: After "Recovered" event. Group has recovered and its ROE is set back to the "normal" unsuppressed state. Optionally the group is flared green.

onafterFightBack.description: After "FightBack" event. ROE and Alarm state are set back to default.

onbeforeFallBack.description: Before "FallBack" event. We check that group is not already falling back.

onafterFallBack.description: After "FallBack" event. We get the heading away from the attacker and route the group a certain distance in that direction.

onbeforeTakeCover.description: Before "TakeCover" event. Search an area around the group for possible scenery objects where the group can hide.

onafterTakeCover.description: After "TakeCover" event. Group will run to a nearby scenery object and "hide" there for a certain time.

onafterOutOfAmmo.description: After "OutOfAmmo" event. Triggered when group is completely out of ammo.

onbeforeRetreat.description: Before "Retreat" event. We check that the group is not already retreating.

onafterRetreat.description: After "Retreat" event. Find a random point in the retreat zone and route the group there.

onbeforeRetreated.description: Before "Retreateded" event. Check that the group is really in the retreat zone.

onafterRetreated.description: After "Retreateded" event. Group has reached the retreat zone. Set ROE to return fire and alarm state to auto.

onafterDead.description: After "Dead" event, when a unit has died. When all units of a group are dead, FSM is stopped and eventhandler removed.

_OnEventHit.description: Event handler for Dead event of suppressed groups.

_OnEventDead.description: Event handler for Dead event of suppressed groups.

_Suppress.description: Suppress fire of a unit by setting its ROE to "Weapon Hold".

_Run.description: Make group run/drive to a certain point. We put in several intermediate waypoints because sometimes the group stops before it arrived at the desired point.

_Passing_Waypoint.description: Function called when group is passing a waypoint. At the last waypoint we set the group back to CombatReady.

_SearchHideout.description: Search a place to hide. This is any scenery object in the vicinity.

_GetLife.description: Get (relative) life in percent of a group. Function returns the value of the units with the smallest and largest life. Also the average value of all groups is returned.

_Heading.description: Heading from point a to point b in degrees.

_SetROE.description: Sets the ROE for the group and updates the current ROE variable.

_SetAlarmState.description: Sets the alarm state of the group and updates the current alarm state variable.

_EventFromTo.description: Print event-from-to string to DCS log file.

Debug.description: Write Debug messages to DCS log file and send Debug messages to all players.

lid.description: String for DCS log file.

flare.description: Flare units when they get hit or die.

smoke.description: Smoke places to which the group retreats, falls back or hides.

DCSdesc.description: Table containing all DCS descriptors of the group.

SpeedMax.description: Maximum speed of group in km/h.

IsInfantry.description: True if group has attribute Infantry.

Controllable.description: Controllable of the FSM. Must be a ground group.

Tsuppress_ave.description: Average time in seconds a group gets suppressed. Actual value is sampled randomly from a Gaussian distribution.

Tsuppress_min.description: Minimum time in seconds the group gets suppressed.

Tsuppress_max.description: Maximum time in seconds the group gets suppressed.

TsuppressionOver.description: Time at which the suppression will be over.

IniGroupStrength.description: Number of units in a group at start.

Nhit.description: Number of times the group was hit.

Formation.description: Formation which will be used when falling back, taking cover or retreating. Default "Vee".

Speed.description: Speed the unit will use when falling back, taking cover or retreating. Default 999.

MenuON.description: If true creates a entry in the F10 menu.

FallbackON.description: If true, group can fall back, i.e. move away from the attacking unit.

FallbackWait.description: Time in seconds the unit will wait at the fall back point before it resumes its mission.

FallbackDist.description: Distance in meters the unit will fall back.

FallbackHeading.description: Heading in degrees to which the group should fall back. Default is directly away from the attacking unit.

TakecoverON.description: If true, group can hide at a nearby scenery object.

TakecoverWait.description: Time in seconds the group will hide before it will resume its mission.

TakecoverRange.description: Range in which the group will search for scenery objects to hide at.

hideout.description: Coordinate/place where the group will try to take cover.

PminFlee.description: Minimum probability in percent that a group will flee (fall back or take cover) at each hit event. Default is 10 %.

PmaxFlee.description: Maximum probability in percent that a group will flee (fall back or take cover) at each hit event. Default is 90 %.

RetreatZone.description: Zone to which a group retreats.

RetreatDamage.description: Damage in percent at which the group will be ordered to retreat.

RetreatWait.description: Time in seconds the group will wait in the retreat zone before it resumes its mission. Default two hours.

CurrentAlarmState.description: Alam state the group is currently in.

DefaultAlarmState.description: Alarm state the group will go to when it is changed back from another state. Default is "Auto".

DefaultROE.description: ROE the group will get once suppression is over. Default is "Free".

eventmoose.description: If true, events are handled by MOOSE. If false, events are handled directly by DCS eventhandler. Default true.

waypoints.description: Waypoints of the group as defined in the ME.

New.description: PSEUDOATC contructor.

DebugOn.description: Debug mode on. Send messages to everone.

DebugOff.description: Debug mode off. This is the default setting.

ChattyOn.description: Chatty mode on. Display some messages on take-off and touchdown.

ChattyOff.description: Chatty mode off. Don't display some messages on take-off and touchdown.

SetMessageDuration.description: Set duration how long messages are displayed.

SetReportPlayername.description: Use player name, not call sign, in callouts

SetMenuRefresh.description: Set time interval after which the F10 radio menu is refreshed.

SetEventsMoose.description: [Deprecated] Enable/disable event handling by MOOSE or DCS.

SetReportAltInterval.description: Set time interval for reporting altitude until touchdown.

_OnBirth.description: Function called my MOOSE event handler when a player enters a unit.

_PlayerLeft.description: Function called by MOOSE event handler when a player leaves a unit or dies.

_PlayerLanded.description: Function called by MOOSE event handler when a player landed.

_PlayerTakeOff.description: Function called by MOOSE/DCS event handler when a player took off.

PlayerEntered.description: Function called when a player enters a unit.

PlayerLanded.description: Function called when a player has landed.

PlayerTakeOff.description: Function called when a player took off.

PlayerLeft.description: Function called when a player leaves a unit or dies.

MenuAirports.description: Create "F10/Pseudo ATC/Local Airports/Airport Name/" menu items each containing weather report and BR request.

ReportWeather.description: Weather Report. Report pressure QFE/QNH, temperature, wind at certain location.

ReportBR.description: Report absolute bearing and range from player unit to airport.

ReportHeight.description: Report altitude above ground level of player unit.

AltitudeTimerStop.description: Stop/destroy DCS scheduler function for reporting altitude.

LocalAirports.description: Create list of nearby airports sorted by distance to player unit.

_GetPlayerUnitAndName.description: Returns the unit of a player and the player name. If the unit does not belong to a player, nil is returned.

_myname.description: Returns a string which consits of this callsign and the player name.

SetUsingRadioInformationFromMap.description: Returns a string which consits of this callsign and the player name.

Debug.description: If true, print debug info to dcs.log file.

mdur.description: Duration in seconds how low messages to the player are displayed.

mrefresh.description: Interval in seconds after which the F10 menu is refreshed. E.g. by the closest airports. Default is 120 sec.

talt.description: Interval in seconds between reporting altitude until touchdown. Default 3 sec.

chatty.description: Display some messages on events like take-off and touchdown.

eventsmoose.description: [Deprecated] If true, events are handled by MOOSE. If false, events are handled directly by DCS eventhandler.

reportplayername.description: If true, use playername not callsign on callouts

New.description: The WAREHOUSE constructor. Creates a new WAREHOUSE object from a static object. Parameters like the coalition and country are taken from the static object structure.

SetDebugOn.description: Set debug mode on. Error messages will be displayed on screen, units will be smoked at some events.

SetDebugOff.description: Set debug mode off. This is the default

SetReportOn.description: Set report on. Messages at events will be displayed on screen to the coalition owning the warehouse.

SetReportOff.description: Set report off. Warehouse does not report about its status and at certain events.

SetSafeParkingOn.description: Enable safe parking option, i.e. parking spots at an airbase will be considered as occupied when a client aircraft is parked there (even if the client slot is not taken by a player yet).

SetSafeParkingOff.description: Disable safe parking option. Note that is the default setting.

SetAllowSpawnOnClientParking.description: Set wether client parking spots can be used for spawning.

SetLowFuelThreshold.description: Set low fuel threshold. If one unit of an asset has less fuel than this number, the event AssetLowFuel will be fired.

SetStatusUpdate.description: Set interval of status updates. Note that normally only one request can be processed per time interval.

SetSpawnZone.description: Set a zone where the (ground) assets of the warehouse are spawned once requested.

SetWarehouseZone.description: Set a warehouse zone. If this zone is captured, the warehouse and all its assets fall into the hands of the enemy.

SetAutoDefenceOn.description: Set auto defence on. When the warehouse is under attack, all ground assets are spawned automatically and will defend the warehouse zone.

SetAutoDefenceOff.description: Set auto defence off. This is the default.

_CheckParkingAsset.description: Check parking ID for an asset.

SetSaveOnMissionEnd.description: Enable auto save of warehouse assets at mission end event.

SetMarker.description: Show or don't show markers on the F10 map displaying the Warehouse stock and road/rail connections.

SetAirbase.description: Set the airbase belonging to this warehouse.

SetRoadConnection.description: Set the connection of the warehouse to the road.

SetRailConnection.description: Set the connection of the warehouse to the railroad.

SetPortZone.description: Set the port zone for this warehouse.

SetHarborZone.description: Add a Harbor Zone for this warehouse where naval cargo units will spawn and be received.

AddShippingLane.description: Add a shipping lane from this warehouse to another remote warehouse.

AddOffRoadPath.description: Add an off-road path from this warehouse to another and back.

_NewLane.description: Create a new path from a template group.

IsNotReadyYet.description: Check if the warehouse has not been started yet, i.e. is in the state "NotReadyYet".

IsLoaded.description: Check if the warehouse has been loaded from disk via the "Load" event.

IsRunning.description: Check if the warehouse is running.

IsPaused.description: Check if the warehouse is paused. In this state, requests are not processed.

IsAttacked.description: Check if the warehouse is under attack by another coalition.

IsDestroyed.description: Check if the warehouse has been destroyed.

IsStopped.description: Check if the warehouse is stopped.

HasConnectionRoad.description: Check if the warehouse has a road connection to another warehouse. Both warehouses need to be started!

HasConnectionRail.description: Check if the warehouse has a railroad connection to another warehouse. Both warehouses need to be started!

HasConnectionNaval.description: Check if the warehouse has a shipping lane defined to another warehouse.

HasConnectionOffRoad.description: Check if the warehouse has an off road path defined to another warehouse.

GetNumberOfAssets.description: Get number of assets in warehouse stock. Optionally, only specific assets can be counted.

GetCoordinate.description: Get coordinate of warehouse static.

GetCoalition.description: Get coalition side of warehouse static.

GetCoalitionName.description: Get coalition name of warehouse static.

GetCountry.description: Get country id of warehouse static.

GetCountryName.description: Get country name of warehouse static.

GetAirbase.description: Get airbase associated to the warehouse.

GetAirbaseName.description: Get name airbase associated to the warehouse.

GetAirbaseCategory.description: Get category of airbase associated to the warehouse.

FindWarehouseInDB.description: Find a warehouse in the global warehouse data base.

FindAssetInDB.description: Find an asset in the the global warehouse data base. Parameter is the MOOSE group object.

SetRunwayRepairtime.description: Set the time until the runway(s) of an airdrome are repaired after it has been destroyed.

IsUnit.description: Check if warehouse physical representation is a unit (not a static) object.

IsStatic.description: Check if warehouse physical representation is a static (not a unit) object.

IsShip.description: Check if warehouse physical representation is a ship.

onafterStart.description: On after Start event. Starts the warehouse. Adds event handlers and schedules status updates of reqests and queue.

onafterRestart.description: On after "Restart" event. Restarts the warehouse when it was in stopped state by reactivating the event handlers *only*.

onafterStop.description: On after "Stop" event. Stops the warehouse, unhandles all events.

onafterPause.description: On after "Pause" event. Pauses the warehouse, i.e. no requests are processed. However, new requests and new assets can be added in this state.

onafterUnpause.description: On after "Unpause" event. Unpauses the warehouse, i.e. requests in queue are processed again.

onafterStatus.description: On after Status event. Checks the queue and handles requests.

_JobDone.description: Function that checks if a pending job is done and can be removed from queue.

_CheckAssetStatus.description: Function that checks if an asset group is still okay.

_RegisterAsset.description: Register new asset in globase warehouse data base.

onafterNewAsset.description: On after "NewAsset" event. A new asset has been added to the warehouse stock.

onbeforeAddRequest.description: On before "AddRequest" event. Checks some basic properties of the given parameters.

onafterAddRequest.description: On after "AddRequest" event. Add a request to the warehouse queue, which is processed when possible.

onbeforeRequest.description: On before "Request" event. Checks if the request can be fulfilled.

onafterRequest.description: On after "Request" event. Spawns the necessary cargo and transport assets.

onafterRequestSpawned.description: On after "RequestSpawned" event. Initiates the transport of the assets to the requesting warehouse.

onafterUnloaded.description: On after "Unloaded" event. Triggered when a group was unloaded from the carrier.

onbeforeArrived.description: On before "Arrived" event. Triggered when a group has arrived at its destination warehouse.

onafterArrived.description: On after "Arrived" event. Triggered when a group has arrived at its destination warehouse.

onafterDelivered.description: On after "Delivered" event. Triggered when all asset groups have reached their destination. Corresponding request is deleted from the pending queue.

onafterSelfRequest.description: On after "SelfRequest" event. Request was initiated to the warehouse itself. Groups are just spawned at the warehouse or the associated airbase.

onafterAttacked.description: On after "Attacked" event. Warehouse is under attack by an another coalition.

onafterDefeated.description: On after "Defeated" event. Warehouse defeated an attack by another coalition. Defender assets are added back to warehouse stock.

onbeforeChangeCountry.description: On before "ChangeCountry" event. Checks whether a change of country is necessary by comparing the actual country to the the requested one.

onafterChangeCountry.description: On after "ChangeCountry" event. Warehouse is respawned with the specified country. All queued requests are deleted and the owned airbase is reset if the coalition is changed by changing the

onbeforeCaptured.description: On before "Captured" event. Warehouse has been captured by another coalition.

onafterCaptured.description: On after "Captured" event. Warehouse has been captured by another coalition.

onafterAirbaseCaptured.description: On after "AirbaseCaptured" event. Airbase of warehouse has been captured by another coalition.

onafterAirbaseRecaptured.description: On after "AirbaseRecaptured" event. Airbase of warehouse has been re-captured from other coalition.

onafterAssetSpawned.description: On after "AssetSpawned" event triggered when an asset group is spawned into the cruel world.

onafterAssetDead.description: On after "AssetDead" event triggered when an asset group died.

onafterDestroyed.description: On after "Destroyed" event. Warehouse was destroyed. All services are stopped. Warehouse is going to "Stopped" state in one minute.

onafterSave.description: On after "Save" event. Warehouse assets are saved to file on disk.

onbeforeLoad.description: On before "Load" event. Checks if the file the warehouse data should be loaded from exists.

onafterLoad.description: On after "Load" event. Warehouse assets are loaded from file on disk.

_SpawnAssetRequest.description: Spawns requested assets at warehouse or associated airbase.

_SpawnAssetGroundNaval.description: Spawn a ground or naval asset in the corresponding spawn zone of the warehouse.

_SpawnAssetAircraft.description: Spawn an aircraft asset (plane or helo) at the airbase associated with the warehouse.

_SpawnAssetPrepareTemplate.description: Prepare a spawn template for the asset. Deep copy of asset template, adjusting template and unit names, nillifying group and unit ids.

_RouteGround.description: Route ground units to destination. ROE is set to return fire and alarm state to green.

_RouteNaval.description: Route naval units along user defined shipping lanes to destination warehouse. ROE is set to return fire.

_RouteAir.description: Route the airplane from one airbase another. Activates uncontrolled aircraft and sets ROE/ROT for ferry flights.

_RouteTrain.description: Route trains to their destination - or at least to the closest point on rail of the desired final destination.

_Arrived.description: Task function for last waypoint. Triggering the "Arrived" event.

_PassingWaypoint.description: Task function for when passing a waypoint.

GetAssetByID.description: Get a warehouse asset from its unique id.

GetAssetByName.description: Get a warehouse asset from its name.

GetRequestByID.description: Get a warehouse request from its unique id.

_OnEventBirth.description: Warehouse event function, handling the birth of a unit.

_OnEventEngineStartup.description: Function handling the event when a (warehouse) unit starts its engines.

_OnEventTakeOff.description: Function handling the event when a (warehouse) unit takes off.

_OnEventLanding.description: Function handling the event when a (warehouse) unit lands.

_OnEventEngineShutdown.description: Function handling the event when a (warehouse) unit shuts down its engines.

_OnEventArrived.description: Arrived event if an air unit/group arrived at its destination. This can be an engine shutdown or a landing event.

_UnitDead.description: A unit of a group just died. Update group sets in request.

_CheckConquered.description: Checks if the warehouse zone was conquered by antoher coalition.

_CheckAirbaseOwner.description: Checks if the associated airbase still belongs to the warehouse.

_CheckRequestConsistancy.description: Checks if the request can be fulfilled in general. If not, it is removed from the queue.

_CheckRequestValid.description: Check if a request is valid in general. If not, it will be removed from the queue.

_CheckRequestNow.description: Checks if the request can be fulfilled right now.

_GetTransportsForAssets.description: Get (optimized) transport carriers for the given assets to be transported.

_CheckQueue.description: Sorts the queue and checks if the request can be fulfilled.

_SimpleTaskFunction.description: Simple task function. Can be used to call a function which has the warehouse and the executing group as parameters.

_SimpleTaskFunctionWP.description: Simple task function. Can be used to call a function which has the warehouse and the executing group as parameters.

_GetTerminal.description: Get the proper terminal type based on generalized attribute of the group.

_FindParkingForAssets.description: Seach unoccupied parking spots at the airbase for a list of assets. For each asset group a list of parking spots is returned.

_GetRequestOfGroup.description: Get the request belonging to a group.

_GroupIsTransport.description: Is the group a used as transporter for a given request?

_GetNameWithOut.description: Get group name without any spawn or cargo suffix #CARGO etc.

_GetIDsFromGroup.description: Get warehouse id, asset id and request id from group name (alias).

_GetIDsFromGroupName.description: Get warehouse id, asset id and request id from group name (alias).

FilterStock.description: Filter stock assets by descriptor and attribute.

_FilterStock.description: Filter stock assets by table entry.

_HasAttribute.description: Check if a group has a generalized attribute.

_GetAttribute.description: Get the generalized attribute of a group.

_GetObjectSize.description: Size of the bounding box of a DCS object derived from the DCS descriptor table. If boundinb box is nil, a size of zero is returned.

GetStockInfo.description: Returns the number of assets for each generalized attribute.

_DeleteStockItem.description: Delete an asset item from stock.

_SortQueue.description: Sort requests queue wrt prio and request uid.

_CheckFuel.description: Checks fuel on all pening assets.

_PrintQueue.description: Prints the queue to DCS.log file.

_UpdateWarehouseMarkText.description: Create or update mark text at warehouse, which is displayed in F10 map showing how many assets of each type are in stock.

_InfoMessage.description: Info Message. Message send to coalition if reports or debug mode activated (and duration > 0). Text self:I(text) added to DCS.log file.

_DebugMessage.description: Debug message. Message send to all if debug mode is activated (and duration > 0). Text self:T(text) added to DCS.log file.

_ErrorMessage.description: Error message. Message send to all (if duration > 0). Text self:E(text) added to DCS.log file.

_GetMaxHeight.description: Calculate the maximum height an aircraft can reach for the given parameters.

_GetFlightplan.description: Make a flight plan from a departure to a destination airport.

Debug.description: If true, send debug messages to all.

wid.description: Identifier of the warehouse printed before other output to DCS.log file.

Report.description: If true, send status messages to coalition.

alias.description: Alias of the warehouse. Name its called when sending messages.

zone.description: Zone around the warehouse. If this zone is captured, the warehouse and all its assets goes to the capturing coalition.

airbasename.description: Name of the airbase associated to the warehouse.

road.description: Closest point to warehouse on road.

rail.description: Closest point to warehouse on rail.

spawnzone.description: Zone in which assets are spawned.

markerOn.description: If true, markers are displayed on the F10 map.

markerid.description: ID of the warehouse marker at the airbase.

dTstatus.description: Time interval in seconds of updating the warehouse status and processing new events. Default 30 seconds.

queueid.description: Unit id of each request in the queue. Essentially a running number starting at one and incremented when a new request is added.

stock.description: Table holding all assets in stock. Table entries are of type @{#WAREHOUSE.Assetitem}.

queue.description: Table holding all queued requests. Table entries are of type @{#WAREHOUSE.Queueitem}.

pending.description: Table holding all pending requests, i.e. those that are currently in progress. Table elements are of type @{#WAREHOUSE.Pendingitem}.

transporting.description: Table holding assets currently transporting cargo assets.

delivered.description: Table holding all delivered requests. Table elements are #boolean. If true, all cargo has been delivered.

defending.description: Table holding all defending requests, i.e. self requests that were if the warehouse is under attack. Table elements are of type @{#WAREHOUSE.Pendingitem}.

portzone.description: Zone defining the port of a warehouse. This is where naval assets are spawned.

shippinglanes.description: Table holding the user defined shipping between warehouses.

offroadpaths.description: Table holding user defined paths from one warehouse to another.

autodefence.description: When the warehouse is under attack, automatically spawn assets to defend the warehouse.

spawnzonemaxdist.description: Max distance between warehouse and spawn zone. Default 5000 meters.

autosave.description: Automatically save assets to file when mission ends.

autosavepath.description: Path where the asset file is saved on auto save.

autosavefile.description: File name of the auto asset save file. Default is auto generated from warehouse id and name.

safeparking.description: If true, parking spots for aircraft are considered as occupied if e.g. a client aircraft is parked there. Default false.

isUnit.description: If `true`, warehouse is represented by a unit instead of a static.

isShip.description: If `true`, warehouse is represented by a ship unit.

lowfuelthresh.description: Low fuel threshold. Triggers the event AssetLowFuel if for any unit fuel goes below this number.

respawnafterdestroyed.description: If true, warehouse is respawned after it was destroyed. Assets are kept.

runwaydestroyed.description: Time stamp timer.getAbsTime() when the runway was destroyed.

runwayrepairtime.description: Time in seconds until runway will be repaired after it was destroyed. Default is 3600 sec (one hour).

AssetID.description: Unique ID of each asset. This is a running number, which is increased each time a new asset is added.

Assets.description: Table holding registered assets, which are of type @{Functional.Warehouse#WAREHOUSE.Assetitem}.#

WarehouseID.description: Unique ID of the warehouse. Running number.

Warehouses.description: Table holding all defined @{#WAREHOUSE} objects by their unique ids.

wid.description: ID of the warehouse this asset belongs to.

rid.description: Request ID of this asset (if any).

template.description: The spawn template of the group.

unittype.description: Type of the first unit of the group as obtained by the Object.getTypeName() DCS API function.

nunits.description: Number of units in the group.

range.description: Range of the unit in meters.

speedmax.description: Maximum speed in km/h the group can do.

size.description: Maximum size in length and with of the asset in meters.

weight.description: The weight of the whole asset group in kilograms.

cargobay.description: Array of cargo bays of all units in an asset group.

cargobaytot.description: Total weight in kg that fits in the cargo bay of all asset group units.

cargobaymax.description: Largest cargo bay of all units in the group.

loadradius.description: Distance when cargo is loaded into the carrier.

assignment.description: Assignment of the asset. This could, e.g., be used in the @{#WAREHOUSE.OnAfterNewAsset) function.

spawned.description: If true, asset was spawned into the cruel world. If false, it is still in stock.

iscargo.description: If true, asset is cargo. If false asset is transport. Nil if in stock.

arrived.description: If true, asset arrived at its destination.

damage.description: Damage of asset group in percent.

cohort.description: The cohort this asset belongs to.

legion.description: The legion this asset belonts to.

squadname.description: Name of the squadron this asset belongs to.

Treturned.description: Time stamp when asset returned to its legion (airwing, brigade).

requested.description: If `true`, asset was requested and cannot be selected by another request.

isReserved.description: If `true`, asset was reserved and cannot be selected by another request.

uid.description: Unique id of the queue item.

assetdesc.description: Descriptor of the requested asset. Enumerator of type @{#WAREHOUSE.Descriptor}.

assetdescval.description: Value of the asset descriptor. Type depends on "assetdesc" descriptor.

ntransport.description: Max. number of transport units requested.

assignment.description: A keyword or text that later be used to identify this request and postprocess the assets.

prio.description: Priority of the request. Number between 1 (high) and 100 (low).

airbase.description: The airbase beloning to requesting warehouse if any.

category.description: Category of the requesting airbase, i.e. airdrome, helipad/farp or ship.

toself.description: Self request, i.e. warehouse requests assets from itself.

assets.description: Table of self propelled (or cargo) and transport assets. Each element of the table is a @{#WAREHOUSE.Assetitem} and can be accessed by their asset ID.

cargoassets.description: Table of cargo (or self propelled) assets. Each element of the table is a @{#WAREHOUSE.Assetitem}.

cargoattribute.description: Attribute of cargo assets of type @{#WAREHOUSE.Attribute}.

cargocategory.description: Category of cargo assets of type @{#WAREHOUSE.Category}.

transportassets.description: Table of transport carrier assets. Each element of the table is a @{#WAREHOUSE.Assetitem}.

transportattribute.description: Attribute of transport assets of type @{#WAREHOUSE.Attribute}.

transportcategory.description: Category of transport assets of type @{#WAREHOUSE.Category}.

lateActivation.description: Assets are spawned in late activated state.

timestamp.description: Absolute mission time in seconds when the request was processed.

assetproblem.description: Table with assets that might have problems (damage or stuck).

cargogroupset.description: Set of cargo groups do be delivered.

ndelivered.description: Number of groups delivered to destination.

transportgroupset.description: Set of cargo transport carrier groups.

carriercargo.description: Table holding the cargo groups of each carrier unit.

lowfuel.description: If true, at least one asset group is low on fuel.

New.description: Create a new FOX class object.

onafterStart.description: On after Start event. Starts the missile trainer and adds event handlers.

onafterStop.description: On after Stop event. Stops the missile trainer and unhandles events.

AddSafeZone.description: Add a training zone. Players in the zone are safe.

AddLaunchZone.description: Add a launch zone. Only missiles launched within these zones will be tracked.

SetProtectedGroupSet.description: Add a protected set of groups.

AddProtectedGroup.description: Add a group to the protected set. Works only with AI!

SetExplosionPower.description: Set explosion power. This is an "artificial" explosion generated when the missile is destroyed. Just for the visual effect.

SetExplosionDistance.description: Set missile-player distance when missile is destroyed.

SetExplosionDistanceBigMissiles.description: Set missile-player distance when BIG missiles are destroyed.

SetDisableF10Menu.description: Disable F10 menu for all players.

SetEnableF10Menu.description: Enable F10 menu for all players.

SetDefaultMissileDestruction.description: Set default player setting for missile destruction.

SetDefaultLaunchAlerts.description: Set default player setting for launch alerts.

SetDefaultLaunchMarks.description: Set default player setting for marking missile launch coordinates

onafterStatus.description: Check spawn queue and spawn aircraft if necessary.

_IsProtected.description: Check if missile target is protected.

_FuncImpact.description: Callback function on impact or destroy otherwise.

OnEventPlayerEnterAircraft.description: FOX event handler for event birth.

OnEventBirth.description: FOX event handler for event birth.

OnEventShot.description: FOX event handler for event shot (when a unit releases a rocket or bomb (but not a fast firing gun).

OnEventHit.description: FOX event handler for event hit.

_ToggleDestroyMissiles.description: Turn destruction of missiles on/off for player.

_DeadText.description: Get a random text message in case you die.

_CheckCoordSafe.description: Check if a coordinate lies within a safe training zone.

_CheckCoordLaunch.description: Check if a coordinate lies within a launch zone.

_GetWeapongHeading.description: Returns the unit of a player and the player name. If the unit does not belong to a player, nil is returned.

_GetNotchingHeadings.description: Returns the unit of a player and the player name. If the unit does not belong to a player, nil is returned.

_GetPlayerFromUnitname.description: Returns the player data from a unit name.

_GetPlayerFromUnit.description: Retruns the player data from a unit.

_GetPlayerUnitAndName.description: Returns the unit of a player and the player name. If the unit does not belong to a player, nil is returned.

Debug.description: Debug mode. Messages to all about status.

lid.description: Class id string for output to DCS log file.

menuadded.description: Table of groups the menu was added for.

menudisabled.description: If true, F10 menu for players is disabled.

destroy.description: Default player setting for destroying missiles.

launchalert.description: Default player setting for launch alerts.

marklaunch.description: Default player setting for mark launch coordinates.

explosionpower.description: Power of explostion when destroying the missile in kg TNT. Default 5 kg TNT.

explosiondist.description: Missile player distance in meters for destroying smaller missiles. Default 200 m.

explosiondist2.description: Missile player distance in meters for destroying big missiles. Default 500 m.

bigmissilemass.description: Explosion power of big missiles. Default 50 kg TNT. Big missiles will be destroyed earlier.

dt50.description: Time step [sec] for missile position updates if distance to target > 50 km. Default 5 sec.

dt10.description: Time step [sec] for missile position updates if distance to target > 10 km and < 50 km. Default 1 sec.

dt05.description: Time step [sec] for missile position updates if distance to target > 5 km and < 10 km. Default 0.5 sec.

dt01.description: Time step [sec] for missile position updates if distance to target > 1 km and < 5 km. Default 0.1 sec.

dt00.description: Time step [sec] for missile position updates if distance to target < 1 km. Default 0.01 sec.

groupname.description: Name of the the player aircraft group.

launchalert.description: Alert player on detected missile launch.

marklaunch.description: Mark position of launched missile on F10 map.

inzone.description: Player is inside a protected zone.

SetAccousticDetectionOn.description: Set to accept accoustic detection. Set this *before* MANTIS starts!

_EventHandler.description: [Internal] Function to manage hits on SAM units

SetEWRGrouping.description: Function to set the grouping radius of the detection in meters

AddScootZones.description: Add a SET_ZONE of zones for Shoot&Scoot - SHORAD units will move around

AddZones.description: Function to set accept and reject zones.

AddRejectZone.description: Add a single reject zone to MANTIS.

AddAcceptZone.description: Add a single accept zone to MANTIS.

AddConflictZone.description: Add a single conflict zone to MANTIS.

AddCorridorZone.description: Function to add one corridor zone.

SetCorridorZoneFloorAndCeiling.description: Function to set corridor zone floor and ceiling in FEET.

SetCorridorZoneFloorAndCeilingMeters.description: Function to set corridor zone floor and ceiling in METERS.

SetEWRRange.description: Function to set the detection radius of the EWR in meters. (Deprecated, SAM range is used)

SetSAMRadius.description: Function to set switch-on/off zone for the SAM sites in meters. Overwritten per SAM in automode.

SetSAMRange.description: Function to set SAM firing engage range, 0-100 percent, e.g. 85

SetSmokeDecoy.description: Function to set Short Range SAMs to spit out smoke as decoy, if an enemy plane is in range.

SetMaxActiveSAMs.description: Function to set number of SAMs going active on a valid, detected thread

SetNewSAMRangeWhileRunning.description: Function to set a new SAM firing engage range, use this method to adjust range while running MANTIS, e.g. for different setups day and night

Debug.description: Function to set switch-on/off the debug state

GetCommandCenter.description: Function to get the HQ object for further use

SetAwacs.description: Function to set separate AWACS detection instance

SetAwacsRange.description: Function to set AWACS detection range. Defaults to 250.000m (250km) - use before starting your Mantis!

SetCommandCenter.description: Function to set the HQ object for further use

SetDLinkCacheTime.description: Function to set how long INTEL DLINK remembers contacts.

SetDetectInterval.description: Function to set the detection interval

SetUsingEmOnOff.description: Set using Emissions on/off instead of changing alarm state

SetUsingDLink.description: Set using your own #INTEL_DLINK object instead of #DETECTION

_CheckHQState.description: [Internal] Function to check if HQ is alive

_CheckEWRState.description: [Internal] Function to check if EWR is (at least partially) alive

_CheckAnyEWRAlive.description: [Internal] Check if any EWR or AWACS is still alive

_CalcAdvState.description: [Internal] Function to determine state of the advanced mode

SetAutoRelocate.description: Function to set autorelocation for HQ and EWR objects. Note: Units must be actually mobile in DCS!

_CheckCoordinateInZones.description: [Internal] Function to check accept and reject zones

_PreFilterHeight.description: [Internal] Function to prefilter height based and check for Helo activity.

_CheckObjectInZone.description: [Internal] Function to check if any object is in the given SAM zone

StartDetection.description: [Internal] Function to start the detection via EWR groups - if INTEL isn\'t available

StartIntelDetection.description: [Internal] Function to start the detection with INTEL via EWR groups

StartAwacsDetection.description: [Internal] Function to start the detection via AWACS if defined as separate (classic)

_GetSAMDataFromUnits.description: [Internal] Function to get SAM firing data from units types.

_GetSAMRange.description: [Internal] Function to get SAM firing data

SetSAMStartState.description: [Internal] Function to set the SAM start state

_RefreshSAMTable.description: [Internal] Function to update SAM table and SEAD state

AddShorad.description: Function to link up #MANTIS with a #SHORAD installation

RemoveShorad.description: Function to unlink #MANTIS from a #SHORAD installation

_SmokeUnits.description: [Internal] Function to smoke a group in decoy.

SeadAllowSuppression.description: [Internal] Check if a system can and should defend for HARMs itself

SAM_Templates_Prefix.description: Prefix to build the #SET_GROUP for SAM sites

EWR_Templates_Prefix.description: Prefix to build the #SET_GROUP for EWR group

Adv_EWR_Group.description: The EWR #SET_GROUP used for advanced mode

HQ_Template_CC.description: The ME name of the HQ object

lid.description: Prefix for logging

detectinterval.description: Interval in seconds for the target detection

engagerange.description: Firing engage range of the SAMs, see [https://wiki.hoggitworld.com/view/DCS_option_engagementRange]

autorelocate.description: Relocate HQ and EWR groups in random intervals. Note: You need to select units for this which are *actually mobile*

advanced.description: Use advanced mode, will decrease reactivity of MANTIS, if HQ and/or EWR network dies. Set SAMs to RED state if both are dead. Requires usage of an HQ object

adv_ratio.description: Percentage to use for advanced mode, defaults to 100%

advAwacs.description: Boolean switch to use Awacs as a separate detection stream

awacsrange.description: Detection range of an optional Awacs unit

UseEmOnOff.description: Decide if we are using Emissions on/off (true) or AlarmState red/green (default)

ShoradTime.description: Timer in seconds, how long #SHORAD will be active after a detection inside of the defense range

ShoradActDistance.description: Distance of an attacker in meters from a Mantis SAM site, on which Shorad will be switched on. Useful to not give away Shorad sites too early. Default 15km. Should be smaller than checkradius.

checkforfriendlies.description: If true, do not activate a SAM installation if a friendly aircraft is in firing range.

FilterZones.description: Table of Core.Zone#ZONE Zones Consider SAM groups in this zone(s) only for this MANTIS instance, must be handed as #table of Zone objects.

SmokeDecoy.description: If true, smoke short range SAM units as decoy if a plane is in firing range.

SmokeDecoyColor.description: Color to use, defaults to SMOKECOLOR.White.

DLinkCacheTime.description: Seconds after which cached contacts in DLink will decay.

logsamstatus.description: Log SAM status in dcs.log every cycle if true.

DetectAccoustic.description: Set if we can also detect units accousticly.

DetectAccousticRadius.description: We can hear in this range.

_InitState.description: Initially set all groups to alarm state GREEN

AddScootZones.description: Add a SET_ZONE of zones for Shoot&Scoot

SetActiveTimer.description: Set the number of seconds a SHORAD site will stay active

SetDefenseRadius.description: Set the number of meters for the SHORAD defense zone

SetUsingEmOnOff.description: Set using Emission on/off instead of changing alarm state

_CheckHarms.description: Check if a HARM was fired

_CheckMavs.description: Check if an AGM was fired

_CheckCoalition.description: Check the coalition of the attacker

_CheckShotAtShorad.description: Check if the missile is aimed at a SHORAD

_CheckShotAtSams.description: Check if the missile is aimed at a SAM site

AddCallBack.description: Set an object to call back when going evasive.

_ShotIsDetected.description: Calculate if the missile shot is detected

onafterWakeUpShorad.description: Wake up #SHORADs in a zone with diameter Radius for ActiveTimer seconds

onafterCalculateHitZone.description: (Internal) Calculate hit zone of an AGM-88

HandleEventShot.description: Main function - work on the EventData

Prefixes.description: String to be used to build the @{#Core.Set#SET_GROUP}

Samset.description: The set of SAM groups to defend

ActiveTimer.description: How long a Shorad stays active after wake-up in seconds

lid.description: The log ID for the dcs.log

UseEmOnOff.description: Decide if we are using Emission on/off (default) or AlarmState red/green

shootandscoot.description: If true, shoot and scoot between zones

SkateZones.description: Zones in this set are considered

minscootdist.description: Min distance of the next zone

maxscootdist.description: Max distance of the next zone

scootrandomcoord.description: If true, use a random coordinate in the zone and not the center

scootformation.description: Formation to take for scooting, e.g. "Vee" or "Cone"

New.description: Function to create a new AICSAR object

SetUsingRescueZone.description: [User] Use a defined zone as area of operation and not the distance to FARP.

SetSRSRadio.description: [User] Switch sound output on and use SRS output for sound files.

SetPilotTTSVoice.description: [User] Set SRS TTS Voice of downed pilot. `AICSAR:SetSRSTTSRadio()` needs to be set first!

SetOperatorTTSVoice.description: [User] Set SRS TTS Voice of the rescue operator. `AICSAR:SetSRSTTSRadio()` needs to be set first!

SetDCSRadio.description: [User] Switch sound output on and use normale (DCS) radio

DCSRadioBroadcast.description: [Internal] Sound output via non-SRS Radio. Add message files (.ogg) via "Sound to..." in the ME.

_EjectEventHandler.description: [Internal] Catch the ejection and save the pilot name

_EventHandler.description: [Internal] Catch the landing after ejection and spawn a pilot in situ.

_CheckInMashZone.description: [Internal] Check if pilot arrived in rescue zone (MASH)

SetDefaultSpeed.description: [User] Set default helo speed. Note - AI might have other ideas. Defaults to 100kn.

SetDefaultAltitude.description: [User] Set default helo altitudeAGL. Note - AI might have other ideas. Defaults to 1500ft.

_CheckQueue.description: [Internal] Check pilot queue for next mission

lid.description: LID for log entries.

farp.description: FARP object from where to start.

farpzone.description: MASH zone to drop rescued pilots.

maxdistance.description: Max distance to go for a rescue.

pilotindex.description: Table index to bind pilot to helo.

rescuezoneradius.description: Radius around downed pilot for the helo to land in.

autoonoff.description: Only send a helo when no human heli pilots are available.

playerset.description: Track if alive heli pilots are available.

limithelos.description: limit available number of helos going on mission (defaults to true)

Altitude.description: Default altitude setting for the helicopter FLIGHTGROUP 1500ft.

Speed.description: Default speed setting for the helicopter FLIGHTGROUP is 100kn.

UseEventEject.description: In case Event LandingAfterEjection isn't working, use set this to true.

Delay.description: In case of UseEventEject wait this long until we spawn a landed pilot.

UseRescueZone.description: If true, use a rescue zone and not the max distance to FARP/MASH

RescueZone.description: Use this zone as operational area for the AICSAR instance.

lid.description: Lid for log entries

remunitionqueue.description: List of (alive) #AMMOTRUCK.data artillery to be reloaded

ammothreshold.description: Threshold (min) ammo before sending a truck

routeonroad.description: Route truck on road if true (default)

reloads.description: Number of reloads a single truck can do before he must return home

New.description: Constructor for a new Autolase instance.

SetMonitorFrequency.description: [User] When using Monitor, set the frequency here in which the report will appear

SetLaserCodes.description: [User] Set a table of possible laser codes.

EnableImproveGroundUnitsDetection.description: [User] Improve ground unit detection by using a zone scan and LOS check.

DisableImproveGroundUnitsDetection.description: [User] Do not improve ground unit detection by using a zone scan and LOS check.

SetMinThreatLevel.description: (User) Set minimum threat level for target selection, can be 0 (lowest) to 10 (highest).

AddBlackListAttributes.description: (User) Set list of #UNIT level attributes that won't be lased. For list of attributes see [Hoggit Wiki](https://wiki.hoggitworld.com/view/DCS_enum_attributes) and [GitHub](https://github.com/mrSkortch/DCS-miscScripts/tree/master/ObjectDB)

GetLaserCode.description: (Internal) Function to get a laser code by recce name

GetSmokeColor.description: (Internal) Function to get a smoke color by recce name

SetNotifyPilots.description: (Internal) Function set notify pilots on events

SetRecceLaserCode.description: (User) Function to set a specific code to a Recce.

SetRecceSmokeColor.description: (User) Function to set a specific smoke color for a Recce.

SetLaserCoolDown.description: (User) Function to force laser cooldown and cool down time

SetReportingTimes.description: (User) Function to set message show times.

SetLasingParameters.description: (User) Function to set lasing distance in meters and duration in seconds

SetSmokeTargets.description: (User) Function to set smoking of targets.

SetRoundingPrecsion.description: (User) Function to set rounding precision for BR distance output.

EnableSmokeMenu.description: (User) Show the "Switch smoke target..." menu entry for pilots. On by default.

DisableSmokeMenu.description: (User) Do not show the "Switch smoke target..." menu entry for pilots.

EnableThreatLevelMenu.description: (User) Show the "Switch min threat lasing..." menu entry for pilots. On by default.

DisableThreatLevelMenu.description: (User) Do not show the "Switch min threat lasing..." menu entry for pilots.

GetLosFromUnit.description: (Internal) Function to calculate line of sight.

CleanCurrentLasing.description: (Internal) Function to check on lased targets.

CheckIsLased.description: (Internal) Function to check if a unit is already lased.

CanLase.description: (Internal) Function to check if a unit can be lased.

_Prescient.description: (Internal) Function to do a zone check per ground Recce and make found units and statics "known".

SetActivationRanges.description: [USER] Set activation radius for Helos and Planes in Nautical Miles.

SetAAARanges.description: [USER] Set AAA Ranges - AAA equals non-SAM systems which qualify as AAA in DCS world.

AddExceptionSet.description: [USER] Add a SET_GROUP of GROUP objects as exceptions. Can be done multiple times. Does not work work for GROUP objects spawned into the SET after start, i.e. the groups need to exist in the game already.

_FilterNotAAA.description: [INTERNAL] Filter Function - Optimized with cached calls

_FilterNotSAM.description: [INTERNAL] Filter Function - Optimized with cached calls

_FilterAAA.description: [INTERNAL] Filter Function - Optimized with cached calls

_FilterSAM.description: [INTERNAL] Filter Function - Optimized with cached calls

_InitGroups.description: [INTERNAL] Init Groups - Optimized with reduced function calls

_SwitchOnGroups.description: [INTERNAL] Switch Groups Behaviour - Optimized with zone caching

New.description: [USER] Create a new STRATEGO object and start it up.

onafterStart.description: [INTERNAL] FSM function for initial setup and getting ready.

SetUsingBudget.description: [USER] Set up usage of budget and set an initial budget in points.

SetStrategoZone.description: [USER] Restrict Stratego to analyse this zone only.

SetWeights.description: [USER] Set weights for nodes and routes to determine their importance.

SetNeutralBenefit.description: [USER] Set neutral benefit, i.e. how many points it is cheaper to decide for a neutral vs an enemy node when taking decisions.

SetCaptureOptions.description: [USER] Set how many units of which minimum threat level are needed to capture one node (i.e. the underlying OpsZone).

GetNewOpsZone.description: [INTERNAL] Get an OpsZone from a Zone object.

GetRoutesFromNode.description: [USER] Get available connecting nodes from one start node

AddRoutesManually.description: [USER] Manually add a route, for e.g. Island hopping or to connect isolated networks. Use after STRATEGO has been started!

GetHighestWeightNodes.description: [USER] Get a list of the nodes with the highest weight.

GetNextHighestWeightNodes.description: [USER] Get a list of the nodes a weight less than the given parameter.

SetNodeWeight.description: [USER] Set the aggregated weight of a single node found by its name manually.

SetNodeBaseWeight.description: [USER] Set the base weight of a single node found by its name manually.

GetNodeWeight.description: [USER] Get the aggregated weight of a node by its name.

GetNodeBaseWeight.description: [USER] Get the base weight of a node by its name.

GetNodeCoalition.description: [USER] Get the COALITION of a node by its name.

GetNodeType.description: [USER] Get the TYPE of a node by its name.

GetNodeZone.description: [USER] Get the ZONE of a node by its name.

GetNodeOpsZone.description: [USER] Get the OPSZONE of a node by its name.

GetNodeCoordinate.description: [USER] Get the COORDINATE of a node by its name.

IsAirbase.description: [USER] Check if the TYPE of a node is AIRBASE.

IsPort.description: [USER] Check if the TYPE of a node is PORT.

IsPOI.description: [USER] Check if the TYPE of a node is POI.

IsFARP.description: [USER] Check if the TYPE of a node is FARP.

IsShip.description: [USER] Check if the TYPE of a node is SHIP.

FindClosestConsolidationTarget.description: [USER] Get the next best consolidation target node with a lower BaseWeight.

FindClosestStrategicTarget.description: [USER] Get the next best strategic target node with same or higher Consolidated Weight.

FindStrategicTargets.description: [USER] Get the next best strategic target nodes in the network.

FindConsolidationTargets.description: [USER] Get the next best consolidation target nodes in the network.

FindNeighborNodes.description: [USER] Get neighbor nodes of a named node.

_GetNextClosest.description: [INTERNAL] Route Finding - Find the next hop towards an end node from a start node

FindRoute.description: [USER] Find a route between two nodes.

_FloodNext.description: [INTERNAL] Internal helper function to check for islands, aka Floodtest

_FloodFill.description: [INTERNAL] Internal helper function to check for islands, aka Floodtest

_FloodTest.description: [INTERNAL] Internal helper function to check for islands, aka Floodtest
