New.description: Creates a new instance of CLIENTWATCH to add scripts to. Can be used multiple times with the same client/prefixes if you need it for multiple scripts.

FilterByCoalition.description: Filter out all clients not belonging to the provided coalition

FilterByCategory.description: Filter out all clients that are not of the given category

Debug.description: Write Debug messages to DCS log file and send Debug messages to all players.

lid.description: String for DCS log file.

FilterCoalition.description: If not nil, will only activate for aircraft of the given coalition value.

FilterCategory.description: If not nil, will only activate for aircraft of the given category value.

New.description: FORMATION class constructor for an AI group

SetFollowTimeInterval.description: Set time interval between updates of the formation.

TestSmokeDirectionVector.description: This function is for test, it will put on the frequency of the FollowScheduler a red smoke at the direction vector calculated for the escort to fly to.

SetFlightRandomization.description: Use the method @{FORMATION#FORMATION.SetFlightRandomization}() to make the air units in your formation randomize their flight a bit while in formation.

onafterStop.description: Stop function. Formation will not be updated any more.

onbeforeFollow.description: Follow event fuction. Check if coming from state "stopped". If so the transition is rejected.

FollowScheduler.description: The instance of the SCHEDULER class.

OptionROE.description: Which ROE is set to the FollowGroup.

OptionReactionOnThreat.description: Which REACTION_ON_THREAT is set to the FollowGroup.

New.description: Create a new AIRBOSS class object for a specific aircraft carrier unit.

SetCollisionDistance.description: Set distance up to which water ahead is scanned for collisions.

SetHoldingOffsetAngle.description: Set holding pattern offset from final bearing for Case II/III recoveries.

SetMenuRecovery.description: Enable F10 menu to manually start recoveries.

SetSquadronAI.description: Define a set of AI groups that are handled by the airboss.

SetExcludeAI.description: Define a set of AI groups that excluded from AI handling. Members of this set will be left allone by the airboss and not forced into the Marshal pattern.

AddExcludeAI.description: Add a group to the exclude set. If no set exists, it is created.

CloseCurrentRecoveryWindow.description: Close currently running recovery window and stop recovery ops. Recovery window is deleted.

GetRecoveryWindowByID.description: Return the recovery window of the given ID.

DeleteRecoveryWindow.description: Delete a recovery window. If the window is currently open, it is closed and the recovery stopped.

SetRecoveryTurnTime.description: Set time before carrier turns and recovery window opens.

SetQueueUpdateTime.description: Set time interval for updating queues and other stuff.

SetLSOCallInterval.description: Set time interval between LSO calls. Optimal time in the groove is ~16 seconds. So the default of 4 seconds gives around 3-4 correction calls in the groove.

SetIntoWindLegacy.description: Set if old into wind calculation is used when carrier turns into the wind for a recovery.

SetAirbossNiceGuy.description: Airboss is a rather nice guy and not strictly following the rules. Fore example, he does allow you into the landing pattern if you are not coming from the Marshal stack.

SetEmergencyLandings.description: Allow emergency landings, i.e. bypassing any pattern and go directly to final approach.

SetDespawnOnEngineShutdown.description: Despawn AI groups after they they shut down their engines.

SetRespawnAI.description: Respawn AI groups once they reach the CCA. Clears any attached airbases and allows making them land on the carrier via script.

SetRefuelAI.description: Give AI aircraft the refueling task if a recovery tanker is present or send them to the nearest divert airfield.

SetInitialMaxAlt.description: Set max altitude to register flights in the initial zone. Aircraft above this altitude will not be registerered.

SetSoundfilesFolder.description: Set folder path where the airboss sound files are located within you mission (miz) file.

SetStatusUpdateTime.description: Set time interval for updating player status and other things.

SetDefaultMessageDuration.description: Set duration how long messages are displayed to players.

SetMarshalRadius.description: Set Case I Marshal radius. This is the radius of the valid zone around "the post" aircraft are supposed to be holding in the Case I Marshal stack.

SetMenuSingleCarrier.description: Optimized F10 radio menu for a single carrier. The menu entries will be stored directly under F10 Other/Airboss/ and not F10 Other/Airboss/"Carrier Alias"/.

SetMenuMarkZones.description: Enable or disable F10 radio menu for marking zones via smoke or flares.

SetMenuSmokeZones.description: Enable or disable F10 radio menu for marking zones via smoke.

SetTrapSheet.description: Enable saving of player's trap sheets and specify an optional directory path.

SetStaticWeather.description: Specify weather the mission has set static or dynamic weather.

SetTACAN.description: Set TACAN channel of carrier and switches TACAN on.

SetBeaconRefresh.description: Set beacon (TACAN/ICLS) time refresh interfal in case the beacons die.

EnableSRS.description: Set up SRS for usage without sound files

SetLSORadio.description: Set LSO radio frequency and modulation. Default frequency is 264 MHz AM.

SetAirbossRadio.description: Set Airboss radio frequency and modulation. Default frequency is Tower frequency.

SetMarshalRadio.description: Set Marshal radio frequency and modulation. Default frequency is 305 MHz AM.

SetRadioUnitName.description: Set unit name for sending radio messages.

SetRadioRelayLSO.description: Set unit acting as radio relay for the LSO radio.

SetRadioRelayMarshal.description: Set unit acting as radio relay for the Marshal radio.

SetUserSoundRadio.description: Use user sound output instead of radio transmission for messages. Might be handy if radio transmissions are broken.

SetMaxLandingPattern.description: Set number of aircraft units, which can be in the landing pattern before the pattern is full.

SetMaxMarshalStacks.description: Set number available Case I Marshal stacks. If Marshal stacks are full, flights requesting Marshal will be told to hold outside 10 NM zone until a stack becomes available again.

SetMaxSectionSize.description: Set max number of section members. Minimum is one, i.e. the section lead itself. Maximum number is four. Default is two, i.e. the lead and one other human flight.

SetMaxSectionDistance.description: Set maximum distance up to which section members are allowed (default: 100 meters).

SetMaxFlightsPerStack.description: Set max number of flights per stack. All members of a section count as one "flight".

SetExtraVoiceOvers.description: Will play the inbound calls, commencing, initial, etc. from the player when requesteing marshal

SetExtraVoiceOversAI.description: Will simulate the inbound call, commencing, initial, etc from the AI when requested by Airboss

SetRecoveryTanker.description: Define recovery tanker associated with the carrier.

SetAWACS.description: Define an AWACS associated with the carrier.

SetDefaultPlayerSkill.description: Set default player skill. New players will be initialized with this skill.

SetAutoSave.description: Enable auto save of player results each time a player is *finally* graded. *Finally* means after the player landed on the carrier! After intermediate passes (bolter or waveoff) the stats are *not* saved.

SetDebugModeON.description: Activate debug mode. Display debug messages on screen.

SetPatrolAdInfinitum.description: Carrier patrols ad inifintum. If the last waypoint is reached, it will go to waypoint one and repeat its route.

SetMagneticDeclination.description: Set the magnetic declination (or variation). By default this is set to the standard declination of the map.

SetDebugModeOFF.description: Deactivate debug mode. This is also the default setting.

SetFunkManOn.description: Set FunkMan socket. LSO grades and trap sheets will be send to your Discord bot.

GetNextRecoveryTime.description: Get next time the carrier will start recovering aircraft.

IsRecovering.description: Check if carrier is recovering aircraft.

IsIdle.description: Check if carrier is idle, i.e. no operations are carried out.

IsPaused.description: Check if recovery of aircraft is paused.

onafterStart.description: On after Start event. Starts the AIRBOSS. Adds event handlers and schedules status updates of requests and queue.

onafterStatus.description: On after Status event. Checks for new flights, updates queue and checks player status.

_Status.description: Check AI status. Pattern queue AI in the groove? Marshal queue AI arrived in holding zone?

_CheckAIStatus.description: Check AI status. Pattern queue AI in the groove? Marshal queue AI arrived in holding zone?

_CheckPlayerPatternDistance.description: Check if player in the landing pattern is too close to another aircarft in the pattern.

_CheckRecoveryTimes.description: Check recovery times and start/stop recovery mode of aircraft.

_GetFlightLead.description: Get section lead of a flight.

onbeforeRecoveryCase.description: On before "RecoveryCase" event. Check if case or holding offset did change. If not transition is denied.

onafterRecoveryCase.description: On after "RecoveryCase" event. Sets new aircraft recovery case. Updates

onafterRecoveryStart.description: On after "RecoveryStart" event. Recovery of aircraft is started and carrier switches to state "Recovering".

onafterRecoveryStop.description: On after "RecoveryStop" event. Recovery of aircraft is stopped and carrier switches to state "Idle". Running recovery window is deleted.

onafterRecoveryPause.description: On after "RecoveryPause" event. Recovery of aircraft is paused. Marshal queue stays intact.

onafterRecoveryUnpause.description: On after "RecoveryUnpause" event. Recovery of aircraft is resumed.

onafterPassingWaypoint.description: On after "PassingWaypoint" event. Carrier has just passed a waypoint

onafterIdle.description: On after "Idle" event. Carrier goes to state "Idle".

onafterStop.description: On after Stop event. Unhandle events.

_InitStennis.description: Init parameters for USS Stennis carrier.

_InitNimitz.description: Init parameters for Nimitz class super carriers.

_InitForrestal.description: Init parameters for Forrestal class super carriers.

_InitEssex.description: Init parameters for Essec class carriers.

_InitBonHommeRichard.description: Init parameters for CVA-31 Bon Homme Richard carriers.

_InitEssexSCB125.description: Init parameters for Generic Essex SC125 class carriers.

_InitHermes.description: Init parameters for R12 HMS Hermes carrier.

_InitInvincible.description: Init parameters for R05 HMS Invincible carrier.

_InitTarawa.description: Init parameters for LHA-1 Tarawa carrier.

_InitAmerica.description: Init parameters for LHA-6 America carrier.

_InitJcarlos.description: Init parameters for L61 Juan Carlos carrier.

_InitCanberra.description: Init parameters for L02 Canberra carrier.

SetVoiceOversMarshalByGabriella.description: Init parameters for Marshal Voice overs *Gabriella* by HighwaymanEd.

SetVoiceOversMarshalByRaynor.description: Init parameters for Marshal Voice overs by *Raynor*.

SetVoiceOversLSOByRaynor.description: Set parameters for LSO Voice overs by *Raynor*.

SetVoiceOversLSOByFF.description: Set parameters for LSO Voice overs by *funkyfranky*.

SetVoiceOversMarshalByFF.description: Intit parameters for Marshal Voice overs by *funkyfranky*.

_InitVoiceOvers.description: Init voice over radio transmission call.

SetVoiceOver.description: Init voice over radio transmission call.

_AoAUnit2Deg.description: Convert AoA from arbitrary units to degrees.

_AoADeg2Units.description: Convert AoA from degrees to arbitrary units.

_GetAircraftParameters.description: Get optimal aircraft flight parameters at checkpoint.

_GetNextMarshalFight.description: Get next marshal flight which is ready to enter the landing pattern.

_ClearForLanding.description: Clear flight for landing. AI are removed from Marshal queue and the Marshal stack is collapsed.

_SetPlayerStep.description: Set player step. Any warning is erased and next step hint shown.

_WaitPlayer.description: Tell player to wait outside the 10 NM zone until a Marshal stack is available.

_MarshalPlayer.description: Orbit at a specified position at a specified altitude with a specified speed.

_WaitAI.description: Command AI flight to orbit outside the 10 NM zone and wait for a free Marshal stack.

_MarshalAI.description: Command AI flight to orbit at a specified position at a specified altitude with a specified speed. If flight is not in the Marshal queue yet, it is added. This fixes the recovery case.

_RefuelAI.description: Tell AI to refuel. Either at the recovery tanker or at the nearest divert airfield.

_LandAI.description: Tell AI to land on the carrier.

_GetMarshalAltitude.description: Get marshal altitude and two positions of a counter-clockwise race track pattern.

_GetCharlieTime.description: Calculate an estimate of the charlie time of the player based on how many other aircraft are in the marshal or pattern queue before him.

_AddMarshalGroup.description: Add a flight group to the Marshal queue at a specific stack. Flight is informed via message. This fixes the recovery case to the current case ops in progress self.case).

_GetFreeStack.description: Get next free Marshal stack. Depending on AI/human and recovery case.

_GetFreeStack_Old.description: Get next free Marshal stack. Depending on AI/human and recovery case.

_GetFlightUnits.description: Get number of (airborne) units in a flight.

_GetQueueInfo.description: Get number of groups and units in queue, which are alive and airborne. In units we count the section members as well.

_CreateFlightGroup.description: Create a new flight group. Usually when a flight appears in the CCA.

_NewPlayer.description: Initialize player data after birth event of player unit.

_InitPlayer.description: Initialize player data by (re-)setting parmeters to initial values.

_GetFlightFromGroupInQueue.description: Get flight from group in a queue.

_InQueue.description: Check if a group is in a queue.

_RemoveDeadFlightGroups.description: Remove dead flight groups from all queues.

_GetLeadFlight.description: Get the lead flight group of a flight group.

_CheckSectionRecovered.description: Check if all elements of a flight were recovered. This also checks potential section members.

_AddFlightToPatternQueue.description: Add flight to pattern queue and set recoverd to false for all elements of the flight and its section members.

_RecoveredElement.description: Sets flag recovered=true for a flight element, which was successfully recovered (landed).

_RemoveFlightFromMarshalQueue.description: Remove a flight group from the Marshal queue. Marshal stack is collapsed, too, if flight was in the queue. Waiting flights are send to marshal.

_RemoveFlightFromQueue.description: Remove a flight group from a queue.

_RemoveUnitFromFlight.description: Remove a unit and its element from a flight group (e.g. when landed) and update all queues if the whole flight group is gone.

_RemoveFlightFromSection.description: Remove a flight, which is a member of a section, from this section.

_UpdateFlightSection.description: Update section if a flight is removed.

_RemoveFlight.description: Remove a flight from Marshal, Pattern and Waiting queues. If flight is in Marhal queue, the above stack is collapsed.

_CheckMissedStepOnEntry.description: Checks if a player is in the pattern queue and has missed a step in Case II/III approach.

_SetTimeInGroove.description: Set time in the groove for player.

_GetTimeInGroove.description: Get time in the groove of player.

OnEventBirth.description: Airboss event handler for event birth.

OnEventRunwayTouch.description: Airboss event handler for event land.

OnEventEngineShutdown.description: Airboss event handler for event that a unit shuts down its engines.

OnEventTakeoff.description: Airboss event handler for event that a unit takes off.

OnEventCrash.description: Airboss event handler for event crash.

OnEventEjection.description: Airboss event handler for event Ejection.

OnEventRemoveUnit.description: Airboss event handler for event REMOVEUNIT.

OnEventPlayerLeaveUnit.description: Airboss event handler for event player leave unit.

_PlayerLeft.description: Airboss event handler for event player leave unit.

OnEventMissionEnd.description: Airboss event function handling the mission end event.

_Waiting.description: Waiting outside 10 NM zone for free Marshal stack.

_Commencing.description: Commence approach. This step initializes the player data. Section members are also set to commence. Next step depends on recovery case:

_Initial.description: Start pattern when player enters the initial zone in case I/II recoveries.

_CheckCorridor.description: Check if player is in CASE II/III approach corridor.

_Platform.description: Platform at 5k ft for case II/III recoveries. Descent at 2000 ft/min.

_ArcInTurn.description: Arc in turn for case II/III recoveries.

_ArcOutTurn.description: Arc out turn for case II/III recoveries.

_DirtyUp.description: Dirty up and level out at 1200 ft for case III recovery.

_Bullseye.description: Intercept glide slop and follow ICLS, aka Bullseye for case III recovery.

_BolterPattern.description: Bolter pattern. Sends player to abeam for Case I/II or Bullseye for Case III ops.

_BreakEntry.description: Break entry for case I/II recoveries.

_CheckWaveOff.description: LSO check if player needs to wave off.

_CheckFoulDeck.description: Check if other aircraft are currently on the landing runway.

_Trapped.description: Trapped? Check if in air or not after landing event.

_GetZoneInitial.description: Get Initial zone for Case I or II.

_GetZoneBullseye.description: Get Bullseye zone with radius 1 NM and DME 3 NM from the carrier. Radial depends on recovery case.

_GetZoneDirtyUp.description: Get dirty up zone with radius 1 NM and DME 9 NM from the carrier. Radial depends on recovery case.

_GetZoneArcOut.description: Get arc out zone with radius 1 NM and DME 12 NM from the carrier. Radial depends on recovery case.

_GetZoneArcIn.description: Get arc in zone with radius 1 NM and DME 14 NM from the carrier. Radial depends on recovery case.

_GetZonePlatform.description: Get platform zone with radius 1 NM and DME 19 NM from the carrier. Radial depends on recovery case.

_GetZoneCorridor.description: Get approach corridor zone. Shape depends on recovery case.

_GetZoneCarrierBox.description: Get zone of carrier. Carrier is approximated as rectangle.

_GetZoneAbeamLandingSpot.description: Allow for Clear to land call from LSO approaching abeam the landing spot if stable as per NATOPS 00-80T

_GetZoneLandingSpot.description: Get zone of the primary landing spot of the USS Tarawa.

_GetZoneCommence.description: Get zone where player are automatically commence when enter.

_AttitudeMonitor.description: Provide info about player status on the fly.

_Glideslope.description: Get glide slope of aircraft unit.

_Glideslope2.description: Get glide slope of aircraft unit.

_Lineup.description: Get line up of player wrt to carrier.

_LineupWIRE.description: Get line up of player wrt to carrier.

_NozzleArgumentLeft.description: Get L/R Nozzle Position from Argument and L/R Burner Argument

_NozzleArgumentRight.description: Get L/R Nozzle Position from Argument and L/R Burner Argument

_GetAltCarrier.description: Get altitude of aircraft wrt carrier deck. Should give zero when the aircraft touched down.

_GetOptLandingCoordinate.description: Get optimal landing position of the aircraft. Usually between second and third wire. In case of Tarawa, Canberrra, Juan Carlos and America we take the abeam landing spot 120 ft above and 21 ft abeam the 7.5 position, for the Juan Carlos I, HMS Invincible, and HMS Hermes and Invincible it is 120 ft above and 21 ft abeam the 5 position. For CASE III it is 120ft directly above the landing spot.

_GetOptLandingCoordinateWIRE.description: Get optimal landing position of the aircraft. Usually between second and third wire. In case of Tarawa, Canberrra, Juan Carlos and America we take the abeam landing spot 120 ft above and 21 ft abeam the 7.5 position, for the Juan Carlos I, HMS Invincible, and HMS Hermes and Invincible it is 120 ft above and 21 ft abeam the 5 position. For CASE III it is 120ft directly above the landing spot.

_GetLandingSpotCoordinate.description: Get landing spot on Tarawa and others.

GetHeading.description: Get true (or magnetic) heading of carrier.

GetBRC.description: Get base recovery course (BRC) of carrier.

GetWind.description: Get wind direction and speed at carrier position.

GetWindOnDeck.description: Get wind speed on carrier deck parallel and perpendicular to runway.

GetHeadingIntoWind.description: Get true (or magnetic) heading of carrier into the wind. This accounts for the angled runway.

GetHeadingIntoWind_old.description: Get true (or magnetic) heading of carrier into the wind. This accounts for the angled runway.

GetHeadingIntoWind_new.description: Get true (or magnetic) heading of carrier into the wind. This accounts for the angled runway.

GetBRCintoWind.description: Get base recovery course (BRC) when the carrier would head into the wind.

GetRadial.description: Get radial with respect to carrier BRC or FB and (optionally) holding offset.

_GetDeltaHeading.description: Get difference between to headings in degrees taking into accound the [0,360) periodocity.

_GetRelativeHeading.description: Get relative heading of player wrt carrier.

_GetRelativeVelocity.description: Get relative velocity of player unit wrt to carrier

_GetDistances.description: Calculate distances between carrier and aircraft unit.

_CheckLimits.description: Check limits for reaching next step.

_EvalGrooveTime.description: Grade player time in the groove - from turning to final until touchdown.

_GS.description: Get short name of the grove step.

_CheckAbort.description: Check if a player is within the right area.

_TooFarOutText.description: Generate a text if a player is too far from where he should be.

_StepHint.description: Display hint for flight students about the (next) step. Message is displayed after one second.

_DistanceCheck.description: Evaluate player's distance to the boat at checkpoint.

_Debrief.description: Debrief player and set next step.

_CheckCollisionCoord.description: Check for possible collisions between two coordinates.

_Pathfinder.description: Find free path to the next waypoint.

CarrierResumeRoute.description: Carrier resumes the route at its next waypoint.

CarrierDetour.description: Let the carrier make a detour to a given point. When it reaches the point, it will resume its normal route.

CarrierTurnIntoWind.description: Let the carrier turn into the wind.

_GetNextWaypoint.description: Get next waypoint of the carrier.

_GetETAatNextWP.description: Estimated the carrier position at some point in the future given the current waypoints and speeds.

_CheckCarrierTurning.description: Check if carrier is turning. If turning started or stopped, we inform the players via radio message.

_CheckPatternUpdate.description: Check if heading or position of carrier have changed significantly.

_PassingWaypoint.description: Function called when a group is passing a waypoint.

_ResumeRoute.description: Carrier Strike Group resumes the route of the waypoints defined in the mission editor.

_ReachedHoldingZone.description: Function called when a group has reached the holding zone.

_TaskFunctionMarshalAI.description: Function called when a group should be send to the Marshal stack. If stack is full, it is send to wait.

_GetOnboardNumberPlayer.description: Get onboard number of player or client.

_GetOnboardNumbers.description: Get onboard numbers of all units in a group.

_GetGoodBadScore.description: Get error margin depending on player skill.

_IsCarrierAircraft.description: Check if aircraft is capable of landing on this aircraft carrier.

_IsHumanUnit.description: Checks if a human player sits in the unit.

_IsHuman.description: Checks if a group has a human player.

_GetAngels.description: Convert altitude from meters to angels (thousands of feet).

_GetUnitMasses.description: Get unit masses especially fuel from DCS descriptor values.

_GetPlayerDataUnit.description: Get player data from unit object

_GetPlayerDataGroup.description: Get player data from group object.

_GetPlayerUnit.description: Returns the unit of a player and the player name from the self.players table if it exists.

_GetPlayerUnitAndName.description: Returns the unit of a player and the player name. If the unit does not belong to a player, nil is returned.

GetCoordinate.description: Get carrier coordinate.

_GetStaticWeather.description: Get static weather of this mission from env.mission.weather.

_CheckRadioQueueT.description: Function called by DCS timer. Unused.

_CheckRadioQueue.description: Check radio queue for transmissions to be broadcasted.

RadioTransmission.description: Add Radio transmission to radio queue.

SetSRSPilotVoice.description: Set SRS voice for the pilot calls.

_NeedsSubtitle.description: Check if a call needs a subtitle because the complete voice overs are not available.

Sound2Player.description: Player user sound to player if he is inside the CCA.

_RadioSubtitle.description: Create radio subtitle from radio call.

_RadioFilename.description: Get full file name for radio call.

_GetNiceSRSText.description: Format text into SRS friendly string

MessageToPlayer.description: Send text message to player client.

MessageToPattern.description: Send text message to all players in the pattern queue.

MessageToMarshal.description: Send text message to all players in the marshal queue.

_NewRadioCall.description: Generate a new radio call (deepcopy) from an existing default call.

_GetRadioSender.description: Get unit from which we want to transmit a radio message. This has to be an aircraft for subtitles to work.

_IsOnboard.description: Check if text is an onboard number of a flight.

_Number2Sound.description: Convert a number (as string) into an outsound and play it to a player group. E.g. for board number or headings.

_Number2Radio.description: Convert a number (as string) into a radio message.

_MarshallInboundCall.description: Aircraft request marshal (Inbound call both for players and AI).

_CommencingCall.description: Aircraft commencing call (both for players and AI).

_MarshalCallGasAtTanker.description: AI is bingo and goes to the recovery tanker.

_MarshalCallGasAtDivert.description: AI is bingo and goes to the divert field.

_MarshalCallRecoveryStopped.description: Inform everyone that recovery ops are stopped and deck is closed.

_MarshalCallRecoveryPausedUntilFurtherNo.description: Inform everyone that recovery is paused and will resume at a certain time.

_MarshalCallRecoveryPausedResumedAt.description: Inform everyone that recovery is paused and will resume at a certain time.

_MarshalCallClearedForRecovery.description: Inform flight that he is cleared for recovery.

_MarshalCallResumeRecovery.description: Inform everyone that recovery is resumed after pause.

_MarshalCallNewFinalBearing.description: Inform everyone about new final bearing.

_MarshalCallCarrierTurnTo.description: Compile a radio call when Marshal tells a flight the holding altitude.

_MarshalCallStackFull.description: Compile a radio call when Marshal tells a flight the holding altitude.

_MarshalCallRecoveryStart.description: Compile a radio call when Marshal tells a flight the holding altitude.

_MarshalCallArrived.description: Compile a radio call when Marshal tells a flight the holding altitude.

_SkipperStartRecovery.description: Reset player status. Player is removed from all queues and its status is set to undefined.

_ResetPlayerStatus.description: Reset player status. Player is removed from all queues and its status is set to undefined.

_RemoveSectionMember.description: Remove a member from the player's section.

_SetSection.description: Set all flights within maxsectiondistance meters to be part of my section (default: 100 meters).

_DisplayCarrierWeather.description: Report weather conditions at the carrier location. Temperature, QFE pressure and wind data.

_SetHintsOnOff.description: Turn player's aircraft attitude display on or off.

_DisplayAttitude.description: Turn player's aircraft attitude display on or off.

_SubtitlesOnOff.description: Turn radio subtitles of player on or off.

_TrapsheetOnOff.description: Turn radio subtitles of player on or off.

_MarkMarshalZone.description: Mark current marshal zone of player by either smoke or flares.

_MarkCaseZones.description: Mark CASE I or II/II zones by either smoke or flares.

_LSORadioCheck.description: LSO radio check. Will broadcase LSO message at given LSO frequency.

_MarshalRadioCheck.description: Marshal radio check. Will broadcase Marshal message at given Marshal frequency.

onbeforeSave.description: On before "Save" event. Checks if io and lfs are available.

onafterSave.description: On after "Save" event. Player data is saved to file.

onbeforeLoad.description: On before "Load" event. Checks if the file that the player grades from exists.

onafterLoad.description: On after "Load" event. Loads grades of all players from file.

Debug.description: Debug mode. Messages to all about status.

lid.description: Class id string for output to DCS log file.

theatre.description: The DCS map used in the mission.

carrier.description: Aircraft carrier unit on which we want to practice.

currentwp.description: Current waypoint, i.e. the one that has been passed last.

beacon.description: Carrier beacon for TACAN and ICLS.

zoneCCA.description: Carrier controlled area (CCA), i.e. a zone of 50 NM radius around the carrier.

zoneCCZ.description: Carrier controlled zone (CCZ), i.e. a zone of 5 NM radius around the carrier.

menuadded.description: Table of units where the F10 radio menu was added.

Platform.description: Case II/III descent at 2000 ft/min at 5000 ft platform.

DirtyUp.description: Case II/III dirty up and on speed position at 1200 ft and 10-12 NM from the carrier.

Bullseye.description: Case III intercept glideslope and follow ICLS aka "bullseye".

defaultcase.description: Default recovery case. This is the case used if not specified otherwise.

case.description: Recovery case I, II or III currently in progress.

recoverytimes.description: List of time windows when aircraft are recovered including the recovery case and holding offset.

defaultoffset.description: Default holding pattern update if not specified otherwise.

holdingoffset.description: Offset [degrees] of Case II/III holding pattern.

flights.description: List of all flights in the CCA.

Qpattern.description: Queue of aircraft groups in the landing pattern.

Qwaiting.description: Queue of aircraft groups waiting outside 10 NM zone for the next free Marshal stack.

TQMarshal.description: Abs mission time, the last transmission ended.

TQLSO.description: Abs mission time, the last transmission ended.

Nmaxpattern.description: Max number of aircraft in landing pattern.

Nmaxmarshal.description: Number of max Case I Marshal stacks available. Default 3, i.e. angels 2, 3 and 4.

NmaxSection.description: Number of max section members (excluding the lead itself), i.e. NmaxSection=1 is a section of two.

NmaxStack.description: Number of max flights per stack. Default 2.

tanker.description: Recovery tanker flying overhead of carrier.

adinfinitum.description: If true, carrier patrols ad infinitum, i.e. when reaching its last waypoint it starts at waypoint one again.

Tcollapse.description: Last time timer.gettime() the stack collapsed.

recoverywindow.description: Current or next recovery window opened.

usersoundradio.description: Use user sound output instead of radio transmissions.

Tqueue.description: Last time in seconds of timer.getTime() the queue was updated.

dTqueue.description: Time interval in seconds for updating the queues etc.

dTstatus.description: Time interval for call FSM status updates.

menumarkzones.description: If false, disables the option to mark zones via smoke or flares.

menusmokezones.description: If false, disables the option to mark zones via smoke.

playerscores.description: Table holding all player scores and grades.

autosave.description: If true, all player grades are automatically saved to a file on disk.

autosavepath.description: Path where the player grades file is saved on auto save.

autosavefilename.description: File name of the auto player grades save file. Default is auto generated from carrier name/alias.

marshalradius.description: Radius of the Marshal stack zone.

staticweather.description: Mission uses static rather than dynamic weather.

windowcount.description: Running number counting the recovery windows.

LSOdT.description: Time interval in seconds before the LSO will make its next call.

senderac.description: Name of the aircraft acting as sender for broadcasting radio messages from the carrier. DCS shortcoming workaround.

radiorelayLSO.description: Name of the aircraft acting as sender for broadcasting LSO radio messages from the carrier. DCS shortcoming workaround.

radiorelayMSH.description: Name of the aircraft acting as sender for broadcasting Marhsal radio messages from the carrier. DCS shortcoming workaround.

turnintowind.description: If true, carrier is currently turning into the wind.

detour.description: If true, carrier is currently making a detour from its path along the ME waypoints.

Creturnto.description: Position to return to after turn into the wind leg is over.

squadsetAI.description: AI groups in this set will be handled by the airboss.

excludesetAI.description: AI groups in this set will be explicitly excluded from handling by the airboss and not forced into the Marshal pattern.

menusingle.description: If true, menu is optimized for a single carrier.

collisiondist.description: Distance up to which collision checks are done.

holdtimestamp.description: Timestamp when the carrier first came to an unexpected hold.

Tmessage.description: Default duration in seconds messages are displayed to players.

soundfolder.description: Folder within the mission (miz) file where airboss sound files are located.

soundfolderLSO.description: Folder withing the mission (miz) file where LSO sound files are stored.

soundfolderMSH.description: Folder withing the mission (miz) file where Marshal sound files are stored.

Tbeacon.description: Last time the beacons were refeshed.

dTbeacon.description: Time interval to refresh the beacons. Default 5 minutes.

LSOCall.description: Radio voice overs of the LSO.

MarshalCall.description: Radio voice over of the Marshal/Airboss.

PilotCall.description: Radio voice over from AI pilots.

lowfuelAI.description: Low fuel threshold for AI groups in percent.

emergency.description: If true (default), allow emergency landings, i.e. bypass any pattern and go for final approach.

respawnAI.description: If true, respawn AI flights as they enter the CCA to detach and airfields from the mission plan. Default false.

turning.description: If true, carrier is currently turning.

trapsheet.description: If true, players can save their trap sheets.

trappath.description: Path where to save the trap sheets.

trapprefix.description: File prefix for trap sheet files.

initialmaxalt.description: Max altitude in meters to register in the inital zone.

welcome.description: If true, display welcome message to player.

skipperSpeed.description: Speed in knots for manual recovery start.

skipperOffset.description: Holding offset angle in degrees for Case II/III manual recoveries.

skipperTime.description: Recovery time in min for manual recovery.

intowindold.description: If true, use old into wind calculation.

OPS.description: - Manages aircraft CASE X recoveries for carrier operations (X=I, II, III).

rwyangle.description: Runway angle in degrees. for carriers with angled deck. For USS Stennis -9 degrees.

sterndist.description: Distance in meters from carrier position to stern of carrier. For USS Stennis -150 meters.

deckheight.description: Height of deck in meters. For USS Stennis ~63 ft = 19 meters.

wire1.description: Distance in meters from carrier position to first wire.

wire2.description: Distance in meters from carrier position to second wire.

wire3.description: Distance in meters from carrier position to third wire.

wire4.description: Distance in meters from carrier position to fourth wire.

landingdist.description: Distance in meeters to the landing position.

rwylength.description: Length of the landing runway in meters.

rwywidth.description: Width of the landing runway in meters.

totwidthstarboard.description: Total with of the carrier from stern position to starboard side (asymmetric carriers).

totwidthport.description: Total with of the carrier from stern position to port side (asymmetric carriers).

OnSpeedMin.description: Minimum on speed AoA. Values below are fast

OnSpeedMax.description: Maximum on speed AoA. Values above are slow.

Fast.description: Fast AoA threshold. Smaller means faster.

Slow.description: Slow AoA threshold. Larger means slower.

LeftMed.description: threshold for AA/OS measuring. Default -2.0 deg.

RightMed.description: threshold for AA/OS measuring. Default 2.0 deg.

loud.description: Loud version of sound file available.

duration.description: Duration of the sound in seconds. This is also the duration the subtitle is displayed.

subduration.description: Duration in seconds the subtitle is displayed.

sender.description: Sender of the message (optional). Default radio alias.

GASATDIVERT.description: "Going for gas at the divert field" call.

GASATTANKER.description: "Going for gas at the recovery tanker" call.

RECOVERYPAUSEDRESUMED.description: "Recovery paused and will be resumed at" call.

STACKFULL.description: "Marshal stack is currently full. Hold outside 10 NM zone and wait for further instructions" call.

START.description: Start of recovery in seconds of abs mission time.

STOP.description: End of recovery in seconds of abs mission time.

CASE.description: Recovery case (1-3) of that time slot.

OFFSET.description: Angle offset of the holding pattern in degrees. Usually 0, +-15, or +-30 degrees.

OVER.description: Recovery window is over and closed.

WIND.description: Carrier will turn into the wind.

SPEED.description: The speed in knots the carrier has during the recovery.

UTURN.description: If true, carrier makes a U-turn to the point it came from before resuming its route to the next waypoint.

Gamma.description: Relative heading player to carrier's runway. 0=parallel, +-90=perpendicular.

FlyThrough.description: Fly through up "/" or fly through down "\\".

finalscore.description: Points received after player has finally landed. This is the average over all incomplete passes (bolter, waveoff) before.

Tgroove.description: Time in the groove in seconds.

wind.description: Wind speed on deck in knots.

osdate.description: Real live date. Needs **os** to be desanitized.

Xmin.description: Minimum allowed longitual distance to carrier.

Xmax.description: Maximum allowed longitual distance to carrier.

Zmin.description: Minimum allowed latitudal distance to carrier.

Zmax.description: Maximum allowed latitudal distance to carrier.

LimitXmin.description: Latitudal threshold for triggering the next step if X<Xmin.

LimitXmax.description: Latitudal threshold for triggering the next step if X>Xmax.

LimitZmin.description: Latitudal threshold for triggering the next step if Z<Zmin.

LimitZmax.description: Latitudal threshold for triggering the next step if Z>Zmax.

dist0.description: Distance to carrier in meters when the group was first detected inside the CCA.

time.description: Timestamp in seconds of timer.getAbsTime() of the last important event, e.g. added to the queue.

flag.description: Flag value describing the current stack.

ai.description: If true, flight is purly AI.

onboardnumbers.description: Onboard numbers of aircraft in the group.

onboard.description: Onboard number of player or first unit in group.

section.description: Other human flight groups belonging to this flight. This flight is the lead.

holding.description: If true, flight is in holding zone.

ballcall.description: If true, flight called the ball in the groove.

name.description: Player name or name of first AI unit.

ai.description: If true, AI sits inside. If false, human player is flying.

ballcall.description: If true, flight called the ball in the groove.

recovered.description: If true, element was successfully recovered.

New.description: Create new RECOVERYTANKER object.

SetUnlimitedFuel.description: Set the tanker to have unlimited fuel.

SetSpeed.description: Set the speed the tanker flys in its orbit pattern.

SetAltitude.description: Set orbit pattern altitude of the tanker.

SetPatternUpdateInterval.description: Set minimum pattern update interval. After a pattern update this time interval has to pass before the next update is allowed.

SetPatternUpdateDistance.description: Set pattern update distance threshold. Tanker will update its pattern when the carrier changes its position by more than this distance.

SetPatternUpdateHeading.description: Set pattern update heading threshold. Tanker will update its pattern when the carrier changes its heading by more than this value.

SetLowFuelThreshold.description: Set low fuel state of tanker. When fuel is below this threshold, the tanker will RTB or be respawned if takeoff type is in air.

SetHomeBase.description: Set home airbase of the tanker. This is the airbase where the tanker will go when it is out of fuel.

SetRecoveryAirboss.description: Activate recovery by the AIRBOSS class. Tanker will get a Marshal stack and perform a CASE I, II or III recovery when RTB.

SetAWACS.description: Set that the group takes the role of an AWACS instead of a refueling tanker.

SetCallsign.description: Set callsign of the tanker group.

SetModex.description: Set modex (tail number) of the tanker.

SetTakeoffAir.description: Set takeoff in air at the defined pattern altitude and ~10 NM astern the carrier.

SetRespawnOn.description: Enable respawning of tanker. Note that this is the default behaviour.

SetRespawnOnOff.description: Set whether tanker shall be respawned or not.

SetRespawnInAir.description: Tanker will be respawned in air, even it was initially spawned on the carrier.

SetUseUncontrolledAircraft.description: Use an uncontrolled aircraft already present in the mission rather than spawning a new tanker as initial recovery thanker.

SetTACAN.description: Set TACAN channel of tanker. Note that mode is automatically set to "Y" for AA TACAN since only that works.

SetRadio.description: Set radio frequency and optionally modulation of the tanker.

SetDebugModeON.description: Activate debug mode. Marks of pattern on F10 map and debug messages displayed on screen.

SetDebugModeOFF.description: Deactivate debug mode. This is also the default setting.

IsReturning.description: Check if tanker is currently returning to base.

IsReturned.description: Check if tanker has returned to base.

IsRunning.description: Check if tanker is currently operating.

IsRefueling.description: Check if tanker is currently refueling another aircraft.

GetUnitName.description: Get unit name of the spawned tanker.

onafterStart.description: On after Start event. Starts the warehouse. Addes event handlers and schedules status updates of reqests and queue.

onafterStatus.description: On after Status event. Checks player status.

onafterPatternUpdate.description: On after "PatternUpdate" event. Updates the racetrack pattern of the tanker wrt the carrier position.

onafterRTB.description: On after "RTB" event. Send tanker back to carrier.

onafterReturned.description: On after Returned event. The tanker has landed.

onafterStop.description: On after Stop event. Unhandle events and stop status updates.

OnEventLand.description: Event handler for landing of recovery tanker.

OnEventEngineShutdown.description: Event handler for engine shutdown of recovery tanker.

_GetCallsignName.description: Get clear name callsign for spawn from enumerator

_InitRoute.description: Init waypoint after spawn. Tanker is first guided to a position astern the carrier and starts its racetrack pattern from there.

_CheckPatternUpdate.description: Check if heading or position have changed significantly.

_Pattern.description: Self made race track pattern. Not working as desired, since tanker changes course too rapidly after each waypoint.

lid.description: Log debug id text.

carrier.description: The carrier the tanker is attached to.

tankergroupname.description: Name of the late activated tanker template group.

airbase.description: The home airbase object of the tanker. Normally the aircraft carrier.

TACANmode.description: TACAN mode, i.e. "X" or "Y". Default "Y". Use only "Y" for AA TACAN stations!

TACANmorse.description: TACAN morse code. Three letters identifying the TACAN station. Default "TKR".

TACANon.description: If true, TACAN is automatically activated. If false, TACAN is disabled.

RadioFreq.description: Radio frequency in MHz of the tanker. Default 251 MHz.

Dupdate.description: Pattern update when carrier changes its position by more than this distance (meters).

Hupdate.description: Pattern update when carrier changes its heading by more than this number (degrees).

dTupdate.description: Minimum time interval in seconds before the next pattern update can happen.

Tupdate.description: Last time the pattern was updated.

respawn.description: If true, tanker be respawned (default). If false, no respawning will happen.

respawninair.description: If true, tanker will always be respawned in air. This has no impact on the initial spawn setting.

uncontrolledac.description: If true, use and uncontrolled tanker group already present in the mission.

orientation.description: Orientation of the carrier. Used to monitor changes and update the pattern if heading changes significantly.

orientlast.description: Orientation of the carrier for checking if carrier is currently turning.

position.description: Position of carrier. Used to monitor if carrier significantly changed its position and then update the tanker pattern.

awacs.description: If true, the groups gets the enroute task AWACS instead of tanker.

eplrs.description: If true, enable data link, e.g. if used as AWACS.

recovery.description: If true, tanker will recover using the AIRBOSS marshal pattern.

terminaltype.description: Terminal type of used parking spots on airbases.

unlimitedfuel.description: If true, the tanker will have unlimited fuel.

New.description: Create a new RESCUEHELO object.

SetLowFuelThreshold.description: Set low fuel state of helo. When fuel is below this threshold, the helo will RTB or be respawned if takeoff type is in air.

SetHomeBase.description: Set home airbase of the helo. This is the airbase where the helo is spawned (if not in air) and will go when it is out of fuel.

SetRescueZone.description: Set rescue zone radius. Crashed or ejected units inside this radius of the carrier will be rescued if possible.

SetRescueDuration.description: Set rescue duration. This is the time it takes to rescue a pilot at the crash site.

SetRescueOn.description: Activate rescue option. Crashed and ejected pilots will be rescued. This is the default setting.

SetRescueOff.description: Deactivate rescue option. Crashed and ejected pilots will not be rescued.

SetRescueStopBoatOn.description: Stop carrier during rescue operations. NOT WORKING!

SetRescueStopBoatOff.description: Do not stop carrier during rescue operations. This is the default setting.

SetTakeoffAir.description: Set takeoff in air near the carrier.

SetOffsetX.description: Set offset parallel to orientation of carrier.

SetOffsetZ.description: Set offset perpendicular to orientation to carrier.

SetRespawnOn.description: Enable respawning of helo. Note that this is the default behaviour.

SetRespawnOnOff.description: Set whether helo shall be respawned or not.

SetRespawnInAir.description: Helo will be respawned in air, even it was initially spawned on the carrier.

SetModex.description: Set modex (tail number) of the helo.

SetUseUncontrolledAircraft.description: Use an uncontrolled aircraft already present in the mission rather than spawning a new helo as initial rescue helo.

SetDebugModeON.description: Activate debug mode. Display debug messages on screen.

SetDebugModeOFF.description: Deactivate debug mode. This is also the default setting.

IsReturning.description: Check if helo is returning to base.

IsRescuing.description: Check if helo is on a rescue mission.

GetUnitName.description: Get unit name of the spawned helo.

OnEventLand.description: Handle landing event of rescue helo.

_OnEventCrashOrEject.description: A unit crashed or a player ejected.

onafterStart.description: On after Start event. Starts the warehouse. Addes event handlers and schedules status updates of reqests and queue.

onafterStatus.description: On after Status event. Checks player status.

onafterRun.description: On after "Run" event. FSM will go to "Running" state. If formation is stopped, it will be started again.

_TaskRTB.description: Task to send the helo RTB.

onafterRescue.description: On after "Rescue" event. Helo will fly to the given coordinate, orbit there for 5 minutes and then return to the carrier.

onafterRTB.description: On after RTB event. Send helo back to carrier.

onafterReturned.description: On after Returned event. Helo has landed.

onafterStop.description: On after Stop event. Unhandle events and stop status updates. If helo is alive, it is despawned.

RouteRTB.description: Route helo back to its home base.

lid.description: Log debug id text.

carrier.description: The carrier the helo is attached to.

helogroupname.description: Name of the late activated helo template group.

airbase.description: The airbase object acting as home base of the helo.

lowfuel.description: Low fuel threshold of helo in percent.

offsetX.description: Offset in meters to carrier in longitudinal direction.

offsetZ.description: Offset in meters to carrier in latitudinal direction.

rescuezone.description: Zone around the carrier in which helo will rescue crashed or ejected units.

respawn.description: If true, helo be respawned (default). If false, no respawning will happen.

respawninair.description: If true, helo will always be respawned in air. This has no impact on the initial spawn setting.

uncontrolledac.description: If true, use and uncontrolled helo group already present in the mission.

rescueon.description: If true, helo will rescue crashed pilots. If false, no recuing will happen.

rescueduration.description: Time the rescue helicopter hovers over the crash site in seconds.

rescuespeed.description: Speed in m/s the rescue helicopter hovers at over the crash site.

rescuestopboat.description: If true, stop carrier during rescue operations.

carrierstop.description: If true, route of carrier was stopped.

HeloFuel0.description: Initial fuel of helo in percent. Necessary due to DCS bug that helo with full tank does not return fuel via API function.

rtb.description: If true, Helo will be return to base on the next status check.

hid.description: Unit ID of the helo group. (Global) Running number.

dtFollow.description: Follow time update interval in seconds. Default 1.0 sec.

New.description: Create a new ATIS class object for a specific airbase.

SetLocale.description: Set locale for localized text-to-sound output via SRS, defaults to "en".

SetSoundfilesPath.description: Set sound files folder within miz file (not your local hard drive!).

SetSoundfilesInfo.description: Set the path to the csv file that contains information about the used sound files.

SetRadioRelayUnitName.description: Set airborne unit (airplane or helicopter), used to transmit radio messages including subtitles.

SetTransmitOnlyWithPlayers.description: For SRS - Switch to only transmit if there are players on the server.

SetActiveRunway.description: Set active runway for landing operations. This can be used if the automatic runway determination via the wind direction gives incorrect results.

SetActiveRunwayLanding.description: Set the active runway for landing.

SetActiveRunwayTakeoff.description: Set the active runway for take-off.

SetRadioPower.description: Set radio power. Note that this only applies if no relay unit is used.

GetSRSText.description: Return the complete SRS Text block, if at least generated once. Else nil.

SetRunwayHeadingsMagnetic.description: Set magnetic runway headings as depicted on the runway, *e.g.* "13" for 130° or "25L" for the left runway with magnetic heading 250°.

SetSubtitleDuration.description: Set duration how long subtitles are displayed.

SetMetricUnits.description: Set unit system to metric units.

SetImperialUnits.description: Set unit system to imperial units.

SetPressureMillimetersMercury.description: Set pressure unit to millimeters of mercury (mmHg).

SetTemperatureFahrenheit.description: Set temperature to be given in degrees Fahrenheit.

SetRelativeHumidity.description: Set relative humidity. This is used to approximately calculate the dew point.

SetReportmBar.description: Additionally report altimeter QNH/QFE in hPa, even if not set to metric.

SetAdditionalInformation.description: Additionally report free text, only working with SRS(!)

ReportQNHOnly.description: Suppresses QFE readout. Default is to report both QNH and QFE.

SetRunwayCorrectionMagnetic2True.description: Explicitly set correction of magnetic to true heading for runways.

SetReportWindTrue.description: Set wind direction (from) to be reported as *true* heading. Default is magnetic.

SetZuluTimeDifference.description: Set time local difference with respect to Zulu time.

ReportZuluTimeOnly.description: Suppresses local time, sunrise, and sunset. Default is to report all these times.

AddILS.description: Add ILS station. Note that this can be runway specific.

AddNDBouter.description: Add outer NDB. Note that this can be runway specific.

AddNDBinner.description: Add inner NDB. Note that this can be runway specific.

AddPRMG.description: Add PRMG channel. Note that this can be runway specific.

MarkRunways.description: Place marks with runway data on the F10 map.

SetSRS.description: Use SRS Simple-Text-To-Speech for transmissions. No sound files necessary.`SetSRS()` will try to use as many attributes configured with @{Sound.SRS#MSRS.LoadConfigFile}() as possible.

SetSRSProvider.description: Set an alternative provider to the one set in your MSRS configuration file.

SetQueueUpdateTime.description: Set the time interval between radio queue updates.

GetCoalition.description: Get the coalition of the associated airbase.

onafterCheckQueue.description: Check if radio queue is empty. If so, start broadcasting the message again.

onafterReport.description: Text report of ATIS information. Information delimitor is a semicolon ";" and a line break "\n".

GetMagneticRunway.description: Get runway from user supplied magnetic heading.

GetRunwayWithoutLR.description: Get runway heading without left or right info.

GetRunwayLR.description: Get info if left or right runway is active.

GetMissionWeather.description: Get weather of this mission from env.mission.weather variable.

lid.description: Class id string for output to DCS log file.

power.description: Radio power in Watts. Default 100 W.

soundpathAirports.description: Path to airport names sound files.

soundpathNato.description: Path to NATO alphabet sound files.

relayunitname.description: Name of the radio relay unit.

activerunway.description: The active runway specified by the user.

subduration.description: Duration how long subtitles are displayed in seconds.

metric.description: If true, use metric units. If false, use imperial (default).

PmmHg.description: If true, give pressure in millimeters of Mercury. Default is inHg for imperial and hectopascal (hPa, which is the same as millibar - mbar) for metric units.

qnhonly.description: If true, suppresses reporting QFE. Default is to report both QNH and QFE.

TDegF.description: If true, give temperature in degrees Fahrenheit. Default is in degrees Celsius independent of chosen unit system.

zuludiff.description: Time difference local vs. zulu in hours.

zulutimeonly.description: If true, suppresses report of local time, sunrise, and sunset.

magvar.description: Magnetic declination/variation at the airport in degrees.

ils.description: Table of ILS frequencies (can be runway specific).

ndbinner.description: Table of inner NDB frequencies (can be runway specific).

ndbouter.description: Table of outer NDB frequencies (can be runway specific).

rwylength.description: If true, give info on runway length.

elevation.description: If true, give info on airfield elevation.

runwaym2t.description: Optional correction for magnetic to true runway heading conversion (and vice versa) in degrees.

windtrue.description: Report true (from) heading of wind. Default is magnetic.

usemarker.description: Use mark on the F10 map.

markerid.description: Numerical ID of the F10 map mark point.

relHumidity.description: Relative humidity (used to approximately calculate the dew point).

useSRS.description: If true, use SRS for transmission.

dTQueueCheck.description: Time interval to check the radio queue. Default 5 sec or 90 sec if SRS is used.

ReportmBar.description: Report mBar/hpa even if not metric, i.e. for Mirage flights

TransmitOnlyWithPlayers.description: For SRS - If true, only transmit if there are alive Players.

SRSText.description: Text of the complete SRS message (if done at least once, else nil)

ATISforFARPs.description: Will be set to true if the base given is a FARP/Helipad

leftright.description: If true, runway has left "L" and right "R" runways.

New.description: Instantiate a new CTLD.

AddPlayerTask.description: (User) Add a PLAYERTASK - FSM events will check success

New.description: Create a new AIRWING class object for a specific aircraft carrier unit.

AddSquadron.description: Add a squadron to the air wing.

NewPayload.description: Add a new payload to the airwing resources.

SetCapStartTimeVariation.description: Set CAP mission start to vary randomly between Start end End seconds.

SetNumberTankerBoom.description: Set number of TANKER flights with Boom constantly in the air.

ShowPatrolPointMarkers.description: Set markers on the map for Patrol Points.
